title: Miniaturized low-TX-loss 5G/6G asymmetric switch based on T-type inductor
abstract: The invention discloses a miniaturized low-TX-loss 5G/6G asymmetric switch based on a T-type inductor, and belongs to the technical field of basic electronic circuits. The asymmetric switch comprises a first radio frequency port, a first switch arm, a second switch arm, a second radio frequency port and a third radio frequency port, the first switch arm has parallel resonance when a switch tube included in the first switch arm is switched off, and the second switch arm composed of a plurality of T-shaped dual-mode resonance circuits is in parallel resonance with a coupling capacitor connected to the input ends of the two switch arms. By designing that the coupling inductance of the first switch arm is not greater than the coupling inductance of the second switch arm, a large coupling coefficient of an emission channel is realized, namely, low TX loss and broadband are realized at the same time, and higher RX isolation and wider bandwidth are realized under the same size by utilizing th

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CSI MEASUREMENT AND REPORTING
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method includes receiving at least one channel state information (CSI) reporting setting for a first type of quantity (CSI) (1),..., CSI (NRRH) for NRRH > 1 remote radio heads (RRHs), each RRH including a set of CSI reference signal (CSI-RS) ports, where NRRH = a number of RRHs; receiving at least one CSI-RS resource setting with respect to a quantity of CSI-RS (1),..., CSI-RS (NRRH) of a second type transmitted from the NRRH group CSI-RS port, where at least one of the at least one CSI report setting or the at least one CSI-RS resource setting is not equal to the NRRH; and based on the at least one CSI reporting setting and the at least one CSI-RS resource setting: measuring a CSI-RS (1),..., a CSI-RS (NRRH); and determining, based on the measurement, a CSI (1),..., a CSI (NRRH); and transmitting the CSI (1),..., the CSI (NRRH).

title: Method and apparatus for dynamic multi-beam operation in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving configuration information including a CC list and a TCI state set; receiving a TCI state update common to the CC list; and for each CC (i) in the CC list, where i is a CC index: determining a beam bi based on a TCI state update, and applying the beam bi for receiving a DL control channel or a DL data channel associated with the CC (i), where the beam bi is determined based on spatial attributes for receiving or transmitting RSri, and where the TCI state update comprises source RSs, and for each CC (i) in the CC list, applying the beam bi for receiving the DL control channel or the DL data channel associated with the CC (i), where the beam bi is determined based on spatial attributes for receiving or transmitting RSri. The source RSs provides a reference to the RSri for determining a beam bi for CC (i).

title: Deployment method of 6G conformal intelligent reflector auxiliary network
abstract: The conformal intelligent reflecting surface is thin in profile and adjustable in shape elasticity, and can be deployed on facilities such as buildings. The embodiment of the invention researches a deployment method of a conformal intelligent reflector auxiliary network, and relates to the field of wireless communication networks, in particular to network planning and network planning tools. Firstly, a shelter is equivalent to a cylinder, a measurement point is generated by considering the boundary constraint of the shelter, and the shielding/non-shielding state from the measurement point to a nearest service base station is judged; then the side face of the cylinder is equally divided into a plurality of sub-surfaces according to the sector of the bottom face, the connectivity value of each sub-surface is calculated, the connectivity value is defined as the number of users capable of being connected to the nearest service base station through the sub-surface, and conformal intelligent

title: Phase-Tracking Demodulation Reference and Procedure for 5G and 6G
abstract: To provide improved phase noise tolerance and improved identification of certain fault types, a modulation/demodulation procedure is disclosed for 5G and 6G. The transmitter can modulate a message according to the amplitude and phase of the overall waveform to be emitted, modulated according to predetermined amplitude and phase levels of the modulation scheme. The receiver can then separate the received waveform into orthogonal I and Q branches and measure their branch amplitudes, as usual. The receiver can then convert the branch amplitude measurements back into the original amplitude-phase modulation parameters using formulas provided. The receiver can then demodulate the message by comparing the overall amplitude and phase of each message element to the predetermined amplitude and phase levels of the modulation scheme, which thereby provides substantially increased phase noise tolerance at high frequencies. The procedure can also diagnose fault types and identify faulted message ele

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS TO SUPPORT NETWORK CAPABILITY EXPOSURE FOR ROAMING USER EQUIPMENT
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating a V-NEF belonging to a VPLMN of a roaming terminal in a wireless communication system, includes the following steps of: receiving a first message including identification information for the roaming terminal, an application function identifier (AF ID), and an edge computing service provider identifier (ECSP ID); confirming a home network exposure function (H-NEF) belonging to a home public land mobile network (HPLMN) of the roaming terminal; and transmitting a second message including a VPLMN ID and the ECSP ID to the H-NEF belonging to the HPLMN.

title: Method and apparatus for providing UE Policy in a wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate, which may reduce resource waste, prevent wrong network connection, and thus enhance communication stability. According to one embodiment of the present disclosure, a network entity that performs a session management function and a packet data network gateway-control (PGW-C) in a wireless communication system comprises: a transceiver; and at least one controller which controls the transceiver. The at least one controller may be configured to: transmit a first message requesting an update on the UE policy to a session management-policy control function (SM-PCF); receive a second message including information on the UE policy changed by the SM-PCF; and send a third message including the received changed UE policy to a serving gateway (SGW).

title: - METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SYNCHRONIZATION SIGNAL BLOCK RECEPTION AND TRANSMISSION ON NON-SERCING CELL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present invention relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of a terminal includes the following operations of: receiving information related with different SSB settings via upper layer signaling; identifying a serving cell and a non-serving cell; receiving setting information of a first physical channel to be transmitted via the serving cell; based on the SSB settings, by a first transmission time unit, identifying whether a first SSB is overlapped with a resource mapped with the first physical channel among the first SSB transmitted from the serving cell and a second SSB transmitted from the non-serving cell; and in response to the identification, by the first transmission time unit, dropping the transmission of the first physical channel via the serving cell and receiving the first SSB via the serving cell. Therefore, the present invention is capable of determining whether to receive a synchronization signal block transmi

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SUPPORTING FEDERATED LEARNING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to 5G or 6G communication systems to support higher data rates. In the present invention, the present disclosure proposes a method and device for supporting federated learning in a wireless communication system. A control signal processing method in a wireless communication system includes the steps of: receiving a first control signal transmitted from a base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the base station.

title: METHOD AND APPRATUS TO PROCESS APPLICATION DATA IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate, which may improve the experience performance of users. Various embodiments of the present disclosure are configured to allow a first electronic device to detect application service flow in a wireless communication system, add quality of service (QoS) information on the application service flow to each packet of the application service flow, and transmit each packet to which the QoS information is added to a second electronic device. The QoS information includes QoS flow identifier (QFI) information for the application service flow, importance information of the application data included in each packet, and the sequence number of the application data.

title: SYNCHRONIZATION METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TIME SENSITIVE NETWORKING IN A MOBILE COMMUNICATION NETWORK
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method according to one embodiment of the present disclosure, for providing a synchronization service based on coverage, is a method for transmitting a control signal from an access and mobility management function (AMF) to a terminal in a mobile communication system capable of supporting a time-sensitive networking service, which comprises the steps of: receiving subscription information including at least location and range information for the terminal from an external application function (AF) of the mobile communication system through a network exposure function (NEF); and reporting the location and range information for the terminal as notification information to the AF through the NEF.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR APPLICATION CONTEXT RELOCATION PROCEDURE IN AN EDGE DATA NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. a method for managing an application context relocation (ACR) procedure by an edge enabler server (EES) in an edge data network is provided. The method comprises identifying that a first ACR procedure is initiated; and based on the first ACR procedure being initiated, sending a first notification message indicating a start of the first ACR procedure to a first entity in the edge data network. Upon receiving the first notification message, the first entity does not trigger execution of a second ACR procedure until the first ACR procedure is completed.

title: METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR PROVIDING ENHANCED NETWORK SLICE ALLOCATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A device and a method for managing network slice subnet feasibility in a wireless network are provided. The method includes receiving, from a network slice subnet management service consumer entity, a request message for a feasibility check　of at least one　network slicing related requirement; performing the feasibility check to determine whether the at least one network slicing related requirement is supported by the provider entity; and transmitting, to the consumer entity, a response message, wherein the response message includes at least one recommended network slicing related requirement which is supported by the provider entity, in case that the at least one network slicing related requirement is not supported by the provider entity.

title: DISCOVERING COMMON EDGE APPLICATION SERVER FOR MULTI-USER SESSION IN EDGE　DATA　NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a first Edge　Enabler　Client (EEC) and a method for discovering a common Edge Application Server (EAS) for a multi-user or a multi-Application Client (AC) session in a wireless communication network. The method further includes detecting, by the first EEC, a trigger for an EAS discovery. The method further includes transmitting, by the first EEC, an EAS discovery request message with a grouping information to an Edge　Enabler　Server (EES). The method further includes receiving, by the first EEC, an EAS discovery response message with at least one of a plurality of EAS or an already selected common EAS based on the grouping information. The method further includes determining, by the first EEC, a common EAS for establishing the multi-user session or the multi AC session in between the first EEC and at least one second EEC.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROVIDING LOCALIZED SERVICE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Specifically, the disclosure related to method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system. The method comprising includes receiving, from a base station of a hosting network, localized service support information. The method further includes performing, a manual selection of the hosting network based on the localized service support information. The method further includes transmitting, to the base station of the hosting network, a registration request message for a localized service from the hosting network. The method further includes receiving, from the base station of the hosting network, a registration accept message in response to the registration request message.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR MANAGING ENTRY OF PLMN LIST IN A USER EQUIPMENT
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The method disclosed herein includes triggering a timer of a predefined-time period for an entry of one or more PLMN-IDs associated with one or more PLMNs in the PLMN list.The method includes detecting an occurrence of a switch-on operation of the UE subsequent to an occurrence of a switch-off operation of the UE. The method includes calculating a remaining time of the timer at a time of the occurrence of the switch-off operation and determining an elapsed time between the switch-off operation of the UE and the switch-on operation of the UE. The method includes comparing the calculated remaining time and the determined elapsed time and managing the entry of the one or more PLMN-IDs in the PLMN list.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING SEMI-PERSISTENT CSI-RS RESOURCES IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Specifically, the disclosure related to apparatuses and methods for configuring semi-persistent CSI-RS resources are provided. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving a configuration about a channel state information (CSI) report. The configuration includes information about a CSI reference signal (CSI-RS) burst comprising B>1 time instances of a CSI-RS transmission. The CSI-RS burst is based on K≥1 CSI-RS resources. The method further includes measuring the CSI-RS burst and identifying a value d, where d is a number of consecutive time instances that are included in a Doppler domain (DD) unit of DD units. The method further includes determining multiple DD basis vectors, where each of the multiple DD basis vectors is associated with N4>1 of the DD units and where N4 is a length of each of the multiple DD basis vectors, and transmitting the CSI report includi

title: COMMUNICATION METHOD, USER EQUIPMENT AND BASE STATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A communication method, a user equipment and a base station are provided. The communication method includes transmitting a request signaling to a base station to request the base station to perform at least one of the following operations, transmitting at least one downlink signal, receiving at least one uplink signal, and entering an active state. In accordance with the embodiments of the disclosure, the influence of the dormancy of the base station on user experience and transmission delay is reduced when the base station enters a dormant state to reduce power consumption.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SIGNAL TRANSMISSION IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Specifically, the disclosure related to method and apparatus for receiving and transmitting information. A method performed by a network controlled repeater (NCR) in a wireless communication system. The method includes receiving, by an NCR mobile terminal (NCR-MT) from a base station, control information. Further, the method includes determining a first resource based on the control information. Further, the method includes receiving, by the NCR-MT from the base station, a downlink signal on the first resource. Further, the method includes transmitting, by an NCR-amplifier to a user equipment (UE), the downlink signal on a second resource which is delayed in time domain from the first resource.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF CHANNEL ACCESS PROCEDURE PRIORITY ON SIDELINK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for channel access procedure priority on a sidelink (SL) in a wireless communication system. A method of a user equipment (UE) includes determining a type of a SL channel access procedure before a SL transmission, which is a Type 1 SL channel access procedure or a Type 2 SL channel access procedure, and determining, based on a type of the SL transmission, a channel access priority class (CAPC) in case that the type of the SL channel access procedure is the Type 1 SL channel access procedure, wherein the CAPC is associated with a parameter Ρ. The method further includes performing, based on the type of the SL channel access procedure and the CAPC, the SL channel access procedure before the SL transmission and performing the SL transmission if the SL channel access procedure is successfully performed.

title: MOBILITY IN NON-TERRESTRIAL NETWORKS WITH EARTH MOVING CELLS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for mobility in non-terrestrial network with earth moving cells in a wireless communication system. A method of a UE comprises: receiving, for a serving cell or neighbor cells, first cell-moving information including first coordinates of a first reference location at a first epoch time and a velocity of the first reference location; determining whether at least one of the serving cell or the neighbor cells is an earth-moving cell; updating, using the first cell-moving information and ephemeris information, the first coordinates of the first reference location for at least one of the serving cell or the neighbor cells based on a determination that the at least one of the serving cell or the neighbor cells is the earth-moving cell; identifying a distance between the UE and the first coordinates of the first reference location; and determine, based on the dista

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR BANDWIDTH PART SWITCHING AND DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION INTERPRETATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for interpreting a DCI field in case that a BWP is switched by a UE that has received multi PDSCH scheduling and multi PUSCH scheduling configuration is provided. The method includes receiving a RRC message comprising a TDRA table information for scheduling multiple PDSCHs for at least one bandwidth part from a base station, receiving DCI comprising a bandwidth part indicator field and a TDRA field from an activated BWP, determining whether to switch the activated BWP, based on the bandwidth part indicator field, and when the bandwidth part indicator field indicates switching the activated BWP, receiving at least one PDSCH in an indicated BWP, based on at least one of the TDRA field, first TDRA table information of the activated BWP, or second TDRA table information of the indicated BWP.

title: DYNAMIC ADAPTATION OF TIME DOMAIN RESOURCE FOR PERIODIC OR SEMI-PERSISTENT DOWNLINK SIGNALS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A base station (BS) in a wireless communication system is provided. The BS comprises a transceiver and a controller coupled with the transceiver and configured to identify a first set of configurations indicating resources for transmission of downlink signals, identify a second set of configurations for a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) including a downlink control information (DCI) format, transmit a set of configurations by a higher layer, transmit the downlink signals based on the first set of configurations, transmit the PDCCH including the DCI format based on the second set of configurations, identify, based on the adaptation information, a third set of configurations indicating the resources for transmission of the downlink signals, and transmit the downlink signals based on the third set of configurations.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD THEREOF IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed in an apparatus and a method thereof in a wireless communication system are provided. The method may include determining a mode of a terminal and/or a base station, and performing at least one of transmitting an uplink channel, receiving a downlink channel, not transmitting an uplink channel, or not receiving a downlink channel based on the determined mode.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMITTING/RECEIVING SYNCHRONIZATION SIGNAL BLOCK BY USING NON-SERVING CELL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The method for a terminal may comprise the operations of: receiving SSB configurations related to first and second SSBs, which correspond to a serving cell and a non-serving cell, respectively, and have different PCIs; determining valid slots for repeated PUSCH transmissions by considering both the first SSB corresponding to the serving cell and the second SSB corresponding to the non-serving cell according to the SSB configurations; identifying that the first SSB and/or the second SSB overlaps, in the first slot of the valid slots, with the resource to which PUSCH is mapped; dropping the transmission of the PUSCH in the first slot in response to the identification, and receiving the first SSB and/or the second SSB through the serving cell and/or the non-serving cell.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR ENHANCING SATELLITE COMMUNICATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment, the method comprises identifying one or more parameters associated with discontinuous coverage; determining, based on the one or more parameters associated with discontinuous coverage, a user equipment (UE) out-of-coverage period; and in case of determining the UE-out-of-coverage period, transmitting to the UE a signal including an extended connected time parameter, wherein the UE is maintained in a connected mode for the extended connected time parameter.

title: MONITORING FOR APPLICATION AI/ML-BASED SERVICES AND OPERATIONS
abstract: A 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for monitoring events in a network comprises: subscribing, by an Application Function (AF), to monitoring the events, wherein the AF supports one or more AIML-based services and/or operations, and the events relate to the performance of the AIML-based services and/or operations; in response to the subscribing, monitoring, by a User Plane Function (UPF), the events; and when an event is detected, reporting, by the UPF to a Network Exposure Function (NEF), the event. The monitoring events may comprise one or more of: monitoring session inactivity of a PDU session; monitoring traffic volume of a PDU session; monitoring PCF events; per-5QI monitoring; and monitoring of edge resources. The monitoring may comprise QoS monitoring and may be performed for multiple UEs.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR LOGGING CONNECTION ESTABLISHMENT FAILURE INFORMATION IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of a UE in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes initiating a connection establishment procedure or a connection resume procedure on a cell and starting a timer corresponding to the connection establishment procedure or the connection resume procedure, identifying that the timer expires, in case that a cell identity of the cell is not equal to a cell identity stored in a UE variable for a connection failure report, storing first connection failure report information stored in the UE variable in a new entry of a list of UE variables for multiple connection failure reports, clearing the UE variable and storing second connection failure report information for the cell in the UE variable, and transmitting a message including the UE variable and the list of UE variables.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PROVIDING ACCESS PATH IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to the disclosure, an operation method of a UE in a wireless communication system includes transmitting a registration request message including an access traffic steering, switching, splitting (ATSSS) path switching indication to a target access network entity, receiving a registration accept message including an access path switching timer value from the target access network entity, in response to the registration request message, transmitting a packet data unit (PDU) session establishment request message to an access and mobility management function (AMF) via the target access network entity, based on the access path switching timer value, and releasing a PDU session with a source access network entity.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DATA TRANSMISSION IN RRC_INACTIVE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving a radio resource control (RRC) release message including suspend configuration information and configured grant-small data transmission (CG-SDT) configuration information, starting a timer related to a time alignment (TA) for CG-SDT based on the CG-SDT configuration information, identifying that criteria for a small data transmission (SDT) procedure is met, and in case that any configured grant (CG) occasion corresponding to a synchronization signal block (SSB) with a reference signal received strength (RSRP) above a threshold value is not available while the timer related to the TA for CG-SDT is running, and criteria for a random access-small data transmission (RA-SDT) procedure is met, performing the RA-SDT procedure.

title: RAN AMF METHOD AND APPARATUS OF UE AND AMF FOR CONTROLLING COMMUNICATION WITH SATELLITE RAN
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. The present disclosure provides a method for controlling an access and mobility management function (AMF) in communication with a satellite radio access network (RAN), for supporting terminal mobility when using satellite communications, comprising the processes of: receiving a non-access stratum (NAS) message that is received from user equipment and includes first location information of the user equipment, and a next generation application protocol (NG-AP) message that is received from the user equipment and includes second location information of the user equipment; requesting location information of the user equipment to a user data management (UDM) based on the first location information and the second location information; and receiving the location information of the user equipment from the UDM and transmitting the location information to the user equipment.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING NETWORK SLICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. A method is provided for a slice remapping by an access and mobility management function (AMF) in a wireless communication system. The method comprises the steps of: determining, for user equipment (UE), at least one slice that requires remapping; sending a message for requesting a slice remapping, including an identifier of each of the determined at least one slice, to a policy control function (PCF); receiving, in response to the message for requesting a slice remapping, a message including the identifier of each of at least one slice selected for remapping, from the PCF, wherein each of the at least one slice selected for remapping corresponds to one of the determined at least one slice; and sending a message for requesting a change of a slice having the identifier of the slice selected for remapping, for an identifier of a first slice of the determined at least one slice, to a sessio

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR PROVIDING SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In accordance with the present disclosure, provided is a method performed by user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication network, wherein the method includes the following procedures of: identifying that service provision from a first communication network of a first communication business operator, to which the UE subscribes, is impossible; selecting a public land mobile network (PLMN) for the UE; based on the selected PLMN, performing a registration procedure with a first network entity included in a second communication network of a second communication business operator different from the first communication business operator to receive the service from the second communication network; identifying that the service provision from the first communication network is possible, while receiving the service from the second communication network; performing a registration

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROVIDING ACCESS PATH IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: This disclosure relates to 5G or 6G communication systems for supporting higher data rates. Disclosed is a method of providing an access path in a wireless communication system, which includes the steps of: transmitting a registration request message including an access traffic steering, switching, splitting (ATSSS) path switching indication to a target access network entity; receiving a registration accept message including an access path change timer value from the target access network entity, in response to the registration request message; transmitting a PDU session establishment request message to an AMF through the target access network entity, based on an access path change timer value; and releasing a PDU session with a source access network entity.

title: NSACF COMMUNICATION METHOD AND APPARATUS IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM SUPPORTING MULTIPLE NSACF
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a network entity for selecting an NSACF in a wireless communication system supporting multiple NSACFs comprises the processes of: selecting a second NSACF based on a location of a terminal, if the location of the terminal is outside a service area of a first NSACF; transmitting a request message including at least one of information about the first NSACF and information for a network slice admission control (NSAC) exemption, to the selected second NSACF; and receiving a response message including an update result related to the NSAC exemption from the selected second NSACF. Accordingly, network slice quotas can be efficiently controlled.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR BANDWIDTH PART SWITCHING AND DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION INTERPRETATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The present invention relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present invention provides a method for allowing a terminal set with multiple physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH) scheduling and multiple physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) scheduling in a wireless communication system to interpret a downlink control information (DCI) field when a bandwidth part (BWP) changes.

title: Method and apparatus for logging connection establishment failure information in a wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to 5G or 6G communication systems to support higher data rates. Disclosed is a method for efficiently storing and reporting connection establishment failure information in a wireless communication system. The control signal processing method includes the steps of: receiving a first control signal transmitted from a base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR NETWORK SLICE INFO DELIVERY IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. A method by an NSCE server of a wireless communication system, may comprise the operations of: requesting and obtaining a network slice service profile from a network system; converting information on at least one network slice included in the network slice service profile to generate and store network slice product information; receiving a request for transmitting the network slice product information, from a vertical application layer (VAL) server; determining whether the VAL server is registered in the NSCE server; and if the VAL server is registered in the NSCE server, transmitting the network slice product information to the VAL server. The present disclosure relates to a method and apparatus for transmitting network slice information to a VAL service provider providing a service to a user of a wireless communication system.

title: Multiplexing unicast and multicast control information
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method includes receiving a downlink control information (DCI) format that schedules a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH). The DCI format includes one or more first downlink allocation indicator (DAI) bits associated with the first HARQ-ACK information and one or more second DAI bits associated with the second HARQ-ACK information. The method includes determining first HARQ-ACK information based on value bits of the one or more first DAIs and determining second HARQ-ACK information based on value bits of the one or more second DAIs. The first HARQ-ACK information is associated with a first set of Radio Network Temporary Identifiers (RNTIs), and the second HARQ-ACK information is associated with a second set of RNTIs. The method includes transmitting a PUSCH including the first and second HARQ-ACK information.

title: Method and apparatus for unified design of paging early indication based on PDCCH and RS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method and apparatus for physical downlink data channel (PDCCH) and reference signal (RS) based paging in a wireless communication system. A method includes receiving: a first configuration of a search space set in a common search space (CSS), where the search space set is for a downlink control information (DCI) format including a tracking RS (TRS) availability indication field, where the TRS availability indication field in the DCI format provides a bitmap; and a second configuration for the plurality of TRS resource sets. The method further includes determining that a set of TRS resources from the plurality of sets of TRS resources is associated with bits from the bitmap, where TRS resources from the set of TRS resources are present within a time duration based on the associated bits in the bitmap for the set of TRS resources; and receiving the TRS resource from the ex

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MODULAR MIMO IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate than a 4G communication system such as Long Term Evolution (LTE). A method for operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving configuration information on L uplink (UL) reference signals (RSs), M downlink (DL) RSs, and a calibration report, where the L UL RSs are associated with the M DL RSs; transmitting the UL RS according to the configuration information; measuring a DL RS; determining calibration information based on the measured DL RS and the reference DL RS; and transmitting a calibration report including the calibration information.

title: 6G intelligent reflector auxiliary network beam pre-switching method
abstract: The invention relates to a 6G intelligent reflecting surface (RIS) auxiliary network beam pre-switching method, and relates to the field of wireless communication networks, in particular to network planning and network planning tools. The invention aims to execute beam switching in advance for an affected service beam or delete the beam from a candidate beam set before the RIS reflection angle is adjusted, so that the influence of the adjustment of the RIS reflection angle on all beams is reduced to the minimum, the beam failure recovery process is reduced, and the communication efficiency is improved. The method is realized through the following steps: firstly, a base station configured with an RIS notifies all base stations using the RIS; next, these base stations assess the affected beam and terminal, send signaling to the terminal to indicate beam switching or deletion, and send an acknowledgement message to the base station configured with the RIS. And finally, the base station co

title: Surface acoustic wave filter structure and preparation method thereof
assignee: BEIJING ZHONGXUN SIFANG SCIENCE & TECH CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses a surface acoustic wave filter structure and a preparation method, and relates to the technical field of surface acoustic wave filters, the surface acoustic wave filter structure comprises a substrate layer, a first high-resistance layer, a second high-resistance layer, a low-resistance layer, a piezoelectric layer and an interdigital transducer, the substrate layer, the first high-resistance layer, the second high-resistance layer, the low-resistance layer, the piezoelectric layer and the interdigital transducer are sequentially arranged from bottom to top, the substrate layer is made of high-purity monocrystalline silicon, the first high-resistance layer is made of aluminum nitride, the second high-resistance layer is made of silicon carbide, the low-resistance layer is made of silicon dioxide, the piezoelectric layer is made of lithium tantalate, and the interdigital transducer is made of copper or aluminum-copper alloy. The surface acoustic wave filter struc

title: Method and apparatus for improving and relating to disaster condition management in mobile communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises: sending a registration request message for a disaster roaming service to a network entity associated with a first network system, the registration request message comprising capability information of a terminal; transmitting, to the network entity, a service request message for an emergency service using the second network system; and after the emergency service ends, performing cell reselection to return to the first network system providing the disaster roaming service.

title: Method and apparatus for handling user equipment registration disaster roaming service in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a method for handling, by a second PLMN (200b), registration of a disaster roaming service by a UE (100) in a network (1000). In an embodiment, the method includes transmitting a registration rejection message to the UE (100) in response to determining that the UE is not allowed to receive a disaster roaming service from a second PLMN with a first PLMN as a PLMN with a disaster condition. In another embodiment, the method includes, in response to determining that the UE is allowed to receive a disaster roaming service from a second PLMN (200b), determining whether the second PLMN (200b) provides the disaster roaming service or a normal service to the UE (100), and transmitting a registration accept message to the UE (100).

title: Communication method and device
abstract: The invention provides a communication method and device, which can solve the problem of relatively high air interface transmission delay, and can be applied to the fields of a 4G system, a 5G system and a future communication system, such as a 6G system. The method comprises the following steps: a communication device determines a time offset value according to scheduling arrangement information and arrival time, and sends the time offset value to an application network element. Wherein the scheduling arrangement information indicates a scheduling moment, the arrival time indicates a moment when the first data packet in the service flow arrives at the communication equipment, and the time offset value is a difference value between the moment when the first data packet arrives at the communication equipment and the scheduling moment.

title: Decoding, modulation and noise reduction method and system for 6G wireless signal
assignee: CHINA TELECOM DIGITAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGY CO LTD
abstract: The invention relates to a decoding modulation noise reduction method and system for 6G wireless signals, and belongs to the technical field of modulation. The method comprises the following steps: collecting IM data, and carrying out initial classification on the IM data through a first preset algorithm; performing regression detection processing on the initially classified IM data to obtain precisely classified IM classification data; and reducing the dimension of the IM data through a second preset algorithm, converting audio data including noise and interference signals at a receiving end into characters, and filtering messy codes in the characters through feature extraction to complete interference noise filtering. According to the method, the IM data is accurately classified through the first preset algorithm, the data dimension is reduced through the second preset algorithm, meanwhile, audio data such as noise and interference signals of a receiving end are converted into charac

title: Multiplexed Code for ACK/SR/Power/Beam Feedback in 5G and 6G
abstract: Disclosed are procedures and examples of feedback messages that enable a user device to request transmission adjustments in 5G and 6G. The feedback message may indicate a selected beam direction, a power adjustment request, a grant request, and an acknowledgement, among other things. For example, a downlink message may include several beam test signals, each transmitted in a different direction, and the user device can indicate, in the feedback message, which test signal was best received. Thus the feedback enables the base station to adjust its beam toward the user device upon each message. In addition, the user device can determine the amplitude or signal quality received in the favored test signal, and can then include an incremental power adjustment request in the feedback message. In addition, the user device can request a retransmission and/or an uplink grant, and can optionally provide a BSR as well, in some embodiments.

title: Copper foil structure and manufacturing method thereof wherein the structure includes a carrier layer, a peeling layer, a copper foil layer, a roughened layer and an antioxidant layer
abstract: A copper foil structure of the present invention mainly includes a carrier layer, a peeling layer, a copper foil layer, a roughened layer and an antioxidant layer. The carrier layer is first sputtered to form the peeling layer, followed by electroforming the copper foil layer and the roughened layer, and finally coating an antioxidant liquid to form the antioxidant layer. The main purpose of the present invention is to provide a copper structure that can further reduce a line width when etching a carrier board, and is suitable for fitting on various carrier boards, such as glass fiber boards or thermoplastic boards including polyethylene boards in the field of flexible printed circuit boards (FPC), liquid crystal polymer boards, and Teflon (polytetrafluoroethylene) boards used as substrates for high-frequency 5G and 6G circuits.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR ELIMINATING LATENCY IN STREAMING SERVICE BY PARALLEL NETWORK SLICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In accordance with various embodiments of the present disclosure, a method for operating a streaming service client (SSC) node in a wireless communication system, includes the following procedures of: establishing a connection with a streaming service provider (SSP) through two services which are enhanced mobile broadband (eMBB) and ultra-reliable low latency communication (URLLC); receiving first data from the SSP through the eMBB, while receiving second data through the URLLC, wherein the second data is metadata of the first data; determining whether the first data is successfully received; and, when the first data is not successfully received, generating a data stream using the second data.

title: RANDOM ACCESS METHOD AND DEVICE IN ULTRA-HIGH FREQUENCY WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a data transmission rate higher than that of a 4G system such as LTE. More particularly, disclosed are a method and a device related to the generation and detection of random access preamble signals for random access in ultra-high frequency wireless communication.

title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR BASIS-BASED COMPRESSION OF DOPPLER COEFFICIENTS FOR CSI FEEDBACK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments disclosed herein relate to systems (100) and methods (400, 800) for performing a basis-based compression of Doppler coefficients for Channel State Information (CSI) feedback in wireless communication networks. The systems (100) and methods (400, 800) implement the CSI feedback for a User Equipment (UE) (102) with less number of basis coefficients and with reduced feedback in reporting the basis coefficients. The systems (100) and methods (400, 800) facilitate differential reporting of Doppler frequency components across beams and sub-bands/ delays for the CSI feedback. The systems (100) and methods (400, 800) enable a base station (104) to determine the length of an Observation Window (OW) and Prediction Window (PW) for triggering the OW and PW for reporting feedback. The systems (100) and methods (400, 800) use Slepian sequences for spatial domain basis for codebook ba

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MANAGING GAP CONFIGURATION OF MULTIPLE MEASUREMENT GAPS IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present subject matter refers to a method for managing gap configuration of multiple measurement gaps. According to one embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes: transmitting, to a user equipment (UE), a measurement gap configuration information including a first measurement gap configuration without a measurement gap identifier (ID) and a measurement gap list including at least one second measurement gap configuration with a gap ID; transmitting, to the UE, a measurement object information including without an associated measurement gap ID; and configuring a measurement gap based on the first measurement gap configuration for a frequency associated with the measurement object information.

title: METHOD FOR DETERMINING TIMING FOR REQUESTING MUSIM GAPS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present subject matter refers to methods and systems for implementing a MUSIM gap.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM TO SHARE UE MOBILITY CHARACTERISTICS IN 3GPP EDGE APPLICATIONS AND HTTP SERVICES
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a method to share UE mobility characteristics in an edge network (1000) by an EES (200). The method includes receiving an EEC registration request message comprising a mobility indication from an EEC device (1000). Further, the method includes determining whether the mobility indication indicates whether the EEC device supports mobility. Further, the method includes performing subscribing to a 3GPP core network entity for UE location information when the mobility indication indicates that the EEC device supports mobility, storing the location information in an EEC context, and sending an EEC registration response message to the EEC device. In another embodiment, the method includes performing one-time location fetch for the EEC when the mobility indication indicates that the EEC device does not support mobility, storing the location information in a memor

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING PRECONFIGURED MEASUREMENT GAPS DURING HANDOVER
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein is to provide a method and User Equipment (UE) (110) for handling preconfigured measurement gaps during handover in a wireless network. The method includes performing, by the UE (110) in the wireless network, a handover from a first network node (130) to a second network node (120) in the wireless network. The method further includes deactivating, by the UE (110), one or more preconfigured measurement gaps without sending Uplink Medium Access Control Control Element (UL MAC CE). The method further includes detecting, by the UE (110), that the one or more preconfigured measurement gaps need to be activated or re-activated after the handover is completed. The method further includes activating or reactivating, by the UE (110), the one or more preconfigured measurement gaps by sending the UL MAC CE.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MANAGING MULTIPLE TRPS DURING RACH PROCEDURE IN COMMUNICATION NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments are directed to a method for managing multiple TRPs during RACH procedure within a multi-TRP system in a communication network. The method includes detection, by a UE (100), presence of the multi-TRP system serving in at least one of downlink and uplink and determining, by the UE (100), a first TRP serving in the downlink or the uplink, for transmission of a Random Access Preamble. The method includes determining, by the UE (100), a second TRP for monitoring a reception of a RAR and receiving, by the UE (100), the RAR on third TRP and determining, by the UE (100), a fourth TRP for scheduling PUSCH transmission by a UL grant of the RAR. The method also includes determining, by the UE (100), a fifth TRP for monitoring a reception of a contention resolution message and receiving, by the UE (100), the contention resolution message on a sixth TRP.

title: HYBRID ROHC-RTP STACK FOR SMALL PACKET APPLICATIONS
abstract: Systems and methods are provided for providing a lightweight and efficient hybrid Robust Header Compression (ROHC) and Real-Time Protocol (RTP) stack for VoIP processing in 5G and/or 6G systems. The hybrid ROHC-RTP stack system can optimize the 5G data plane Layer2 and Layer3 operation in a manner that is particularly suitable for VoIP packets. The hybrid ROHC-RTP stack system has hardware and software elements that implement a data plane of the IP Multimedia Subsystem (IMS) stack on a hardware device that is separate and distinct from the hardware for a control plane of the IMS stack. For example, the hybrid ROHC- RTP stack system can be implemented on a separate dedicated microprocessor on the UE to consume less power, have less latency, and achieve more efficient processing of VoIP packets.

title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR SIDELINK POSITIONING REFERENCE SIGNALS SIGNALING STRUCTURE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for a sidelink (SL) positioning reference signal (PRS) signaling structure in a wireless communication system. A method of operating a user equipment (UE) includes transmitting, to another UE, a first SL PRS and a first SL control information associated with the first SL PRS and receiving, from the other UE, a second SL control information associated with a second SL PRS. The method further includes determining, based on the second SL control information, resources for the second SL PRS and receiving the second SL PRS on the determined resources.

title: TRANSMISSION AND RECEPTION POWER IN FULL-DUPLEX SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Apparatuses and methods for transmission power in full-duplex systems. A method of operating a user equipment (UE) for receiving a downlink (DL) channel or signal includes receiving first information for a first set of parameters for a first DL channel or signal associated with a first subset of slots from a set of slots on a cell and second information for a second set of parameters for a second DL channel or signal associated with a second subset of slots from the set of slots on the cell. The method further includes determining, based on a slot for a reception being from the second subset of slots, to use the second set of parameters for the reception and receiving, based on a power adjustment value in the second set of parameters, the second DL channel or signal in the slot.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMISSIONS OVER MULTIPLE SLOTS IN DUPLEX MODE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Apparatuses and methods for transmissions over multiple slots in duplex mode. A method includes receiving information for first slots that include first uplink (UL) symbols associated with first frequency resources of a sub-band (SB), second slots that include second UL symbols associated with second frequency resources of a bandwidth (BW), and transmission of a channel over a first number of slots including slots from the first slots and the second slots. The method further includes determining a first set of frequency resources within the SB for transmission of the channel over the first slots and a second set of frequency resources within the BW for transmission of the channel over the second slots. The method further includes transmitting the channel in the first set of frequency resources within the SB over the first slots and in the second set of frequency resources within th

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INTER-CELL BEAM MANAGEMENT CELL SWITCH IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for methods and apparatuses for facilitating serving cell changes based on signaling related to beam management procedures in a wireless communications network. A user equipment (UE) comprises a transceiver and a processor operably coupled to the transceiver. The transceiver is configured to receive a transmission configuration indicator (TCI) state identifier (ID) associated with a target serving cell, receive a cell switch command, and transmit, in response to reception of the cell switch command, a channel conveying a positive hybrid automatic repeat request acknowledgement (HARQ-ACK). The processor is configured to perform, based on the cell switch command, a cell switch at a time, wherein the time corresponds to a slot that starts after a cell switch application time from a last symbol of the channel conveying the positive HARQ-ACK.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PAGING EARLY INDICATION MONITORING BASED ON UE TYPE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Specifically, the present disclosure provides method and apparatus for paging early indication monitoring based on UE type including: receiving, from a base station, SIB1; and, in case that the SIB1 includes first information on a first initial downlink BWP for the reduced capability terminal and second information on a first PEI configuration for the reduced capability terminal, monitoring a PEI in a PDCCH of the first initial downlink BWP for the reduced capability terminal based on the first PEI configuration for the reduced capability terminal.

title: INTEGRATED ACCESS AND BACKHAUL TIMING MODE SIGNALING
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th Generation (5G) or 6th Generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for a first node in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a second node, a radio resource control (RRC) message including information on a list of slots, receiving, from the second node, a medium access control (MAC) control element (CE) indicating at least one timing mode to be applied to at least one slot in the list of slots, and identifying, based on the MAC CE, the at least one timing mode corresponding to the at least one slot.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING IP ADDRESS TO INTEGRATED ACCESS AND BACKHAUL NODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure provides a method performed by an integrated access and backhaul (IAB) node in a wireless communication system, the method comprising the steps of: identifying whether or not a signaling radio bearer (SRB) 3 is established; and if the SRB3 is established, transmitting an IABotherinformation message to a secondary node (SN) via the SRB3, and if the SRB3 is not established, transmitting, to a master node (MN) via an SRB1, a radio resource control (RRC) message including the IABotherinformation message.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION INTERPRETATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The disclosure provides a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system. The method includes receiving, from a base station, a higher layer signal including time domain resource assignment (TDRA) information; receiving, from the base station, downlink control information (DCI) including an antenna port field; and identifying an antenna port table of a first mapping type and an antenna port table of a second mapping type based on the antenna port field, in case that the DCI includes multiple scheduling information of different mapping types.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR SUPPORTING DISCONTINUOUS RECEPTION MODE OPERATION IN SIDELINK-BASED RELAY COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method for operating a sidelink relay in a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: receiving, from a terminal, a first message including assistance information relating to a sidelink discontinuous reception mode (DRX) between the sidelink relay and the terminal; and transmitting, to the terminal, a second message including configuration information relating to the sidelink discontinuous reception mode. The assistance information included in the first message may include at least one of a sidelink DRX cycle, sidelink timer information, and a sidelink start offset, which are preferred by the terminal.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF DYNAMIC BEAM INDICATION AND SWITCHING
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for dynamic beam indication and switching in a wireless communication system. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving, in downlink control information (DCI), at least a first DCI field to indicate a first transmission configuration indication (TCI) codepoint and receiving radio resource control (RRC) signaling including a first parameter indicating whether a second DCI field indicating a second TCI codepoint is present in the DCI. The method further includes identifying, based on the first parameter, a presence or absence of the second DCI field in the DCI and identifying, based on the first and second DCI fields, a set of a first TCI state and a second TCI state. The first DCI field is a TCI field, and the second DCI field uses one or more bits of one or more existing DCI fields in the DCI.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR ELIMINATING, BY PARALLEL NETWORK SLICES, STREAMING SERVICE DELAY IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating a streaming service client (SSC) node in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises the steps of: establishing a connection with a streaming service provider (SSP) through two types of services of enhanced mobile broadband (eMBB) and ultra reliable low latency communication (URLLC); receiving first data from the SSP through the eMBB, and simultaneously receiving second data through the URLLC, the second data being metadata of the first data; determining whether the first data has been successfully received; and when the first data has not been successfully received, generating a data stream by using the second data.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR RECEIVING PAGING-RELATED INFORMATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th-generation (5G) or 6th-generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for monitoring paging by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a cell, system information including paging early indication (PEI) configuration, identifying whether a parameter is configured via the system information, wherein the parameter indicates that the UE monitors PEI only if the latest received RRC release message is from the cell, in case that the parameter is configured, identifying whether an radio resource control (RRC) release message is received most recently in the cell and in case that the parameter is configured and the RRC release message is received most recently in the cell, monitoring PEI in the cell.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF INDICATING DYNAMIC BEAM SWITCHING VIA DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for indication of dynamic beam switching via downlink control information (DCI) in a wireless communication system.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MANAGING GAP CONFIGURATION OF MULTIPLE MEASUREMENT GAPS IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present subject matter refers to a method for managing gap configuration of multiple measurement gaps. According to one embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes: transmitting, to a user equipment (UE), a measurement gap configuration information including a first measurement gap configuration without a measurement gap identifier (ID) and a measurement gap list including at least one second measurement gap configuration with a gap ID; transmitting, to the UE, a measurement object information including without an associated measurement gap ID; and configuring a measurement gap based on the first measurement gap configuration for a frequency associated with the measurement object information.

title: INTEGRATED ACCESS AND BACKHAUL TIMING MODE SIGNALING
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th Generation (5G) or 6th Generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for a first node in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a second node, a radio resource control (RRC) message including information on a list of slots, receiving, from the second node, a medium access control (MAC) control element (CE) indicating at least one timing mode to be applied to at least one slot in the list of slots, and identifying, based on the MAC CE, the at least one timing mode corresponding to the at least one slot.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR RECEIVING PAGING-RELATED INFORMATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th-generation (5G) or 6th-generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for monitoring paging by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a cell, system information including paging early indication (PEI) configuration, identifying whether a parameter is configured via the system information, wherein the parameter indicates that the UE monitors PEI only if the latest received RRC release message is from the cell, in case that the parameter is configured, identifying whether an radio resource control (RRC) release message is received most recently in the cell, and in case that the parameter is configured and the RRC release message is received most recently in the cell, monitoring PEI in the cell.

title: COMMUNICATION METHOD, USER EQUIPMENT AND BASE STATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A communication method, a user equipment and a base station are provided. The communication method includes transmitting a request signaling to a base station to request the base station to perform at least one of the following operations, transmitting at least one downlink signal, receiving at least one uplink signal, and entering an active state. In accordance with the embodiments of the disclosure, the influence of the dormancy of the base station on user experience and transmission delay is reduced when the base station enters a dormant state to reduce power consumption.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PDCP RE-ESTABLISHMENT PROCEDURE OF UE SUPPORTING ETHERNET HEADER COMPRESSION PROTOCOL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving a radio resource control (RRC) message from a base station (BS), the RRC message including radio link control (RLC) device (entity) configuration information, packet data convergence protocol (PDCP) device configuration information, and bearer configuration information, identifying whether a PDCP device is connected to an RLC device in which an out-of-sequence delivery function (rlc-OutOfOrderDelivery) is configured, based on the RRC message, and configuring a reordering function in the PDCP device, based on whether the PDCP device is connected to the RLC device, wherein the RLC device may be at least one device of an RLC acknowledged mode (AM) RLC device or an RLC unacknowledged mode (UM) mode RLC device.

title: Method and apparatus for measuring and reporting communication parameters in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system includes receiving a configuration of a channel offset for reporting a target entity in a channel state information (CSI) report; measuring one or more measurement reference signals (RSs) for determining a channel offset; determining a channel offset of the target entity based on the measured one or more measurement RSs; and transmitting, based at least on the configuration, a CSI report comprising a channel offset report associated with the determined channel offset. The measurement RS includes a channel state information reference signal (CSI-RS), a synchronization signal block (SSB), or both the CSI-RS and the SSB.

title: Method and apparatus for transmitting and processing plurality of profile-enabled profile management messages between terminal and universal integrated circuit card
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. Embodiments of the present disclosure provide a method and apparatus for determining a scheme for accessing an ISD-R corresponding to a profile management module in an eUI CC in a terminal (modem or LPA) during terminal-card initialization. In addition, embodiments of the present disclosure provide a method of determining, by an LPA, a scheme to access an ISD-R to be used by the LPA with reference to a scheme determined during terminal-card initialization or a pre-configured scheme and transmitting a message to an eUI CC. In addition, embodiments of the present disclosure provide a method and apparatus for configuring different profile management messages by the LPA according to the determined ISD-R access scheme and performing transmission through the selected ISD-R access scheme.

title: Communication load balancing method based on combination of 6G communication and OTFS technology, storage medium and equipment
assignee: CHINA TELECOM DIGITAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGY CO LTD
abstract: The invention provides a communication load balancing method combining 6G communication with an OTFS technology, a storage medium and equipment, and the method comprises the steps: building a Doppler plane matrix at a transmitting end through an OTFS carrier waveform in a 6G communication process, carrying out the overlapping decompression of an original transmission signal of the transmitting end through an FTN signal receiver, and obtaining a plurality of pulse sequences; respectively predicting the abnormal conditions of the next time offset and frequency offset according to the time offset and the frequency offset recorded in the historical log of the transmitting end by using the pulse sequence, and generating an OTFS carrier waveform identifier in combination with the communication weather; carrying out abnormity correction on abnormal time offset and frequency offset in a non-sunny day through a radio wave natural environment attenuation model, and updating an OTFS carrier wavef

title: Method and apparatus for monitoring paging occasion in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In accordance with an embodiment, the method includes identifying whether a timer associated with a small data transmission (SDT) process is operating at a UE in a radio resource control (RRC) inactive state, at least one of monitoring a system information (SI) change indication or an emergency notification at least once in any paging occasion of each discontinuous reception (DRX) cycle, and obtaining at least one of the SI change indication or the emergency notification based on a result of the monitoring is performed.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PHYSICAL DOWNLINK CONTROL CHANNEL MONITORING PER MULTI-SLOT
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In accordance with an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method and apparatus for physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) monitoring per multiple slots are provided.

title: Wireless signal transmission attenuation prediction method based on 6G communication, storage medium and equipment
assignee: CHINA TELECOM DIGITAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGY CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses a wireless signal transmission attenuation prediction method based on 6G communication, a storage medium and equipment. The wireless signal transmission attenuation prediction method comprises the following steps: collecting transmission parameters and channel parameters of uplink and downlink wireless signals between a user and a wireless access node in a 6G communication process; constructing a wireless signal fading model through the transmission parameter and the channel parameter of the wireless signal, and predicting a transmission power attenuation value of the wireless signal; judging whether the predicted wireless signal transmission power attenuation value is a sunny day or not, and if yes, subtracting the predicted wireless signal transmission power attenuation value from the wireless signal energy to obtain a final wireless signal transmission power predicted value; otherwise, calculating the wireless signal power loss rate of the terahertz and milli

title: Cross polarization leaky cable MIMO communication system
assignee: ZHONGTIAN RADIO FREQUENCY CABLE CO LTD
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of mobile communication, and provides a cross polarization leaky coaxial cable MIMO communication system which can be suitable for coverage of 2G/3G/4G/5G/6G signals, judges whether combination of the signals can generate adjacent channel interference and intermodulation interference or not by receiving the signals of different standards from different operators, and improves the communication efficiency. According to the invention, the signals of different standards in the combination of the signals of different standards, which generate interference, are respectively fed into different leaky coaxial cables, so that on one hand, adjacent channel interference of adjacent channel signals in the same leaky coaxial cable can be avoided, or intermodulation interference among different signals can be avoided, the interference of the signals is reduced, and the communication quality is improved. And on the other hand, the radiation polarization di

title: IMPROVEMENT OF UE ROUTING POLICY (URS) USING NETWORK SLICING
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a UE is disclosed, the method comprising: having at least one existing PDU session associated with an S-NSSAI; requesting a new PDU session from an upper layer; determining conditions; performing a check operation including: (i) checking whether the allowed NSSAI includes only one S-NSSAI, and (ii) checking whether any one of the at least one existing PDU session has an attribute that matches a corresponding attribute in the requested new PDU session; and when the checking operations (i) and (ii) are both true: selecting a PDU session from the at least one existing PDU session that matches at least one attribute, determining that the selected PDU session can be used or associated with a request from the upper layer, and forwarding details of the selected PDU session to the upper layer.

title: Random access method and device in ultrahigh frequency wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a data transmission rate higher than that of a 4G system such as LTE. More specifically, disclosed is a method and apparatus relating to generating and detecting a random access preamble signal for random access in ultrahigh frequency wireless communication.

title: Encryption method based on 6G satellite communication, storage medium and equipment
assignee: CHINA TELECOM DIGITAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGY CO LTD
