abstract: Wireless communication efficiency in a 5G/6G network is enhanced through AI/ML model management and deployment. Methods are presented that utilize artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI/ML) models to enhance wireless communication efficiency in 5G/6G networks. The process involves storing, configuring, and transferring AI/ML models within base station and user equipment (UE) devices, allowing localized decision making and improved network performance. Functions include dynamic model activation/deactivation, model compression/decompression, and coding/decoding method negotiation. Periodic or condition-driven model updates ensure responsiveness to network changes, while model replacement enables upgrades and iterations. The system facilitates seamless handover between base stations, where information sharing about model capabilities and UE details. Model storage and configuration may also occur in the UE enabling local decision making under variable or challenging network condi

title: 6G communication network architecture generation method and system, electronic equipment and medium
abstract: The invention discloses a 6G communication network architecture generation method and system, electronic equipment and a medium. By applying the technical scheme of the application, the intelligent defense center can be deployed in the 6G communication network architecture to upload the acquired parameters such as network flow information and energy consumption information generated in each domain to the intelligent decision center; and the intelligent decision-making center intelligently decides the most matched security policy and network element arrangement policy from the pre-constructed uniform resource pool based on the information, so that on one hand, a technical scheme for integrally protecting the 6G network by deploying the intelligent defense center and the intelligent decision-making center and combining the uniform resource pool is realized. And on the other hand, the purpose of promoting the evolution of the defense technology among the domains by controlling the securit

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR IMPROVEMENT FOR USER EQUIPMENT UE ASSISTANCE INFORMATION IN MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. The method of a terminal of the present disclosure may include: a step of transmitting information about the capability of the terminal to support provision of first terminal assistance information to a base station; a step of receiving configuration information for the terminal for reporting the first terminal assistance information from the base station; and a step of initiating transmission of a first terminal assistance information message (UAI message) for reporting the first terminal assistance information to the base station, and starting a first timer associated with reporting the first terminal assistance information.

title: Access network and communication system
abstract: The invention provides an access network and a communication system, the access network comprises a centralized unit (CU) and a distributed unit (DU), and the DU is connected with the CU; the CU comprises at least one type of CU, and the DU comprises at least one type of DU; wherein when the CU and the DU respectively have only one type, the corresponding types of the CU and the DU are different; or, the CU comprises a plurality of types of CUs; alternatively, the DUs include a plurality of types of DUs. According to the scheme of the embodiment of the invention, the flexibility and functionality of a communication system are effectively improved, the requirements of the 6G standard can be met, and smooth transition towards 6G network standard evolution is realized.

title: Data transmission method, device, equipment, system and storage medium
abstract: The invention discloses a data transmission method, device, equipment and system and a storage medium. The method is applied to a wireless access point device, and the method comprises the following steps: determining that a target channel is in an idle state and the duration of the idle state is greater than or equal to a first set duration, generating indication information, the indication information being used for indicating to generate resource unit scheduling data of a terminal device; generating resource unit scheduling data based on the indication information; sending the resource unit scheduling data to the target terminal device; receiving target data of the target terminal device, wherein the target data is sent by the target terminal device based on the resource unit scheduling data; wherein the first set time length is smaller than a reference time length threshold value, the reference time length threshold value is determined based on an inter-frame interval parameter and

title: Radio frequency exposure mitigation
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatus for radio frequency exposure mitigation. A method for a user equipment (UE) to transmit a first channel includes receiving first information for a first downlink reference signal (DL RS) and a repetition number set. The method further includes determining a first reference signal received power (RSRP) value of the first DL RS, a first spatial filter corresponding to the first DL RS, a first exposure value of the first spatial filter, and a first number of repetitions in a set of repetition numbers based on the first RSRP value and the first exposure value. The method further includes transmitting the first channel with the first number of repetitions using the first spatial filter.

title: 6G silicon-based amplifier with compact port coupling feedforward and interstage coupling feedback
abstract: The invention discloses a compact port coupling feed-forward and interstage coupling feedback 6G silicon-based amplifier, which adopts a differential structure and comprises a broadband input matching network, a multi-stage amplifier sub-network, a broadband interstage matching network, a broadband output matching network and a single-ended/differential conversion Marchand balun, the device is scientific in structural design. Coupling between a collector inductor and a base inductor of a transistor, coupling between the collector inductor and an emitter inductor and coupling between the base inductor and the emitter inductor are added in a circuit, and circuit transconductance is changed, so that the gain of the amplifier is improved. Coupling transmission lines are added between amplifier sub-networks, and a collector inductor of a previous-stage transistor is coupled and connected with an emitter inductor of a next-stage transistor, so that the gain of the amplifier is improved, the

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING ALTERNATIVE NETWORK SLICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Provided is a method of solving a problem in which PDU session creation is rejected due to an NSAC in a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the disclosure through alternative S-NSSAI.

title: ENHANCING WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EFFICIENCY IN 5G/6G NETWORKS THROUGH AI/ML MODEL MANAGEMENT AND DEPLOYMENT
abstract: This invention presents methods leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI/ML) models to enhance wireless communications efficiency in 5G/6G networks. The processes involve storing, configuring, and transferring AI/ML models within base stations and user equipment devices (UE), allowing for localized decision-making and improved network performance. Features include dynamic model activation/deactivation, model compression/decompression, and encoding/decoding method negotiation. Periodic or condition-driven model updates ensure responsiveness to network changes, while model replacements enable upgrades and iterations. The system facilitates seamless handovers between base stations, with information sharing about model capabilities and UE specifics. Model storage and configuration can also occur in the UE, empowering it for local decision-making in variable or challenging network conditions. The techniques contribute to significant performance, efficiency, and reliabilit

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR SUPPORTING ACCESS FOR LOCAL SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating a terminal according to the present disclosure comprises the steps of: transmitting, to a first base station of a first network, a registration request message including an indicator indicating that a terminal has local access to a second network; receiving, from the first base station, a policy update request message including a cell identifier or an area identifier associated with the second network; updating a policy for the second network on the basis of the policy update request message; and connecting to a second base station of the second network through the local access on the basis of the updated policy.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR E2 NODE CONTROL AND CELL CONTROL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to embodiments of the disclosure, a method performed by a Distributed Unit (DU) may include receiving a control message from a Radio Access Network (RAN) Intelligent Controller (RIC), wherein the control message includes control information for controlling Data Radio Bearer (DRB) allocation in each network slice, identifying, from a request message for setting one or more DRBs of a terminal, Single Network Slice Selection Assistance Information (S-NSSAI) of the one or more DRBs, and setting the number of DRBs allocatable in a network slice corresponding to the S-NSSAI, based on the control information.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD OF GROUP UE HANDOVER FOR SAVING NETWORK ENERGY CONSUMPTION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal according to an embodiment of the present disclosure includes the steps of: receiving setting information and valid condition information for a target cell for handover from a base station; receiving an instruction to turn off a serving cell from the base station; and performing the handover based on the setting information and the valid condition information for the target cell.

title: A METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SIDELINK POSITIONING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present invention, disclosed are a method and a procedure for transmitting a reference signal used for performing positioning through a sidelink.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SUPPORTING AN EXTENDED ACCESS POINT IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, in a wireless communication system, a method performed by an access and mobility management function (AMF) may include the following steps of: receiving information about EAP capabilities from an extended access point (EAP); performing an extension of a control plane to include the EAP based on the received information about EAP capabilities; generating an X2 interface based on the number of base stations associated with the AMF and the EAP; instructing the base station to establish the EAP and the X2 interface based on the generated X2 interface; and a step of instructing the EAP to establish a connection with a terminal.

title: MANAGING APPLICATION CONTEXT RELOCATION SELECTION IN EDGE NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A first edge enabler server (EES) transmits, to a second EES, a first message requesting an application context relocation (ACR) scenario selection, receives, from the second EES, a second message in response to the first message, wherein the second message comprises a list of ACR scenarios selected by the second EES, and transmits, to an edge enabler client (EEC), a third message comprising the list of ACR scenarios selected by the second EES based on the second message.

title: METHODS AND WIRELESS NETWORK FOR INCLUDING VERTICAL APPLICATION LAYER SERVICE AREA IN SEAL SERVER
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a vertical application layer (VAL) server in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises transmitting, to a location management server, a user equipment (UE) information request message including a first VAL service area identity (ID) of a first VAL service area and receiving, from the location management server, UE information as a response to the UE information request message. The UE information includes a list of at least one UE whose location is within an application defined proximity range of the first VAL service area corresponding to the first VAL service area ID, and the application defined proximity range includes a range in which the UE information is required.

title: METHOD FOR MANAGING USER EQUIPMENT REGISTRATION WITH ACCESS AND MOBILITY MANAGEMENT FUNCTION DURING DISASTER CONDITION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A first access and mobility management function (AMF) receives, from a user equipment (UE), a registration request message including information regarding a public land mobile network (PLMN) with a disaster condition, wherein the information regarding the PLMN with the disaster condition indicates a PLMN of the UE which has faced the disaster condition, stores the information regarding the PLMN with the disaster condition included in the registration request message as a part of a UE context, receives, from a second AMF, a UE context transfer request message, and transmits, to the second AMF, a UE context transfer response message in response to the UE context transfer request message, the UE context transfer response message comprising the UE context.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PERFORMING HANDOVER OF GROUP TERMINALS FOR REDUCING NETWORK ENERGY CONSUMPTION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system according to an embodiment disclosed herein may comprise the steps of: receiving an RRC message from a base station, the RRC message including information related to a target cell for a handover, valid condition information about the target cell, and information indicating handover type; receiving information related to turning off a serving cell from the base station; and performing the handover on the basis of configuration information about the target cell and the valid condition information about the target cell.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SIDELINK POSITIONING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. Disclosed is a method performed by a first terminal in wireless communication system supporting SL, including identifying whether an S-PRS sequence ID for generation of an S-PRS is obtained from a higher layer of the first terminal, generating the S-PRS based on the obtained S-PRS sequence ID, in case that the S-PRS sequence ID is obtained from the higher layer of the first terminal, generating the S-PRS sequence ID based on a 12 LSBs of a CRC for a PSCCH associated with the S-PRS, generating the S-PRS based on the generated S-PRS sequence ID, in case that the S-PRS sequence ID is not obtained from the higher layer of the first terminal, and transmitting the generated S-PRS to a second terminal.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR QOE MEASUREMENT OF MULTI-MODAL TRAFFIC IN NEXT-GENERATION MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. More specifically, the present disclosure relates to a method and a device for terminal and base station operations relating to QoE measurement of multi-modal traffic in a next-generation mobile communication system. The method of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: receiving, from a user equipment (UE), a UE capability message including information indicating whether quality of experience (QoE) measurement associated with multi-modal traffic is supported; receiving, from an operations administration and maintenance (OAM), a message including quality of experience (QoE) measurement configuration information associated with multi-modal traffic; transmitting a first radio resource control (RRC) message including the QoE measurement configuration information to the UE; receiving, from the UE, a QoE measurement report including a QoE measurement result obtained on the

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSCEIVING CSI FEEDBACK IN CELLULAR SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Method and apparatuses for channel state information (CSI) feedback in cellular systems. A method for operating a user equipment (UE) to report CSI includes transmitting first information related to a capability of the UE to support machine learning (ML) based CSI reporting and second information related to a selection of a ML model for CSI reporting, receiving third information related to configuring a first ML model for determining the CSI, fourth information related to processing a ML model output, fifth information related to reception of CSI reference signals (CSI-RSs) on a cell, and the CSI-RSs based on the fifth information, and determining, based on the third and fourth information and the reception of the CSI-RSs, a CSI report using the first ML model and transmitting a channel with the CSI report.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE RELATED TO IMPROVEMENT OF USER EQUIPMENT ASSISTANCE INFORMATION IN MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The method of user equipment (UE) of the present disclosure may comprise the steps of: transmitting, to a base station, information about a capability of the UE supporting provision of first UE assistance information (UAI); and receiving, from the base station, configuration information for reporting of the first UAI; and starting, on the basis of the configuration information for the reporting of the first UAI, transmission of a first UAI message for the reporting of the first UAI, to the base station, and starting a first timer related to the reporting of the first UAI.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR JOINT SCHEDULING OF NETWORK RESOURCE AND COMPUTE RESOURCE FOR LIVE VIDEO ANALYTICS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to the present disclosure, in a system for performing, in a server, video analytics for video frames transmitted by multiple terminals, joint scheduling can be efficiently performed for a network resource and a compute resource.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a communication method for merging, with an IoT technology, a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a data transmission rate higher than that of a 4G system, and a system therefor. The disclosure provides methods for saving an energy of a BS. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system includes receiving, from a BS, information for configuring at least one configuration associated with network energy saving, in a first slot, identifying a delay time for applying the network energy saving, and applying the network energy saving at a second slot that is determined based on the first slot and the delay time.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING EXTENDED ACCESS POINT IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. This exemplary method performed by means of an access and mobility management function (AMF) node may comprise the steps of: receiving, from an extended access point (EAP), information related to EAP capabilities; extending, on the basis of the received information related to EAP capabilities, a control plane so that the EAP is included; generating an X2 interface on the basis of the number of base stations related to the AMF node and the EAP; instructing the base station to establish the X2 interface with the EAP on the basis of the generated X2 interface; and instructing the EAP to establish a connection to a terminal.

title: ENHANCING WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EFFICIENCY IN 5G/6G NETWORKS THROUGH AI/ML MODEL MANAGEMENT AND DEPLOYMENT
abstract: This invention presents methods leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI/ML) models to enhance wireless communications efficiency in 5G/6G networks. The processes involve storing, configuring, and transferring AI/ML models within base stations and user equipment devices (UE), allowing for localized decision-making and improved network performance. Features include dynamic model activation/deactivation, model compression/decompression, and encoding/decoding method negotiation. Periodic or condition-driven model updates ensure responsiveness to network changes, while model replacements enable upgrades and iterations. The system facilitates seamless handovers between base stations, with information sharing about model capabilities and UE specifics. Model storage and configuration can also occur in the UE, empowering it for local decision-making in variable or challenging network conditions. The techniques contribute to significant performance, efficiency, and reliabilit

title: COMMUNICATION METHOD AND ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A communication method and an electronic equipment are provided. The method includes receiving configuration information of periodical physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) monitoring, wherein within each cycle of the configuration comprises a first time window and/or a second time window, and according to the configuration information, performing PDCCH monitoring on type 3 common search space (CSS) and UE-specific search space (USS) in the first time window, and/or, skipping PDCCH monitoring on type 3 CSS and USS in the second time window. By the embodiments of the disclosure, the user equipment (UE) periodically performs PDCCH monitoring and/or skips PDCCH monitoring to achieve the objective of power-saving, and it is avoided that UE cannot timely receive scheduling information to thereby cause data transmission delay.

title: METHOD PERFORMED BY TERMINAL AND BASE STATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a base station on a first cell, first downlink control information (DCI) for scheduling multiple physical downlink shared channels (PDSCHs) on first multiple cells and receiving, from the base station, the multiple PDSCHs on the first multiple cells based on the first DCI. at least one CRC of the first DCI is scrambled with at least one of a cell radio network temporary identifier (C-RNTI) or a modulation coding scheme (MCS)-C-RNTI

title: V2V and V2X Communications in 5G and 6G Based on Displayed Matrix
abstract: Disclosed is a “connectivity matrix” that wireless entities (vehicles, fixed assets, etc.) can display indicating the 5G/6G wireless address of the entity. Other wireless devices can then image the connectivity matrix, determine the wireless address, and then communicate in sidelink, on frequencies allocated for ad-hoc networking. Alternatively, the two entities can communicate through a local base station, on managed channels, using the displayed wireless address. The matrix can provide additional information, such as the frequency, bandwidth, and modulation scheme favored by the entity. Alternatively, the matrix can provide a key code maintained by a central authority, so that a second wireless entity can read the code and request the associated wireless address (and frequency, bandwidth, etc.) from the central authority. By either method, the two wireless entities can then communicate explicitly thereafter.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DEVICE POSITIONING IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed is a method performed by a first device in a communication system, including performing measurement of a first reference signal based on configuration information for the first reference signal, when the first device meets a predetermined condition, and reporting a result of the measurement, wherein the predetermined condition is based on at least one of location information, information related to downlink reference signals, and information related to at least one base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SIDELINK POSITIONING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. Disclosed is a method performed by a first terminal in wireless communication system supporting SL, including identifying whether an S-PRS sequence ID for generation of an S-PRS is obtained from a higher layer of the first terminal, generating the S-PRS based on the obtained S-PRS sequence ID, in case that the S-PRS sequence ID is obtained from the higher layer of the first terminal, generating the S-PRS sequence ID based on a 12 LSBs of a CRC for a PSCCH associated with the S-PRS, generating the S-PRS based on the generated S-PRS sequence ID, in case that the S-PRS sequence ID is not obtained from the higher layer of the first terminal, and transmitting the generated S-PRS to a second terminal.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MEASUREMENT REPORTING OF UNCREWED AERIAL VEHICLE TERMINAL IN NON-TERRESTRIAL NETWORK
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Methods and devices are provided in a wireless communication system. Configuration information on a measurement report is received from a base station. The configuration information includes first information on a first number of triggering cells. A first measurement report for at least one first cell fulfilling an entry condition is transmitted to the base station, in case that a second number of the at least one first cell is larger than or equal to the first number of triggering cells. A second measurement report for at least one second cell fulfilling a leaving condition is transmitted to the base station. The at least one second cell is in the first measurement report.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PERFORMING DISCOVERY FOR SIDELINK COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system to support a data transmission rate higher than before. Disclosed is a method performed by a first user equipment (UE), including obtaining configuration information including information on a threshold used for identifying, by the first UE performing a UE-to-UE (U2U) relay operation, whether to perform transmission of a second message based on a first message received by the first UE from a second UE, receiving, from the second UE, a first discovery message including information on the second UE, identifying, based on reference signal received power (RSRP) measured based on communication with the second UE and the threshold, whether to perform transmission of the second message based on the received first discovery message, and performing, based on a result of the identification, transmission of the second message based on the received first discovery message.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SUPPORTING EPS FALLBACK IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving from a base station first configuration information including information on frequencies for early measurement reporting (EMR), receiving from the base station second configuration information including information on frequencies for cell reselection, transmitting to the base station a message including a measurement result of at least some of the frequencies for EMR and the frequencies for cell reselection, and performing EPS fallback to one frequency based on the measurement result. In case that the second configuration information comprises a field indicating fallback or the UE has switched to a connected mode to start an IP multimedia subsystem (IMS) voice service, the message comprises a measurement result of at least some of the frequencies for cell reselection.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF PERFORMING QOE MEASUREMENTS FOR MBS BROADCAST SERVICES IN THE NEXT MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth-generation (5G) or a sixth-generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data rates, especially, for performing quality of experience (QoE) measurement and reporting for multimedia broadcast service (MBS) services are provided. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a base station, a message including information to configure an application layer measurement while the terminal is in a radio resource control (RRC) connected state, the information including a configuration of QoE measurements for multimedia broadcast service (MBS) broadcast, identifying whether the information further includes an indicator for identifying at least one RRC state for which the configuration is applied, and in case that the information further includes the indicator, performing the QoE measurements using the configuration, based on the indicator.

title: FRAME STRUCTURE SUITABLE FOR TERAHERTZ-BAND-BASED COMMUNICATION ENVIRONMENT
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a data transmission rate higher than that of a 4G communication system, such as LTE. According to one embodiment of the present disclosure, a base station of a communication system confirms a subcarrier spacing in which a signal is to be transmitted to or received from a terminal, transmits, to the terminal, a signal including information that indicates the allocation of additional symbols and/or the number of additional symbols, generates data allocation information for data on the basis of the allocation of the additional symbols, and transmits the data allocation information and the data to the terminal, wherein the additional symbols can be allocated to the predetermined part of a first slot at every 0.5 ms of boundary.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR UE POWER SAVING IN INITIAL DOWNLINK BANDWIDTH PORTION DEPENDENT TO REDCAP DEVICES
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatus for operating in different bandwidth portions (BWPs). A method includes receiving a first synchronization signal and a physical broadcast channel (SS/PBCH) block in a first BWP; determining a first control resource set (CORESET) in the first BWP based on the information provided by the first SS/PBCH block; and receiving a first physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) in the first CORESET. The PDCCH provides a first downlink control information (DCI) format that schedules reception of a first physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH) that provides a system information block (SIB1). The method further includes receiving the first PDSCH, determining a second BWP based on the information provided by the SIB1, and receiving a second SS/PBCH block in the second BWP. The second BWP does not include the bandwidth of the first SS/PBCH block. The second BWP doe

title: Method and apparatus for measuring and reporting interference signal in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. There is provided a method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving a radio resource control (RRC) message including configuration information related to cross-link interference (CLI) from a base station (BS); determining a measured CLI magnitude based on configuration information and at least one measurement resource received from the BS; and transmitting a Media Access Control (MAC) Control Element (CE) including the measured CLI magnitude to the BS via a Physical Uplink Shared Channel (PUSCH).

title: Air-ground integrated network architecture based on SDN and AI technologies and implementation method
abstract: The invention relates to an air-ground integrated network architecture based on SDN and AI technologies and an implementation method. The architecture comprises an equipment layer, an intelligent control layer and an application layer, the equipment layer comprises all programmable network equipment and elements from the high-altitude platform layer, the low-altitude platform layer and the ground layer; the data detection layer is used for detecting and collecting network data and reporting the network data to the intelligent control layer, and extracting and virtualizing ground-air communication, calculation and cache resources; the intelligent control layer comprises a plurality of SDN (Software Defined Network) controllers embedded with artificial intelligence, communicates with the equipment layer through a southbound interface and communicates with the application layer through a northbound interface; and the application layer is used for providing services specific to application

title: Method and apparatus for uplink channel transmission in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal of a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: receiving, from a base station, a message including first information on a time domain window (TDW) length and second information indicating whether to activate a repeated physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) transmission, the number of repeated physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) transmissions is counted based on available slots of the PUSCH transmissions; determining at least one TDW based on the first information and the second information; and transmitting the PUSCH to the base station based on the determined at least one TDW while maintaining power coherence and phase continuity.

title: Apparatus and method for removing E2 interface related information in wireless access network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In accordance with an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a near real-time (RT) Radio Access Network (RAN) Intelligent Controller (RIC) may include receiving an E2 Removal Request message from an E2 node over an E2 interface indicating termination of the E2 node, where termination of the E2 node is configured from Service Management and Orchestration (SMO); sending an E2 removal response message to the E2 node through the E2 interface; and performing a removal of the configuration of the E2 node in the near RT RIC in response to the E2 removal request message.

title: Method and apparatus for determining validity of system information in private network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the present disclosure provides a method by which a user equipment (UE) supporting a non-public network (NPN) determines the validity of a system information block (SIB) and obtains or re-obtains the SIB.

title: Measurement reporting method and device for unmanned aerial vehicle terminal in non-ground network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond 4G communication systems such as Long Term Evolution (LTE). A method and apparatus in a wireless communication system are provided. Configuration information about a measurement report is received from a base station. The configuration information includes first information about a first number of triggered cells. And sending a first measurement report for the at least one first cell to the base station when the second number of the at least one first cell satisfying the entry condition is greater than or equal to the first number of the trigger cells. And transmitting a second measurement report for the at least one second cell satisfying the leaving condition to the base station. The at least one second cell is in the first measurement report.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a communication technique for fusing a 5g or 6g communication system with iot technology to support a higher data transmission rate after a 4g system, and a system thereof. The present disclosure can be applied to intelligent services (for example, smart home, smart building, smart city, smart car or connected car, health care, digital education, retail business, security and safety related services, etc.) based on 5g communication technology and iot related technology. The present disclosure discloses a method for saving energy of a base station.

title: Communication method, device and system
abstract: Provided are a communication method, device and system, which can improve the data transmission rate of a terminal device using a DFT-S-OFDM waveform when a single CC is used in an uplink in a CA scene, and can be applied to the fields of a 5G system and a future communication system, such as a 6G system. The method comprises the following steps: sending first indication information to terminal equipment when a first condition is met, and receiving data from the terminal equipment by adopting a DFT-S-OFDM waveform and a first modulation mode. Wherein the first condition comprises that in a carrier aggregation (CA) scene, the number of component carriers used for uplink data transmission of the terminal equipment is one. The CA scene comprises uplink configuration as CA and/or downlink configuration as CA, the first indication information is used for indicating to use a DFT-S-OFDM waveform and a first modulation mode to perform uplink transmission, and the first modulation mode comprise

title: System and method for determining availability status of entities in PIN
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a high data transmission rate. Methods (300) and systems for determining an availability state of a first entity associated with an individual Internet of Things (IoT) network (PIN) (210) are described. A method (300) may include determining (302), by a second entity associated with a PIN (210), whether a periodic update request is received from a first entity before a periodic update (PU) timer value expires. The method (300) may also include determining (304), by the second entity, an availability state of the first entity based on the determination of whether the periodic update request is received from the first entity.

title: 6G-oriented microwave device capable of simultaneously realizing reconfigurable band-pass filtering and logic NOT gate
abstract: According to the 6G-oriented microwave device capable of achieving reconfigurable band-pass filtering and logic NOT gate at the same time, a plurality of metal through holes are formed in the upper side and the lower side of an SIW waveguide area formed between a feed input area and a feed output area of a top-layer design structure, and an SIW-SSPPS transmission period array comprises a plurality of SSPPs active unit units arranged periodically. Each SSPPs active unit unit comprises a cross-shaped sawtooth waveguide arranged between the metal through holes in the upper row and the lower row and an H-shaped opening resonance ring embedded in the cross-shaped sawtooth waveguide, the adjacent SSPPs active unit units are connected, and variable capacitance diodes are loaded at the connection positions; reconstruction of the passband working range and the overall bandwidth can be achieved through two different adjusting modes, and the function of a logic NOT gate system is achieved by intr

title: Method and apparatus for performing random access based on full duplex system in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In the present disclosure, an apparatus and method for a random access procedure for full duplex operation are provided. A method for a user equipment includes receiving first information for a first parameter of a first random access channel (RACH) configuration associated with a first subset of slots from a set of slots on a cell, and second information for a second parameter of a second RACH configuration associated with a second subset of slots from the set of slots on the cell. The method further includes determining a physical random access channel (PRACH) configuration for a physical random access channel (PRACH) transmission in a slot on the cell among the first RACH configuration and the second RACH configuration based on whether the slot is from the first subset of slots or from the second subset of slots, and transmitting the PRACH in the slot on the cell based o

title: 6G low-orbit satellite wireless coding secure transmission method, storage medium and equipment
assignee: CHINA TELECOM DIGITAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGY CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses a 6G low-orbit satellite wireless code secure transmission method, a storage medium and equipment, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the prediction of a receiving signal of a wireless code transmitted by a 6G low-orbit satellite in real time through an MIMO signal detection algorithm, and taking a communication channel corresponding to the optimal prediction receiving signal as a transmission channel of the wireless code; predicting reliability differentiation probability values of bits contained in the wireless codes to be transmitted through a historical data analysis method; iQ mapping of the wireless codes is carried out according to the reliability differentiation probability values of bits contained in the wireless codes, the wireless codes after IQ mapping are encrypted at the transmitting end of the transmission channel through the quantum block chain technology, transmission is carried out in the transmission channel, and the encrypted wi

title: eUICC METHOD AND APPARATUS OF EUICC ENCRPTION KEY MANAGEMENT FOR PROVISIONING PROFILE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a method for provisioning a large number of profiles to terminals in a factory environment of a terminal manufacturer. Disclosed is the method comprising the steps of: acquiring key information and index information for profile installation; transmitting a profile request for factory injection including an index ID to a profile server; receiving bound profile package (BPP) and profile installation key information including index information from the profile server; transmitting the received BPP and profile installation key information to a terminal; and decoding the BPP by selecting an encryption key to be used with reference to the index ID in an eUICC of the terminal.

title: SPS CG Method and Apparatus for transmission and reception of SPS and CG for Network energy saving
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. The present disclosure provides a method of operating a terminal, including the steps of: transmitting capability information related to network energy saving to a base station; receiving configuration information related to semi-persistent scheduling (SPS) or configured grant (CG) resources from the base station based on the capability information related to network energy saving; and determining whether to monitor an activation instruction of the SPS resource or the CG resource corresponding to the BWP according to a BWP alteration instruction.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MEASUREMENT REPORTING OF UNCREWED AERIAL VEHICLE TERMINAL IN NON-TERRESTRIAL NETWORK
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Methods and devices are provided in a wireless communication system. Configuration information on a measurement report is received from a base station. The configuration information includes first information on a first number of triggering cells. A first measurement report for at least one first cell fulfilling an entry condition is transmitted to the base station, in case that a second number of the at least one first cell is larger than or equal to the first number of triggering cells. A second measurement report for at least one second cell fulfilling a leaving condition is transmitted to the base station. The at least one second cell is in the first measurement report.

title: METHOD FOR PREPARING LITHIUM IRON PHOSPHATE POSITIVE ELECTRODE MATERIAL, POSITIVE ELECTRODE POLE PIECE AND LITHIUM ION BATTERY
abstract: Disclosed are a method for preparing a lithium iron phosphate positive electrode material, a positive electrode plate and a lithium ion battery. The method includes: sequentially grinding, spray-drying and sintering a first mixture slurry containing iron phosphate, a lithium source, a carbon source and a solvent to obtain a spherical first lithium iron phosphate material; sequentially grinding, spray-drying, sintering and crushing a second mixture slurry containing iron phosphate, a lithium source, a carbon source and a solvent to obtain a second lithium iron phosphate material with an irregular morphology; and mixing the first and second lithium iron phosphate materials in equal mass ratio to obtain a lithium iron phosphate positive electrode material, the fitted value of the maximum compaction density of which is C, where C=0.0847t<sub>1</sub>+0.0196T<sub>1</sub>-0.0095t<sub>2</sub>+0.0261T<sub>2</sub>-33.6716. T<sub>1</sub>

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PROCESSING PDU SESSION ASSOCIATED WITH MBS SESSION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for processing a multicast-broadcast service (MBS) session of a session management function (SMF) in a wireless communication system, according to one embodiment of the present disclosure, comprises the steps of: receiving, from an access and mobility management function (AMF), a first message requesting the update of a packet data unit (PDU) session related to the MBS session, if a terminal decides to leave the MBS session; and transmitting, to the AMF, a second message, which is a response to the update of the PDU session, in response to the first message.

title: APPATUS AND METHOD OF LOCATION ESTIMATION USING GROUP CAST IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a terminal comprises the steps of: establishing a group for group cast communication with at least one external device; receiving a report on a slidelink positioning reference signal (SL-PRS) from the at least one external device included in the group; and determining a location of the at least one external device based on the received SL-PRS.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR QOE QUALITY OF EXPERIENCE MEASUREMENT IN MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data rate. A method of a terminal of the present disclosure may include the steps of: transmitting information on whether the terminal supports rvqoe measurement to a base station; receiving configuration information for rvqoe measurement from the base station; and transmitting a report on rvqoe measurement to the base station.

title: HANDLING DISASTER ROAMING SERVICE IN WIRELESS NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide methods for handling disaster roaming service in network by UE. The method includes determining whether the UE receives a NAS message without integrity protection from a combination of first PLMN and second PLMN upon sending a registration request message to combination of first PLMN and second PLMN after expiry of a timer. In an embodiment, the method includes determining a count of attempt to combination of first PLMN and second PLMN meets a predefined threshold and determining that first PLMN is genuine network in which UE is not allowed to get disaster roaming service and blocking to retry on combination of first PLMN and second PLMN in response to receiving NAS message without integrity protection from combination of first PLMN and second PLMN upon sending a registration request message to the combination of first PLMN and second PLMN after expiry of

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING CHANNEL VARIATION FEEDBACK REPORT BASED ON TRACKING REFERENCE SIGNALS (TRS)
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a method for handling channel variation feedback report based on Tracking Reference Signals (TRS) in a wireless network. The method includes receiving the tracking reference signals (TRS) from a network apparatus (202) in the wireless network, generating a channel variation feedback report based on the TRS, and sending the channel variation feedback report to the network apparatus (202).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SELF-OPTIMIZATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments disclosed herein relate to methods (300 to 1300) and systems (100) for performing self-optimization in wireless networks. The method (300 to 1300) includes performing Self-Organizing Networks (SON)/ Minimization of Drive Test (MDT) optimizations. The method (700, 800) includes inter-Radio Access Technology (inter-RAT) overwrite protection of signaling based MDT configured in Evolved Universal Terrestrial Radio Access (E-UTRA) by management based MDT configured in New Radio (NR). The method (300, 400) includes optimization of voice fallback from NR to Long-Term Evolution (LTE) through handover. The method (900, 1000) includes handling Random Access Channel (RACH) report in NR, including the RACH report with Network Slice AS Group (NSAG) support. The method (500, 600) includes handling Successful Handover Report (SHR) in NR. The method (1100, 1200, 1300) includes self-opt

title: METHOD FOR OPTIMIZING POWER CONSUMPTION IN A USER EQUIPMENT
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for optimizing power in a user equipment (UE) is provided. The method includes receiving, from a network, one or more relaxed measurement parameters, determining one of a mobility state or a location of the UE with respect to an edge of a serving cell of a visited public land mobile network (VPLMN) of the network based on one or more relaxed measurement parameters, and deferring a background PLMN (BPLMN) search upon determining one of the UE being in a low mobility state or not being at the edge of the serving cell, and/or deferring a near cell measurement search during a measurement gap of a connected mode discontinuous reception (CDRX) sleep duration of a CDRX state to optimize the power consumption in the UE upon determining one of the UE being in the low mobility state or not being located at the edge of the serving cell.

title: METHODS FOR HANDLING CIOT DATA FOR INVALID PDU SESSION ID
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed is a method of operating a user equipment (UE) operable to communicate with a telecommunication network, comprising the steps of: the UE sending to the telecommunication network a control plane service request (CPSR) message with cellular Internet of Things (CIoT) user data, associated with a protocol data unit (PDU) session; the UE receiving from the telecommunication network a SERVICE ACCEPT message, indicating that the PDU session is inactive in the network; and the UE verifying if the PDU session has an identity the same as an identity of the PDU session included in the CPSR message with CIoT user data and, if so then the UE determines that the CIoT user data was not successfully sent to the telecommunication network or to a final recipient.

title: METHOD PERFORMED BY TERMINAL AND BASE STATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a base station on a first cell, first downlink control information (DCI) for scheduling multiple physical downlink shared channels (PDSCHs) on first multiple cells and receiving, from the base station, the multiple PDSCHs on the first multiple cells based on the first DCI. at least one CRC of the first DCI is scrambled with at least one of a cell radio network temporary identifier (C-RNTI) or a modulation coding scheme (MCS)-C-RNTI.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR RECEIVING AND TRANSMITTING INFORMATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure provides a method and device for receiving and transmitting information and/or signals, which can improve the performance of cell switch by improving the measurement, reporting and indication of reference signals.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DEVICE POSITIONING IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed is a method performed by a first device in a communication system, including performing measurement of a first reference signal based on configuration information for the first reference signal, when the first device meets a predetermined condition, and reporting a result of the measurement, wherein the predetermined condition is based on at least one of location information, information related to downlink reference signals, and information related to at least one base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ESTIMATING CHANNEL STATE INFORMATION IN ADVANCED MIMO ANTENNA SYSTEMS FOR CELLULAR COMMUNICATIONS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Methods and apparatuses for estimating channel state information in advanced multi input multi output (MIMO) antenna systems for cellular communications. A method of operating a base station (BS) includes: generating first configuration information including a set of sounding reference signal (SRS) resources each of which is associated with an sounding reference signal (SRS)-path loss reference signal; transmitting, to a user equipment (UE), the first configuration information; receiving an SRS based on the first configuration information; selecting, based on the SRS and the first configuration information, a subset of the set of SRS resources; and generating second configuration information including the subset of the set of SRS resources.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SELECTING ANTENNA MODE FOR FULL DUPLEX COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. Specifically, the present disclosure relates to a method and device for selecting an antenna mode for full duplex communication between a base station and a terminal capable of performing an operation according to the antenna mode of the base station.

title: METHOD PERFORMED BY TERMINAL AND BASE STATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises receiving, from a base station, first information on a location of a first sub-band in a bandwidth part (BWP), receiving, from the base station, second information on at least one resource for a data channel in the first sub-band and identifying a location of the at least one resource for the data channel based on the first information and the second information.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INFORMATION TRANSMISSION AND RECEPTION IN SATELLITE COMMUNICATIONS SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a base station, configuration information on a set of one or more numbers for a PUCCH repetition; receiving, from the base station, DCI scheduling a PDSCH; receiving, from the base station, the PDSCH based on the DCI; determining a plurality of slots for the PUCCH repetition based on the configuration information in case that the set of one or more numbers comprises a single value or based on the configuration information and the DCI in case that the set of one or more numbers comprises more than one value; and transmitting, to the base station, a PUCCH including HARQ-ACK information for the PDSCH over the determined plurality of slots.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ACCESS MANAGEMENT IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An operation method of a UE in a mobile communication system, according to the present disclosure, may comprise the steps of: receiving, from a base station via a system information block (SIB), information regarding an access category including an operator defined access category; and on the basis of the information regarding the access category, determining whether or not access is barred for each protocol data unit (PDU) session from among a plurality of PDU sessions including a PDU session corresponding to the operator defined access category.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONTROL AND DATA CHANNELS IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for transmission configuration indication (TCI) state indication and association for control and data channels. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving first information for first and second groups of configured TCI states; receiving, in a downlink control information (DCI), a first indicated TCI state of a TCI codepoint; and receiving second information for a first control resource set (CORESET). The method further includes identifying, based on the first information, whether the first indicated TCI state is associated with the first or second group of configured TCI states; identifying, based on the second information, whether the first CORESET is associated with the first or second group of configured TCI states; and based on identifying that the first indicated TCI state and the first CORESET are associated with the same group of c

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SUPPORTING SYNCHRONIZATION OF UPLINK SIGNAL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. A method performed by a UE in a wireless communication system, according to various embodiments of the present disclosure, may comprise the steps of: receiving an RRC message including configuration information regarding at least one target cell from a serving cell of a base station; on the basis of the RRC message, identifying one or more candidate target cells for which a pre-random access channel (RACH) has been configured; performing uplink synchronization for the one or more candidate target cells; measuring channel states for the one or more candidate target cells; and on the basis of the measured channel states, receiving a handover indication from the serving cell of the base station.

title: POSITION MEASURING METHOD AND DEVICE USING GROUP CAST IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. This method performed by means of a first terminal in a wireless communication system may comprise the steps of: transmitting, by groupcast or broadcast, to a plurality of second terminals included in a group for sidelink positioning (SL-P), SL-P configuration information including at least one from among capability information about the first terminal, assistance information about the SL-P, and position request information; transmitting, to the plurality of second terminals, a positioning reference signal (SL-PRS) on the basis of the SL-P configuration information; and receiving, from the plurality of second terminals, measurement reports for the SL-PRS.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR TRANSMITTING AND RECEIVING SPS AND CG FOR NETWORK ENERGY SAVING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure provides an operation method of a terminal, comprising the steps of: receiving, from a base station, information about a first bandwidth part (BWP) and a second BWP, and configuration information about periodic resources configured for each of the first BWP and the second BWP; receiving, from the base station, first downlink control information for activating a first periodic resource set in the first BWP, which is an active BWP; performing data transmission and reception on the basis of the activated first periodic resource; receiving, from the base station, active BWP change information activating the second BWP; and suspending use of the activated first periodic resource set in the first BWP, wherein the suspended use of the first periodic resource is resumed without receiving the first downlink control information when the first BWP is activated.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR L4S CONGESTION MARKING, REPORTING, AND LOCAL FEEDBACK IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a 5G or pre-5G communication system to be provided to support a higher data transmission rate beyond a 4G communication system such as LTE.

title: EUICC ENCRYPTION KEY MANAGEMENT METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PROFILE PROVISIONING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to 5G or 6G communication systems for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure discloses a method for provisioning a large number of profiles to terminals in a terminal manufacturing factory environment, wherein the method obtains key information and index information for profile installation, transmits a request for a profile for factory injection, including an index ID, to a profile server, receives a bound profile package (BPP) and profile installation key information including index information from the profile server, transmits the received BPP and profile installation key information to a terminal, and selects an encryption key with reference to the index ID in the eUICC of the terminal to decrypt the BPP.

title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR AI/ML TRAFFIC DETECTION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. There is disclosed a first network entity included in a communication network, the first network entity comprising: a transmitter; a receiver; and a controller configured to: monitor traffic from a second network entity included in the communications network; and based on the traffic being associated with a type of an artificial intelligence / machine learning (AI/ML) operation, perform one or more operations to assist performance of the AI/ML operation.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PERFORMING DISCOVERY FOR SIDELINK COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system to support a data transmission rate higher than before. Disclosed is a method performed by a first user equipment (UE), including obtaining configuration information including information on a threshold used for identifying, by the first UE performing a UE-to-UE (U2U) relay operation, whether to perform transmission of a second message based on a first message received by the first UE from a second UE, receiving, from the second UE, a first discovery message including information on the second UE, identifying, based on reference signal received power (RSRP) measured based on communication with the second UE and the threshold, whether to perform transmission of the second message based on the received first discovery message, and performing, based on a result of the identification, transmission of the second message based on the received first discovery message.

title: METHODS AND DEVICE FOR PROCESSING A SIGNAL FOR POSITIONING IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. This application relates to a method and device for updating and configuring a signal for positioning in a wireless communication system. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) is proposed, which includes receiving a plurality of pieces of configuration information for a reference signal (RS) for positioning transmitted by the base station; receiving a signaling for activating one of the plurality of pieces of configuration information transmitted by the base station; transmitting the RS for positioning based on the activated configuration information.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MULTI-MODALITY SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An operating method of an AMF in a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the disclosure includes receiving, from a UE, a protocol data unit (PDU) session establishment request message including single-network slice selection assistance information (S-NSSAI) and data network name (DNN), selecting a session management function (SMF) in consideration of location information of a UE when the S-NSSAI and the DNN are for supporting an extended reality (XR) service or a multi-modality service, and establishing the selected SMF and a PDU session.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR SUPPORTING A SYNCHRONIZATION OF UPLINK SIGNAL IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system may comprise: a step of receiving an RRC message including configuration information on at least one target cell from a serving cell of a base station; a step of identifying one or more candidate target cells in which a random access channel (Pre-RACH) is configured based on the RRC message; a step of performing uplink synchronization on the one or more candidate target cells; a step of measuring a channel state of the one or more candidate target cells; and a step of receiving a handover instruction from the serving cell of the base station based on the measured channel state.

title: A METHOD AND AN APPARATUS FOR CONFIGUING TRANSMISSION RATE AND USAGE OF TETHERING DATA FOR MOBILE TERMINAL OF SHARED MODE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data rate. The present invention discloses a method and an apparatus for setting a tethering data transmission rate and usage amount for a shared mode mobile terminal in a cellular wireless communication system (5g system).

title: L4S METHOD AND APPARATUS OF L4S CONGESTION MARKING REPORTING AND LOCAL FEEDBACK IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data rate. The present disclosure relates to a 5g or pre-5g communication system to be provided to support a higher data transmission rate after a 4g communication system such as lte.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ANTENNA MODE SELECTION FOR FULL DUPLEX IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data rate. Specifically, the present disclosure relates to a terminal capable of performing an operation according to an antenna mode of a base station, and a method and an apparatus for selecting an antenna mode for full-duplex communication of the base station.

title: . Method and apparatus for adjusting scheduling in a wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data rate. An application function (af) entity in a wireless communication system comprises: a transceiver; and at least one processor. the at least one processor may be configured to transmit traffic schedule information, receive information on a first period and a first burst arrival time (bat), and adjust scheduling of an application based on the first period and the first bat.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MULTI-MODALITY SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating an AMF of a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: receiving a protocol data unit (PDU) session establish request message including single network slice selection assistance information (S-NSSAI) and data network name (DNN) from a terminal; selecting a session management function (SMF) in consideration of location information of the terminal when the S-NSSAI and the DNN are to support an extended reality (XR) service or a multi-modality service; and establishing the selected SMF and PDU session.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROCESSING A SIGNAL IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate after a 4g communication system such as lte. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a network control repeater (ncr) transmits ncr beam information to a base station, receives scheduling information including information on a base station beam mapped to nct beam information and time-frequency resources allocated to a reference signal mapped to the nct beam information from the base station, and transmits the reference signal to a terminal based on the scheduling information.

title: Improvements in and relating to control plane data transmission
abstract: The present disclosure relates to 5th-Generation (5G) and/or 6th-Generation (6G) communication systems for supporting higher data transmission rates. Embodiments herein provide a method of controlling a user equipment (UE) to transmit data over a control plane (CP), including prohibiting the UE from transmitting data over the CP when a 5G session management (5GSM) timer is running.

title: 5G/6G wireless resource intelligent allocation method based on deep reinforcement learning
assignee: SUN KAISENS BEIJING TECH CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses a 5G/6G wireless resource intelligent allocation method based on deep reinforcement learning, and belongs to the technical field of communication. Comprising the following steps: step 1, designing a layer connection depth Q network; step 2, constructing a CS training data set; step three, initial data in the training data set in the step two are adopted to train the layer connection depth Q network in the step one, and a trained CDQ-Net model is obtained; step 4, generating a current communication state matrix according to the communication link, the available channel and the power of the wireless network; and step 5, inputting the current communication state matrix into the trained CDQ-Net model, and outputting a corresponding maximum Q value by the CDQ-Net model so as to obtain a current resource allocation strategy. According to the method, the deep reinforcement learning technology is applied to 5G/6G wireless resource allocation, better power and channel al

title: Method and apparatus for performing random access based on full duplex system in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a high data transmission rate. In the present disclosure, a method and an apparatus for random access (RA) in a full duplex (FD) wireless communication system are provided. A method for transmitting a random access channel (RACH) associated with an RA procedure includes receiving first information for a first parameter of a first RACH configuration associated with a first subset of slots from a set of slots on a cell, second information for a second parameter of a second RACH configuration associated with a second subset of slots from the set of slots on the cell, and third information for a condition. The method further includes determining whether a condition is valid for transmissions in slots from a second subset of the slots, and transmitting the RACH in the slots based on the first RACH configuration when the condition is valid, and transmitting the RACH in the slots based on the second RACH configur

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROVIDING EVENTS IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes transmitting information indicating support of push services to a subscription manager discovery service (SM-DS), receiving a list of push services supported by the SM-DS from the SM-DS, selecting at least one push service based on the list of push services supported by the SM-DS, generating an embedded universal integrated circuit card (eUICC) signature based on an indicator indicating the at least one selected push service and the push token, and transmitting the indicator, the push token, and the eUICC signature to the SM-DS.

title: Silicon controlled rectifier for 6G communication
abstract: The invention relates to a silicon controlled rectifier for 6G communication, which is characterized in that the silicon controlled rectifier comprises a first end cover and a second end cover, a silicon controlled component is arranged between the first end cover and the second end cover, heat dissipation plates are formed on the silicon controlled component, and the heat dissipation plates are uniformly distributed on the silicon controlled component; the silicon controlled rectifier assembly comprises silicon controlled rectifiers and a cavity arranged between the silicon controlled rectifiers, cooling liquid is arranged in the cavity, and the silicon controlled rectifiers are fixedly connected with the end face of the cavity. Heat dissipation is achieved by arranging the heat dissipation plate, meanwhile, the three cavities are formed between the silicon controlled rectifiers and used for containing cooling liquid, and the cooling liquid can be replaced through the liquid inlet and

title: Apparatus and method for supporting local service access in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating a terminal according to the present disclosure comprises the steps of: transmitting, to a first base station of a first network, a registration request message including an indicator indicating that the terminal has a local access to a second network; receiving a policy update request message from the first base station, the policy update request message including a cell identifier or a region identifier associated with the second network; updating a policy for the second network based on the policy update request message; and a second base station connected to the second network over the local access based on the updated policy.
