The present disclosure relates to a method and device for efficiently mapping an uplink sequence for full duplex communication in a wireless communication system. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, the method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system supporting full duplex communication includes the steps of: receiving setup information for timing advance (TA) operation from a base station; adjusting the uplink transmission timing based on the setup information to transmit the uplink by resource group; and mapping the uplink sequence by excluding symbols or slots of SBFD uplink subband (SBFD UL subband) where resource overlap occurs with other groups.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR OPERATING WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM BASED ON BANDWIDTH
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. in addition, the present disclosure provides a method for improving operation and performance of a base station and a terminal when the base station operates in a bandwidth smaller than 5 mhz. according to the present disclosure, the system can be operated even in a limited bandwidth that has not been introduced before, and control signal reception performance can be improved.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PERFORMING SELF INTERFERENCE CANCELLATION
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates than a 4G communication system such as LTE. The present disclosure discloses a method for a base station to perform self-interference removal. The method of the present disclosure may include the steps of: obtaining adjacent resource block related information for estimating a self-interference coefficient; generating information on a reference signal pattern per RB based on the adjacent RB related information; transmitting the information on the reference signal pattern per RB to a terminal; generating a downlink (DL) reference signal based on the information on the reference signal pattern per RB and transmitting the DL reference signal to the terminal; receiving an SI signal associated with the DL reference signal; estimating the SI coefficient based on the DL reference signal and the SI signal associated with the DL reference signal; and removing the SI signal from a recei

title: NSSAI ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND METHOD FOR REQUESTING NSSAI IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION NETWORK
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system according to one embodiment of the present disclosure may comprise: an operation of executing an application in the terminal; an operation of identifying a URSP rule mapped to the application based on setting information for the application; an operation of identifying an S-NSSAI mapped to the application based on the URSP rule mapped to the application; and an operation of transmitting a message requesting registration of the S-NSSAI mapped to the application to the core network through a base station. The S-NSSAI may correspond to an NSSAI among the NSSAIs set in the terminal whose registration is not permitted from the core network.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SWITCHING DUPLEX MODE DURING RANDOM ACCESS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method and apparatus for switching duplex mode during random access (RA). A method of operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving a system information block (SIB) for a cell, the SIB providing information of a first slot configuration for transmission or reception in a half-duplex mode and a random access (RA) procedure; determining UE capabilities for transmitting and receiving in a full duplex mode; and determining a transmission of the channel based on the RA procedure and the first slot configuration. The method further includes transmitting a channel including information of UE capabilities using an RA procedure; and receiving information of a second slot configuration for transmission or reception in the full duplex mode.

title: Method, device and system for user plane security in communication system
abstract: Disclosed is a 6G communication system for implementing a high data transmission rate and an ultra-low delay time after 4G and 5G communication systems. In accordance with various embodiments of the present disclosure, there is provided a method of selectively performing integrity protection or encryption on data (e.g., UP data, user data, or application data), an apparatus for performing the method, and a system for implementing the embodiments. According to an embodiment, a UP security process based on whether data is encrypted is provided. In accordance with an embodiment, a packet structure is provided for improving computational efficiency when providing confidentiality and integrity for data. Accordingly, by preventing the encrypted data from being overencrypted, an effect of reducing computing resources and computing time spent for enhancing data security can be obtained, so that a more efficient communication system can be implemented.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING DEACTIVATION OF SIDELINK BWP IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. There is provided a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system, the method including changing an active uplink (UL) bandwidth portion (BWP) in a carrier of a cell from a first UL BWP to a second UL BWP, deactivating a sidelink (SL) BWP in a case where a subcarrier spacing of the second UL BWP is different from a subcarrier spacing of the SL BWP in the carrier, and transmitting the deactivated SL BWP to the terminal. And cancelling the triggered sidelink scheduling request process.

title: Method and system for handling functional aliases in conference event packets
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a method for processing, by a server, a functional alias in a conference event packet in a wireless network. The method includes detecting a group call associated with a group in a wireless network. Further, the method includes providing a SIP NOTIFY message, the SIP NOTIFY message including an ID of each of the plurality of members of the group and an IE indicating a functional alias bound by each of the plurality of members of the group. Further, the method includes transmitting the SIP NOTIFY message to a client device corresponding to each of the plurality of members of the group.

title: Joint index modulation detection method oriented to OTFS in 6G high mobility and satellite network
abstract: The invention discloses an OTFS joint index modulation detection method oriented to a 6G high mobility and satellite network, and the method comprises the steps: generating an index table at a transmitting end; gray code mapping is carried out on an information bit p2, a symbol to be sent is generated according to a QAM constellation symbol set, then the symbol to be sent is mapped to a corresponding time delay-Doppler resource position according to an index table, inverse symplectic Fourier transform and Hisenberg transform are carried out on a time delay-Doppler domain data frame completing index mapping, the time delay-Doppler domain data frame is transformed to a time domain, and the time domain data frame is sent to the QAM constellation symbol set. And finally, adding a cyclic prefix, and sending out through a channel. And at a receiving end, removing a cyclic prefix from the received time domain signal, then carrying out Sextile Fourier transform and Wigner transform, and transf

title: High-speed rail mobile communication 6G full-decoupling network uplink transmission method and system based on geographic position
abstract: The invention discloses a high-speed rail mobile communication 6G full-decoupling network uplink transmission method and system based on a geographic position, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the pure line-of-sight channel mapping according to the geographic position of a train and each uplink base station, and carrying out the two-stage combined joint receiving processing of an uplink signal through taking the pure line-of-sight channel mapping as channel estimation; designing a deep learning neural network, taking the mapped pure line-of-sight channel as input, and outputting multi-user joint precoding meeting constraint conditions; performing offline network training by using the historical channel data of each position; in the actual deployment stage, a pure line-of-sight channel corresponding to the train position is input, and the network outputs the joint precoding at the corresponding position, so that non-feedback transmission is realized. Compared with a trad

title: 6G communication anti-interference multichannel independent leaky-wave antenna and 6G communication method
assignee: NO 15 INSTITUTE OF CHINA ELECTRONICS TECH GROUP CORPORATION
abstract: The invention discloses a 6G communication anti-interference multichannel independent leaky-wave antenna and a 6G communication method. The 6G communication anti-interference multichannel independent leaky-wave antenna comprises transmission teeth and transmission channels, the transmission teeth are used for frequency tuning and polarization resolution; the transmission channel is used for separating different 6G signals and transmitting the separated 6G signals; the transmission teeth comprise a plurality of groups of transmission teeth, a plurality of transmission teeth are arranged in each group of transmission teeth, and the sizes and the distances of the transmission teeth in different groups are different; the transmission teeth are made of metal, and a crystal film is prepared on the surface of one side, opposite to the transmission channel, of each transmission tooth and used for transmission adjustment of 6G signals. The invention can realize the functions of independent tran

title: Wireless communication method, communication device and storage medium
abstract: The invention provides a wireless communication method, a communication device and a storage medium, relates to the field of communication, and is used for providing more spectrum resources for a 6G communication system and guaranteeing deployment and development of the 6G communication system. The method is applied to a first node, and comprises: determining a first transmission resource of a first communication system, the first transmission resource and a second transmission resource of a second communication system sharing a shared spectrum; and communicating with a second node in the first communication system based on the first transmission resource.

title: Communication method, device and system
abstract: Provided are a communication method, device and system, which can solve the problem of inaccurate obtained time domain channel characteristics, thereby improving the accuracy of CSI prediction, and can be applied to 5G, 6G and future communication systems. The method comprises: a terminal device measures a first signal to generate first information, and the terminal device sends the first information to a network device. Wherein the first information comprises time domain channel characteristic information and confidence coefficient information, and the confidence coefficient information is used for indicating the accuracy of the time domain channel characteristic information.

title: Wireless service deep learning identification method and device
abstract: The invention provides a 6G wireless service identification method based on deep learning, and the method comprises the following steps: carrying out the standardized processing of truncation, zero padding and the like on traffic data, and processing the traffic data into a gray-scale map with a unified specification by taking bytes as units, and then taking the gray-scale map as the input of a service identification network. According to the 6G wireless service identification capsule network based on the attention mechanism, the capsule network serves as a main body, feature fuzzification caused by pooling operation is effectively avoided, and a large number of fine-grained features are reserved in a final output layer. The attention mechanism is used to carry out weighted refinement on the features extracted by convolution in space and channel to highlight the fine granularity difference between different traffic features, so that the accuracy of service identification is improved. T

title: 6G-oriented high-throughput satellite communication signal modulation and demodulation method
abstract: The invention discloses a 6G-oriented high-throughput satellite communication signal modulation and demodulation method, which comprises the following steps of: performing high-order MAPSK soft modulation/demodulation on a baseband signal, namely performing shaping filtering on an information source through a constellation diagram; performing channel coding on the filtered signal after exclusive OR, wherein a channel codec adopts an LDPC/Polar coding technology based on 6G; the 6G-oriented multi-frequency MF-OFDM is adopted for multi-access addressing, and wireless signals are transmitted after filtering and power amplification. According to the method, the space in the constellation diagram is fully utilized, so that the star points of the high-order APSK are reasonably and uniformly distributed, the distance between the adjacent star points is increased, the resolution of a constellation at a receiving end is improved, and the technical requirement of symbol judgment at the receiving

title: VEHICLE DRIVE DEVICE
abstract: To appropriately arrange each mechanism and device while suppressing increase in the size of a body in a vehicle drive device with a single-axis configuration.SOLUTION: A parking lock mechanism 6 includes: a parking gear 6G which rotates integrally with a target rotating body being a rotating body that constitutes a reduction gear 3 or differential gear mechanism 5; and an engagement mechanism 6K which regulates the rotation of the parking gear 6G by engaging with the parking gear 6G. The parking gear 6G, a rotation sensor 81 that detects the rotation of a rotor 12 of a rotary electric machine 1, and a temperature sensor 83 that detects the temperature of a coil 11b are arranged at positions that overlap a specific axial direction area A being an area between the rotor 12 and the reduction gear 3 in the axial direction L or an area on the axial direction first side L1 with respect to the rotor 12 in a storage chamber E in the radial view along the radial direction R.SELECTED DRAWING: F

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR REMOVING E2 INTERFACE-RELATED INFORMATION IN RADIO ACCESS NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to embodiments of the disclosure, a method performed by a near-Real Time (RT) Radio Access Network (RAN) Intelligent Controller (RIC) may include receiving from an E2 node an E2 removal request message for indicating a termination of the E2 node through an E2 interface, wherein the termination of the E2 node is configured from a Service Management and Orchestration (SMO), transmitting an E2 removal response message to the E2 node through the E2 interface, and performing a removal of a configuration for the E2 node in the near-RT RIC in response to the E2 removal request message.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SUPPORTING ALTITUDE SPECIFIC MOBILITY FOR UE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. in a method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system, the method may include the steps of: receiving a first control signal transmitted from the base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the base station.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE AND METHOD FOR TRANSMITTING INFORMATION OF USER WEARING WEARABLE DEVICE
abstract: A processor of a wearable device according to one embodiment may establish a communication link between the wearable device and the external electronic device using a communication circuit, based on identifying an external electronic device included in a FoV shown to a user wearing the wearable device based on a camera, and identify first profile information corresponding to the external electronic device, which is stored in a memory. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between real objects and virtual objects. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on 5G (fifth generation) and/or 6G (sixth generation).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR COMMUNICATION SETTING USING RECONFIGURABLE INTELLIGENT SURFACE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. According to one embodiment of the present invention, a method of a base station communicating with a terminal through RIS (Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface) in a wireless communication system comprises the steps of: acquiring configuration information for RIS through presetting; identifying that SSB (Synchronization Signal Block) is to be transmitted through the RIS; and repeatedly transmitting the same SSB for a time longer than the maximum cycle of the RIS.

title: HANDLING USER EQUIPMENT DURING UNAVAILABILITY PERIOD IN WIRELESS NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein disclose a method for handling an UE (100) during an unavailability period in a wireless network (1000) by the UE (100). The method includes detecting that a network apparatus (700) in the wireless network (1000) supports for the unavailability period in a last registration procedure. Further, the method includes determining an event is triggered, where the event makes the UE to become unavailable. Further, the method includes creating a REGISTRATION REQUEST message by including an information to indicate unavailability period that starts immediately. Further, the method includes setting a follow-on request indicator to "No follow-on request pending" and not include an uplink data status IE or an allowed PDU session status IE in the REGISTRATION REQUEST message. Further, the method includes sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST message to the network apparatus (700).

title: SCHEDULING AVAILABILITY FOR USER EQUIPMENT SUPPORTING MULTI-RECEIVER SIMULTANEOUS RECEPTION
abstract: Embodiments attempt to solve challenges in a wireless communications system. Embodiments describe various techniques, systems, and devices to support simultaneous reception information and scheduling restriction information for user equipment in a 3GPP 5G NR or 6G system, among other wireless communications systems. Other embodiments are described and claimed.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMITTING PHASE TRACKING SIGNAL CONSIDERING MULTI-PANEL SIMULTANEOUS TRANSMISSION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a UE in a wireless communication system is provided, which includes receiving, from a BS, configuration information associated with a UL, the configuration information including SRS resource set information including a first SRS resource set and a second SRS resource set, and information indicating that at most two PT-RS ports are used for the UL; receiving, from the BS, DCI including association information between a PT-RS port and a DMRS port; and in case STxMP is configured, transmitting the PT-RS using a first PT-RS port and a second PT-RS port based on the DCI. The first PT-RS port is associated with at least one first DMRS port associated with the first SRS resource set, and the second PT-RS port is associated with at least one second DMRS port associated with the second SRS resource set.

title: TRANSMISSION AND RECEPTION OF POWER REPORTS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for transmission and reception of power reports. A method of operating a user equipment (UE) includes transmitting first information indicating a first power class associated with a first maximum output power on a first carrier; determining a delta power class associated with the first power class on the first carrier; and transmitting second information indicating the delta power class in a power headroom report. The delta power class is a power offset for the first power class.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING COMMUNICATION USING INTELLIGENT SURFACE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. According to an embodiment of the present invention, disclosed may be a method for a base station which communicates with a UE through a reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising the steps of: acquiring configuration information regarding the RIS through a pre-configuration; identifying to transmit a synchronization signal block (SSB) through the RIS; and repeatedly transmitting the same SSB for a time longer than or equal to the maximum period of the RIS.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR TRANSMITTING OR RECEIVING PREAMBLE FOR RANDOM ACCESS DURING HANDOVER IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate beyond a 4G communication system such as LTE. The present disclosure relates to a method and a device for transmitting or receiving a preamble for random access, which can reduce a time delay during handover in a wireless communication system, and a method of a terminal for random access during handover from a source cell to a target cell in a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: transmitting measurement information of the source cell and the target cell to a first base station of the source cell; receiving an RRC message including RACH configuration information of the target cell from the first base station; and sequentially transmitting one or more preambles for the random access to a second base station of the target cell on the basis of the RACH configuration information, wherein the RACH configuration

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR GENERATING EUICC ENCRYPTION KEY FOR PROFILE PROVISIONING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by a terminal having an eUICC in a wireless communication system may comprise the steps of: receiving, from a factory, a first message including a BPP for profile installation and first encryption key information associated with the BPP; installing a profile on the basis of the first message through the eUICC; and sending, to the factory, a second message including the installation result of the profile.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MEASURING AND REPORTING INTER-CELL BEAM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A UE includes a transceiver and a controller connected to the transceiver and configured to receive first information related to a group of CSI-RS resources, receive second information related to a group TCI states, receive third information indicating an association between the group of TCI states and the group of CSI-RS resources, receive fourth information indicating resources for transmission of a beam measurement report, receive a MAC CE including a cell switch command, transmit a HARQ-ACK,determine one or more CSI-RS resources from the group of CSI-RS resources based on the TCI state, receive the one or more CSI-RS resources, determine, based on a measurement of the one or more CSI-RS resources, a beam measurement report, andtransmit the beam measurement report using the resources for transmission of a beam measurement report.

title: CSI CODEBOOK PARAMETERS AND CSI REPORTING FOR COHERENT JOINT TRANSMISSION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Apparatuses and methods for channel state information (CSI) codebook parameters and CSI reporting for a coherent joint transmission. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving information about (i) a channel state information (CSI) report associated with N TRP ≥ 1 CSI reference signal (CSI-RS) resources and (ii) N L ≥ 1 values of (L 1 ,···, L NTRP ). Each of the N L values of (L 1 ,···, L NTRP ) belongs to a table including N TRP , (L 1 ,···, L NTRP ), and an associated index and (L 1 ,···, L NTRP ) is a tuple of numbers of spatial-domain (SD) basis vectors L r associated with CSI-RS resource r = 1,···, N TRP . The method further includes determining the CSI report based on the information and transmitting the determined CSI report.

title: MOBILITY MANAGEMENT METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PUBLIC TERMINAL PERFORMING BEAMFORMING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. This operating method of a terminal in a wireless communication system may comprise the steps of: determining a list of one or more neighboring cells in which inter-cell interference can occur, and one or more beams for measuring a channel state of the one or more neighboring cells; measuring the channel state of the one or more neighboring cells on the basis of the one or more beams; selecting a list of candidate cells on the basis of result values of the measurement; and transmitting, to a base station, a message containing the list of candidate cells and information about the one or more beams.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR OPERATING WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM ON BASIS OF BANDWIDTH
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. Also, the present disclosure provides methods for improving operations and performances of a base station and a terminal when the base station is operated in a bandwidth smaller than 5 MHz. According to the present disclosure, the system can be operated even in a restricted bandwidth that was not introduced before, and a control signal receiving performance may be improved.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR REFERENCE SIGNAL TRANSMISSION/RECEPTION AND RATE MATCHING FOR FULL-DUPLEX COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure provides a method for downlink control channel configuration and reception in a wireless communication system.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR AUTHORIZATION BASED ON UPF IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth-generation (5G) or sixth-generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user plane function (UPF) entity in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a network entity requesting a subscription of a UPF service, a UPF service subscription request message, identifying whether an authorization of the UPF service is required and an entity associated with the authorization of the UPF service, transmitting, to the entity associated with the authorization of the UPF service, an authorization request message for the UPF service, receiving, from the entity associated with the authorization of the UPF service, an authorization response message for the UPF service.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING ALTITUDE-SPECIFIC MOBILITY OF TERMINAL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. This method performed by means of a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system may comprise the steps of: receiving one or more pieces of measurement-related configuration information from a base station, the one or more pieces of measurement-related configuration information, that correspond to each of different altitudes of the user equipment, being configured to be different from each other; and transmitting, to the base station, a measurement result report about a neighbor cell on the basis of the one or more pieces of measurement-related configuration information.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR UPLINK DATA TRANSMISSION BY CONSIDERING MULTI-PANEL SIMULTANEOUS TRANSMISSION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transfer rates. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving configuration information on a resource for transmitting a first physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) based on a configured grant, the first PUSCH being associated with a first control resource set (CORESET) pool identifier; receiving downlink control information (DCI) including information on a resource for transmitting a second PUSCH based on a dynamic grant (DG), the second PUSCH being associated with a second CORESET pool identifier,wherein the resource for transmitting the first PUSCH overlaps with all or part of the resource for transmitting the second PUSCH in a time domain; identifying whether a value of the first CORESET pool identifier is different from a value of the second CORESET pool identifier; and in case that the value

title: USER PLANE PATH CONFIGURATION AND INFORMATION PROVISION METHOD FOR SUPPORTING TERMINAL MOBILITY
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure provides a method of an EES comprising the steps of: receiving a first message comprising service continuity information and traffic pattern information from an EAS or EEC; confirming whether a source PSA and target PSA simultaneous connection for a PDU session of the EAS or EEC can be supported; if the source PSA and target PSA simultaneous connection can be supported, determining the connection duration of a source PSA, and transmitting, to NEF of a wireless communication network, a second message comprising the connection duration and a source PSA and target PSA simultaneous connection indicator; and transmitting, to the EAS or EEC, a third message comprising the duration of the source PSA connection and whether the source PSA and target PSA simultaneous connection can be supported.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR REPORTING CSI IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a 5G or 6G communication system is provided. The method includes receiving a message including configuration information for a conditional channel state information (CSI) report from a base station, receiving multiple CSI-reference signals (RSs) on different beams from the base station, selecting at least one CSI-RS satisfying at least one of a first condition or a second condition from the multiple CSI-RSs, based on the configuration information, and transmitting the conditional CSI report including information on the at least one CSI-RS to the base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING TIME RESOURCE FOR FULL-DUPLEX COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Particularly, a method performed by a UE in a wireless communication system, according to the present disclosure, may comprise the steps of: receiving, from a base station, time resource configuration information for subband full duplex (SBFD), the time resource configuration information including time location information for the SBFD and periodicity information for the SBFD; on the basis of the time resource configuration information, identifying a time resource of a subband for the SBFD; and transmitting, to the base station, an uplink signal on the basis of the time resource of the subband.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR REPORTING CSI IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). A method for efficiently selecting an optimal beam based on channel state information (CSI) in a 5G or 6G communication system is provided. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving a message including configuration information for a CSI report from a base station, receiving a plurality of CSI-reference signals (RSs) on different beams from the base station, generating a precoding matrix for the plurality of CSI-RSs, based on the configuration information, and transmitting the CSI report calculated based on the precoding matrix to the base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF QOE REPORTING FOR XR MEDIA SERVICES
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of a user equipment (UE) performing a quality of experience (QoE) reporting operation for extended reality (XR) media services is disclosed. The method comprises receiving configuration information for a QoE reporting operation, determining whether an event for the QoE reporting operation is triggered based on the configuration information, generating a frame rate QoE metric comprising pose information of the UE, generating a round-trip time (RTT) QoE metric comprising a tethered delay between at least one tethered device and the UE, generating a codec QoE metric comprising 3D media codec type for 3D media, in response to the event being triggered, generating a QoE report comprising at least one of the frame rate QoE metric, the RTT QoE metric, or the codec QoE metric, and transmitting the generated QoE report.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR PROVIDING, ON BASIS OF TYPE OF EXTERNAL OBJECT, INFORMATION ABOUT ITEM INCLUDED IN EXTERNAL OBJECT, AND METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: A wearable device processor according to one embodiment uses a camera so as to identify an external object including a storage compartment included in a display area of a display. The processor can: acquire, by using the camera, on the basis that among a first shape in which the storage compartment is open and a second shape differing from the first shape, the shape of an external object corresponding to the first shape is identified, a designated motion for moving one or more items located in the storage compartment; and change, on the basis of the acquired designated motion, information representing a list of the one or more items located in the storage compartment. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service can be provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR RECORDING AUDIO SIGNAL AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A processor of a wearable device according to an embodiment may broadcast, through a communication circuit, a signal including information for tracking an external object to which a virtual microphone is attached. The processor may obtain a first audio signal based on an attribute from the microphone and obtain at least one second audio signal from at least one external electronic device. The at least one second audio signal may be transmitted from the at least one external electronic device as a response to the signal. The processor may synthesize the first audio signal and the at least one second audio signal to obtain a third audio signal for the virtual microphone. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for strengthening the interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: CSI APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR REPORTING CSI IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. Specifically, the 5G or 6G communication system of the present disclosure may include the following steps of: receiving a message including configuration information for conditional CSI (channel state information) reporting from a base station; receiving a plurality of CSI-RS (reference signals) on different beams from the base station; selecting at least one CSI-RS satisfying at least one of a first condition or a second condition among the plurality of CSI-RSs based on the configuration information; and transmitting the CSI report including information on the at least one CSI-RS to the base station.

title: CSI APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR REPORTING CSI IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present invention relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate after a 4G communication system such as LTE. Specifically, the present invention proposes a method for efficiently selecting an optimal beam based on CSI in a 5G or 6G communication system. According to various embodiments of the present invention, in a wireless communication system, a method performed by a terminal may comprise the steps of: receiving a message including configuration information for CSI reporting from a base station; receiving a plurality of CSI-RSs on different beams from the base station; generating a precoding matrix for the plurality of CSI-RSs based on the configuration information; and transmitting a CSI report calculated based on the precoding matrix to the base station.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR PROVIDING INFORMATION ABOUT ITEM INCLUDED IN EXTERNAL OBJECT BASED ON TYPE OF EXTERNAL OBJECT AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A processor of a wearable device according to one embodiment may identify an external object including a storage included in a display area of a display using a camera. The processor may obtain a designated motion for moving one or more items located in the storage using the camera based on identifying a shape of the external object corresponding to the first shape among a first shape in which the storage is open or a second shape different from the first shape. The processor may change information representing a list of the one or more items located in the storage based on the obtained designated motion. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between real objects and virtual objects. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MANAGING MOBILITY FOR BEAMFORMED AERIAL DEVICE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates. In a wireless communication system, a method of operating a terminal may include: a step of determining a list of at least one neighboring cell in which inter-cell interference may occur and at least one beam for measuring a channel state for the at least one neighboring cell; a step of measuring a channel state for the at least one neighboring cell based on the at least one beam; a step of selecting a candidate cell list based on a result value of the measurement; and a step of transmitting a message including information on the candidate cell list and the at least one beam to a base station.

title: UPF METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR AUTHORIZATION BASED ON UPF IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, in a wireless communication system, a method performed by a user plane function (UPF) entity may comprise the steps of: receiving a subscription request message of a UPF service from an application function (AF) entity; identifying whether authorization of the UPF service requested by the AF entity is required; transmitting a message requesting authorization of the UPF service requested by the AF entity to a session management function (SMF) entity based on the identification result; receiving a message instructing the authorization of the UPF service requested by the AF entity from the SMF entity; and transmitting a subscription response message of the UPF service to the AF entity based on the message instructing the authorization.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR RECORDING AUDIO SIGNAL AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: In one embodiment, a processor of a wearable device may broadcast a signal including information for tracking an external object coupled with the virtual microphone via a communication circuit. The processor may obtain a first audio signal based on the property from the microphone, and obtain at least one second audio signal from at least one external electronic device. The at least one second audio signal may be transmitted in response to the signal from the at least one external electronic device. The processor may obtain a third audio signal for the virtual microphone by synthesizing the first audio signal and the at least one second audio signal. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between real objects and virtual objects. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on 5G (fifth generation) and/or 6G (sixth generation).

title: eUICC METHOD AND APPARATUS OF EUICC KEY GENERATION FOR PROVISIONING PROFILE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. in a method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system, the method may include the steps of: receiving a first control signal transmitted from the base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the base station.

title: Communication method and apparatus in wireless communication system supporting unmanned aerial system service
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by an unmanned aerial vehicle network function (UAS NF) in a wireless communication system that provides UAS services for unmanned aerial vehicle user equipment (UAV UE) is provided. The method includes: receiving a first message from a UAS Service Provider (USS), the first message including information about UAV USS Authentication and Authorization (UUAA) revocation of the UAV UE; identifying UUAA information of the UAV UE; determining, based on the UUAA information, a network entity to which information about UUAA revocation of the UAV UE is to be notified; and sending a second message to the network entity, the second message comprising information associated with the UUAA revocation of the UAV UE.

title: Method and apparatus for terminal registration for limiting terminal access in wireless communication system
abstract: A 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates is provided. Further, a method performed by an Access and Mobility Management Function (AMF) entity is provided. The method includes storing information on a first user equipment (UE) and starting a timer after performing a de-registration procedure on UE registration for network access of the first UE, receiving a UE registration request message for network access of the second UE from the second UE while the timer is running, and, when the first UE and the second UE are the same as each other, registering the first UE with the second UE based on the stored information. And rejecting the UE registration request message.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING TIME RESOURCE FOR FULL DUPLEX COMMUNICATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNCIATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. Specifically, a method performed by a terminal according to the present disclosure comprises: a process of receiving time resource location setting information of an uplink subband (UL subband) for a subband non-overlapping full duplex (SBFD) communication from a base station; a process of checking an index of at least one orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) symbol or slot comprising an available uplink subband within a setting period based on the setting information; and a process of transmitting an uplink using the available uplink subband within the downlink BWP based on at least one checked OFDM symbol or index.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMITTING/RECEIVING A PREAMBLE FOR RANDOM ACCESS DURING HANDOVER IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. The present disclosure relates to a method and device for transmitting and receiving a preamble for random access that can reduce time delay during handover in a wireless communication system. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method of a terminal for random access during handover from a source cell to a target cell in a wireless communication system comprises: a process of transmitting measurement information on the source cell and the target cell to a first base station of the source cell; a process of receiving an RRC message including RACH configuration information of the target cell from the first base station; and a process of sequentially transmitting at least one preamble for the random access to a second base station of the target cell based on the RACH configuration information, wherein the RACH conf

title: Phase adjustment method and device of intelligent reflecting surface and related equipment
abstract: The invention provides a phase adjustment method and device for an intelligent reflecting surface and related equipment, and relates to the technical field of communication, and the method comprises the steps: building communication connection with an intelligent reflecting surface RIS, and configuring an identifier and a control channel search space for the RIS; receiving RIS information sent by the RIS; transmitting phase adjustment information to the RIS based on the RIS information and the identification and control channel search space; receiving information of the optimal beam direction sent by the user terminal; and adjusting the phase of the RIS according to the information of the optimal beam direction. According to the method, dynamic beam scanning and user tracking can be realized, the coverage range is expanded, the deployment flexibility is improved, the problem of difficulty in RIS project deployment can be solved, RIS services can be quickly deployed, and 5G application

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INDICATING DYNAMIC WAVEFORME SWITCHING MODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. in addition, the present disclosure provides a method and apparatus having dynamic coverage according to the location and signal state of a terminal by defining a signal transmission method of a base station when a terminal is transmitted and received in a mobile communication system. according to the present disclosure, the coverage of the terminal is dynamically provided according to a channel situation in the mobile communication system, so that stable transmission and reception is possible.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR AUTHENTICATION AND SECURITY FOR UPFUser plane function SERVICE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In the wireless communication system according to the present disclosure, a method performed by a user plane function (UPF) entity comprises the steps of: receiving a registration request message including first authentication information from an external network function (NF) entity; and transmitting a registration response message including second authentication information to the external NF entity. The first authentication information and the second authentication information may be used for mutual authentication between the external NF entity and a network including the UPF entity.

title: IP METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR OBTAINING PRIVATE IP ADDRESS OF UE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to the present disclosure, an operating method of an AF (1700) in a wireless communication system includes the steps of: transmitting a service subscription request message requesting service subscription to a UPF (400); and receiving a response message to the service subscription request message from the UPF (400). The service subscription request message includes an IP datagram (43) including a UCMP protocol message (30), and the UCMP protocol message (30) is a message requesting a private IP address (41) of a terminal (100) corresponding to a public IP address (42). Furthermore, the response message may include the private IP address (41) of the terminal (100) corresponding to the public IP address (42).

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DETERMINING VALIDITY OF SYSTEM INFORMATION IN PRIVATE NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5<sup>th</sup> generation (5G) or 6<sup>th</sup> generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the disclosure provides a method by which a user equipment (UE) supporting a non-public network (NPN) determines validity of a system information block (SIB) and obtains or re-obtains an SIB.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PERFORMING RANDOM ACCESS PROCEDURE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G, pre-5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. A method performed by a first node using a first frequency band in a wireless communication system according to the present disclosure may include the steps of: transmitting a request message requesting uplink transmission to a second node using a second frequency band; receiving a response message from the second node; generating system information based on the response message; transmitting the generated system information to a UE; and receiving information related to uplink data from the UE from the second node.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SUPPORTING MULTIPLE NUMEROLOGIES IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatuses for multiple numerologies in a wireless communication system are provided. The methods of UE comprise: identifying first information associated with a set of SF groups including a first SF group and a second SF group, wherein the set of SF groups comprise a number of slots; determining, based on the first information, whether a SF belongs to the first SF group or the second SF group; receiving second information related to a numerology and slot length associated with the set of SF groups; and receiving or transmitting a signal in the SF based on the numerology and slot length included in the second information.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR USING RADIO RESOURCES DURING EMERGENCY SESSION IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication systme for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to one embodiment of the disclosure, a method performed by a non-access stratum (NAS) layer of a terminal in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: identifying at least one information on network slice related to an access attempt; and transmitting, to a lower layer of the terminal, the at least one information on the network slice related to the access attempt, wherein the at least one information on the network slice is included in at least one of information on uplink data status, information on allowed packet data unit (PDU) session status, or a message for a PDU session associated with the network slice.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIRMATION OF RANDOM ACCESS RESOURCES
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by user equipment UE is disclosed, and includes receiving resource random access related configuration information, wherein the resource configuration information includes frequency domain configuration information of M random access occasions (ROs); determining resource locations of the M ROs based on the resource configuration information; and sending a random access preamble/channel at the determined resource locations.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INDICATING DYNAMIC WAVEFORM SWITCHING MODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data rates. Disclosed is a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system, including receiving downlink control information (DCI) from a base station, identifying whether the DCI includes a dynamic waveform indicator, and in case that the DCI includes a dynamic waveform indicator, transmitting, to the base station, an uplink signal through a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) based on an uplink waveform indicated by the dynamic waveform indicator.

title: CHANNEL STATE INFORMATION REPORTING
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Apparatuses and method for channel state information (CSI) reporting. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving a configuration about a channel state information (CSI) report. The configuration indicates (i) a value of N 4, (ii) a value of paramCombination indicating values of three parameters, and (iii) a codebookType. The method further includes determining the CSI report based on the configuration and transmitting the CSI report. Here, N 4 is a number of time-domain (TD) slot intervals.

title: AUTHENTICATION AND ENCRYPTION METHOD AND DEVICE FOR USER PLANE FUNCTION SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present invention relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by a user plane function (UPF) entity in a communication system according to the present invention comprises the steps of: receiving a subscription request message including first authentication information from an external network function (NF) entity; and transmitting a subscription response message including second authentication information to the external NF entity, wherein the first authentication information, the second authentication information, and third authentication information acquired by the external NF entity may be used for mutual authentication between a network including the external NF entity and a network including the UPF entity.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING MOBILITY USING LOCATION INFORMATION ABOUT TERMINAL IN NON-TERRESTRIAL NETWORK SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure relates to a method of a terminal in a wireless communication system and a device for performing same, the method comprising the steps of: receiving system information, including location information related to an area of a terrestrial network, from a base station in a non-terrestrial network; receiving configuration information about an event from the base station; determining, on the basis of the location information, whether the terminal is located in the area of the terrestrial network; and performing the event on the basis of whether the terminal is located in the area of the terrestrial network, wherein the location information includes reference location information and threshold value information related to the area of the terrestrial network.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PERFORMING RANDOM ACCESS PROCEDURE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G, pre-5G, or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transfer rate beyond a 4G communication system such as LTE. A method performed by a first node using a first frequency band in a wireless communication system, according to the present disclosure, may comprise the steps of: transmitting, to a second node using a second frequency band, a request message requesting uplink transmission; receiving a response message from the second node; generating system information on the basis of the response message; transmitting the generated system information to a UE; and receiving, from the second node, information related to uplink data from the UE.

title: SYSTEM FOR TRAINING MACHINE LEARNING MODELS USING FEDERATED LEARNING
abstract: A method and system for more efficient federated learning (FL) of a machine learning (ML) model using user equipment (UEs) in cellular networks are disclosed. In particular, a system is provided for reducing the impact of poor channel conditions in a cellular network on the FL process. The cellular network may be a 5G, 6G or next generation cellular network. Advantageously, this disclosure creates redundancies in the transmission of FL trained model parameters to reduce the likelihood of an FL training process being stalled by a failure in transmission of data between UEs and a central parameter server which updates an ML model using data received from UEs.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIRMATION OF RANDOM ACCESS RESOURCES
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by user equipment UE is disclosed, and includes receiving resource random access related configuration information, wherein the resource configuration information includes frequency domain configuration information of M random access occasions (ROs); determining resource locations of the M ROs based on the resource configuration information; and sending a random access preamble/channel at the determined resource locations.

title: RANDOM ACCESS METHOD AND DEVICE IN ULTRA-HIGH FREQUENCY WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a data transmission rate higher than that of a 4G system such as LTE. More particularly, disclosed are a method and a device related to the generation and detection of random access preamble signals for random access in ultra-high frequency wireless communication.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR TRANSMITTING DOWNLINK DATA AS REPEATED DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method may include: receiving, from a base station (BS), a radio resource control (RRC) message including a parameter associated with using a start symbol of a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) monitoring occasion as a reference of a start and length identifier value (SLIV); determining, based on the parameter, when a physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH) is scheduled by downlink control information (DCI) transmitted via repetitive first PDCCH candidate and second PDCCH candidate, a reference symbol associated with a start symbol of the PDSCH by using the second PDCCH candidate starting after the first PDCCH candidate; and receiving, based on the reference symbol, downlink data via the PDSCH from the BS.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PERFORMING PAC CODE-BASED HYBRID DECODING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than 4G communication systems such as LTE systems. The disclosure relates to a method and device for dynamically selecting, or simultaneously performing, PAC code-based fano decoding and/or list decoding in a wireless communication system. The method for performing PAC code-based decoding by a reception device in a wireless communication system comprises identifying a specific criterion variable related to a channel state for selecting at least one of fano decoding or list decoding for a signal received from a transmission device, comparing the specific criterion variable related to the channel state with a threshold, performing the fano decoding in case that the specific criterion variable related to the channel state satisfies the threshold, and performing the list decoding in case that the specific criterion variable related to the channel state does not satisfy the threshold.

title: Method and apparatus for performing fast cell activation in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure provides a method and apparatus for rapidly performing cell activation in a wireless communication system. The method of the UE includes: receiving first channel measurement configuration information and second channel measurement configuration information including channel measurement signal information from a base station; receiving a MAC CE for cell activation or cell deactivation from the base station; identifying, based on the MAC CE, at least one cell in which cell activation is indicated for the terminal; determining, on the basis of the first channel measurement configuration information and the second channel measurement configuration information, channel measurement configuration information for at least one cell in which cell activation is indicated; and performing cell activation based on the second channel measurement configuration inform

title: Apparatus and method for providing paging priority in multicast service support network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments relate to a method and apparatus for transmitting multicast data to a terminal in a 5G network. The method for transmitting multicast data to a terminal includes: receiving a first message for activating a multicast broadcast service (MBS) session from a multicast broadcast session management function (MB-SMF); identifying information about an MBS QoS flow of the at least one MBS QoS flow within the MBS session; and transmitting a second message including information about the MBS QoS flow to an access and mobility management function (AMF) for the AMF to transmit the paging message according to the information about the MBS QoS flow.

title: WIRELESS NETWORK AND METHOD FOR MAINTAINING MA PDU SESSION AT NSACF
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein disclose a wireless network and method of maintaining an MA PDU session at an NSACF entity. The method includes determining, by the SMF entity, that the PDU session is an MA PDU session based on the indication from the UE. Further, the method includes, in response to the determination, indicating, by the SMF entity to the NSACF entity, that the PDU session is the MA PDU session. The wireless network may accurately maintain the count even if the PDU session is an MA PDU session.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR DISPLAYING VISUAL OBJECT FOR CONTROLLING VIRTUAL OBJECT AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: In one embodiment, a processor of a wearable device may identify locations of one or more virtual objects within a display area based on an image including at least a portion of the display area. The processor may display the image in which the one or more visual objects representing the one or more virtual objects overlap on a plane arranged based on a location of the wearable device within an external space including the wearable device. The processor may change the one or more virtual objects in response to an input related to the one or more visual objects arranged based on the identified locations on the image. The present document may be related to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between real objects and virtual objects. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on 5G (fifth generation) and/or 6G (sixth generation).

title: System for Training Machine Learning Models Using Federated Learning
abstract: Disclosed are a method and a system for more efficient federated learning (FL) of a machine learning (ML) model using a user equipment (UE) in a cellular network. In particular, a system is provided for reducing the influence of poor channel conditions of the cellular network on a federated learning process. The cellular network may be a 5G, 6G, or next-generation cellular network. Advantageously, the present disclosure generates redundancy in the transmission of FL-trained model parameters to reduce the likelihood that the FL training process will be interrupted due to data transmission failure between a UE and a central parameter server which updates an ML model using data received from the UE.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING UNIFIED TCI STATUS IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method and apparatus for configuring a Unified Transmit Configuration Indicator (TCI) state in a wireless communication system. A method of operating a user equipment (UE), the method comprising: receiving configuration information for a list of TCI states or joint TCI states of a downlink (DL); receiving configuration information for a control resource set (CORESET); receiving configuration information for a search space set associated with the CORESET; and receiving an indication of a TCI state from the list of TCI states. The method further comprises the steps that the type of the search space set and the index of the CORESET are recognized; applying the indicated TCI state to a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) in the CORESET based on (i) the type of the identified search space set and the identified index of the CORESET or (ii) other configuration information

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR PROVIDING UE LOCATION INFORMATION
abstract: A method related to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate is provided for verifying location information of a user equipment (UE) in a network including the UE and one or more network entities. The method comprises: receiving, by a first network entity, first information indicating a location of the UE determined by the UE; receiving, by the first network entity, second information for verifying the first information; and validating the first information based on the second information. The second information comprises at least one of the following items: CN auxiliary information; and analyzing the determined information based on the network. Additionally or alternatively, the second information may include additional information provided by the UE.

title: Method and apparatus for managing partial bandwidth of cell group activation or deactivation in next generation mobile communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method and apparatus for enabling a cell to be quickly activated in a next generation mobile communication system are provided.

title: Method and apparatus for cell group activation or deactivation in next generation mobile communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system. According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, provided are a method and apparatus for quickly activating a cell in a next generation mobile communication system.

title: Block chain driven edge computing system joint optimization method
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of wireless communication, and discloses a block chain-driven edge computing system joint optimization method, which can reduce the average total energy consumption of Internet of Things equipment to the greatest extent through joint optimization of access control and computing resource allocation strategies on the premise of credibility guarantee and user service quality guarantee, and can improve the efficiency of the Internet of Things equipment. According to the invention, the problems of high energy consumption, short service life, poor processing capability, lack of trust among operators and the like of Internet of Things equipment in the 6G network are solved. The base station not only plays a key role in the MEC system, but also plays an important role in the block chain subsystem, including block generation, client interaction and implementation of a consensus mechanism. According to the method, due to the dynamic nature of a networ

title: Hybrid intelligent reflecting surface power distribution optimization method for assisting 6G vehicle-to-vehicle communication
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of vehicle networking wireless communication, and discloses a hybrid intelligent reflecting surface power distribution optimization method for assisting 6G vehicle-to-vehicle communication. The method comprises the following steps: configuring a hybrid intelligent reflecting surface; establishing a multi-lane highway vehicle scene; the hybrid intelligent reflecting surface assists in vehicle-to-vehicle communication channel modeling; the hybrid intelligent reflecting surface assists the selection of a vehicle-to-vehicle communication relay vehicle; establishing a hybrid intelligent reflecting surface auxiliary vehicle-to-vehicle communication energy consumption model; an iterative algorithm based on Dinkelbach is adopted to optimize the amplification power and the transmitting power of an active element, and power distribution optimization is completed; according to the invention, each vehicle running on the road is possible to become an aux

title: Enhanced Throughput and Reliability with Zero-Power States in 5G and 6G
abstract: A 5G/6G network can include a modulation scheme for uplink and downlink messaging using a special zero-power modulation level, in addition to the regular amplitude modulation levels of, for example, QAM. The receiver can demodulate each message element by comparing the amplitude to the various amplitude levels, including the zero-power level, and thereby increase the bits per message element, and hence the communication throughput, at no increase in transmitted power. In addition, the zero-power states can reveal intrusive noise and interference in the proximate message, enabling correction before the demodulation. The zero-power amplitude may be added to conventional modulation schemes, such as an additional zero-power amplitude level in QAM, PSK, and amplitude-phase modulation schemes, thereby providing greater versatility at little or no cost and no additional transmission power.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR CONTROLLING TRAFFIC FLOW THROUGH SIDELINK RELAY IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5<sup>th</sup>-generation (5G) or 6<sup>th</sup>-generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates.According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a user equipment (UE) for sidelink (SL) communication may include: transmitting traffic status information about SL uplink and SL downlink; obtaining scheduling information for SL uplink traffic control and SL downlink traffic resource allocation determined based on the traffic status information; and controlling traffic flow, based on the scheduling information, wherein the UE is a SL remote UE or a SL relay UE.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR HARQ-ACK FEEDBACK TRANSMISSION OR RECEPTION FOR NETWORK COOPERATIVE COMMUNICATION
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The disclosure may be applied to intelligence services (for example, smart homes, smart buildings, smart cities, smart cars or connected cars, healthcare, digital education, retail businesses, security and safety related services, etc.) on the basis of a 5G communication technology and an IoT-related technology. The present disclosure may provide a method and a device for transmitting or receiving HARQ-ACK feedback information by a terminal in a wireless communication system and, specifically, provide a method and a device for transmitting, for network cooperative communication (network coordination), HARQ-ACK feedback information to multiple transmission points, panels, or beams by a terminal.

title: 6G MIMO Substrate integrated waveguide SIW based elliptically tapered slot antenna as single and MIMO radiator for 6G Transmitter and receiver chips
abstract: Wideband performance can be acquired using a tapered slot antenna, which is known to provide a greater bandwidth. Gain > 10 dBi is achieved by optimizing the aperture size of the antenna. End-fire antenna radiation properties solve the multi-reflection problem commonly present in a broadside MIMO antenna. Here, the Rx antenna acts as a reflector for TX and has a smaller spacing for the opposite case. Use of PCB technology for manufacture a single and MIMO antenna results in cost-effective and compact transceiver PCBs. In the case of previously designed chip-integrated PCB antennas, an end-fire antenna is not developed using SIW technology and also a wide -10dB IBW of 60GHz is not produced. Compared with OC, LTCC and WG based antennas, the designed antenna is cost effective and provides a wide bandwidth while providing lower profile and wideband performance than a 3DP antenna.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR DISPLAYING VISUAL OBJECT FOR CONTROLLING VIRTUAL OBJECT, AND METHOD THEREFOR
abstract: This processor of a wearable device is configured to identify positions of one or more virtual objects within a display area, on the basis of an image comprising at least part of the display area. The processor is configured to display, on a plane arranged within an external space comprising the wearable device on the basis of a position of the wearable device, the image in which one or more visual objects representing the one or more virtual objects overlap each other. The processor is configured to change the one or more virtual objects on the image, in response to an input associated with the one or more visual objects arranged on the basis of the identified positions. The present document relates to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, this metaverse service is provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONTROLLING TRANSMISSION POWER OF UE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate than a 4G communication system such as LTE. A base station according to an embodiment of the present disclosure may: receive, from a UE, a request signal for an energy saving (ES) mode of an AI model for transmission power control; determine whether or not to use (or switch) the AI model for transmission power control into the ES mode; and on the basis of the determination, transmit, to the UE, a response signal including information indicating whether or not to use (or switch) the AI model for transmission power control into the ES mode.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PERFORMING PAC-CODE-BASED HYBRID DECODING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a data transmission rate higher than that of a 4G communication system such as LTE. The present disclosure relates to a method and an apparatus for performing, through dynamic selection or simultaneously, polarization adjusted convolutional (PAC) code-based Fano decoding and/or list decoding in a wireless communication system, and the method by which a terminal performs PAC-code-based decoding in a wireless communication system, according to an embodiment of the present disclosure, comprises the steps of: checking a specific reference variable related to a channel state for selecting at least one decoding scheme between Fano decoding and list decoding for a signal received from a base station; comparing, to a threshold, the specific reference variable related to the channel state; performing Fano decoding if the specific reference variable related to the channel state satisfies the threshold; and performin

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR IMPROVING RRC RE-ESTABLISHMENT USING LOW LAYER MOBILITY IN NEXT-GENERATION MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a UE may carry out access to another pregiven target cell in case of a wireless connection failure or a handover failure. Accordingly, the delay time due to an attempt of the UE to reconnect to a network may be reduced.
