Particularly, disclosed is a method for the UE in a wireless communication system, the method comprising the steps of: receiving, from a base station, a radio resource control (RRC) message including lower layer triggered mobility (LTM) configuration information; if a wireless connection failure is detected, performing a cell selection procedure; and on the basis of the LTM configuration information, and a cell selected by the cell selection procedure, determining whether or not to apply the LTM configuration information to the selected cell.

title: DISPLAY DEVICE
abstract: A display device (1) comprises: light emitting elements (5R·5G·5B) provided in respective ones of a plurality of sub-pixels (RSUB·GSUB·BSUB) and including a lower electrode (22), a hole transport layer (25), light emitting layers (8R·8G·8B), and a first upper electrode layer (28) in this order from the side of a substrate (2); and non-light emitting charge-transfer elements (6R·6G·6B) provided in respective ones of a plurality of dummy sub-pixels (DRSUB·DGSUB·SBSUB) and including the lower electrode (22), the hole transport layer (25), the light emitting layers (8R·8G·8B), and the second upper electrode layer (28a) in this order from the substrate (2) side. The non-light emitting charge-transfer elements (6R·6G·6B) comprise a resistance adjustment layer having a resistivity higher than that of the first upper electrode layer (28) and less than or equal to 1×109Ω·cm between a first surface (M1), which is a surface on the light emitting layer (8R·8G·8B) side of the hole transport layer (

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR UPLINK DATA TRANSMISSION BY CONSIDERING MULTI-PANEL SIMULTANEOUS TRANSMISSION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transfer rates. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving configuration information on a resource for transmitting a first physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) based on a configured grant, the first PUSCH being associated with a first control resource set (CORESET) pool identifier; receiving downlink control information (DCI) including information on a resource for transmitting a second PUSCH based on a dynamic grant (DG), the second PUSCH being associated with a second CORESET pool identifier, wherein the resource for transmitting the first PUSCH overlaps with all or part of the resource for transmitting the second PUSCH in a time domain; identifying whether a value of the first CORESET pool identifier is different from a value of the second CORESET pool identifier; and in case that the value

title: IMPROVEMENTS IN AND RELATING TO DATA LOSS DUE TO DONOR CHANGE IN A MULTI-HOP NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed is a method of routing data in a network, wherein a data transfer path is migrated from terminating at a first donor Distributed Unit, DU, to terminating at a second donor DU, comprising the step of either: a) configuring at least one node impacted by the migration and then using a default configuration, comprising a default identifier and/or transport channel, to re-route a packet impacted by the migration; or b) changing a part of a packet affected by the migration.

title: A METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROVIDING MULTICAST BROADCAST SERVICES IN A TELECOMMUNICATION NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed is a User Equipment, UE, operable with a telecommunication network, arranged to perform an operation associated with a Level 2, L2, entity involved with Multicast Broadcast Services, MBS, wherein the UE is arranged to perform the operation in response to one of: i) information received or acquired from the network or upon UE mobility; and ii) information provided in a message field received from the network, explicitly to trigger the UE to perform the operation.

title: RRC METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENHANCEMENT OF RRC REESTABLISHMENT USING LOWER LAYER TRIGGERED MOBILITY IN NEXT GENERATION WIRELESS SYSTEMS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a terminal can perform access to another predetermined target cell when a wireless connection failure or a handover failure occurs. Accordingly, a delay time due to an attempt of the terminal to reconnect to a network can be reduced.

title: Method and apparatus for detecting and recovering beam failure
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method and apparatus for beam fault detection in a wireless communication system. A method for operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving downlink control information (DCI), the DCI including a first transmission configuration indication (TCI) field indicating a first TCI state; receiving information about a type of the first TCI state; and determining a first set of beam fault detection (BFD) reference signal (RS) resource configuration indices based on the first TCI state and the type of the first TCI state. The type of the first TCI state is a joint TCI state indicated by a DLorJoint TCISState parameter, a separate downlink (DL) TCI state indicated by a DLorJoint TCISState parameter, or a separate UL TCI state indicated by a UL-TCISState parameter. The BFD RS resource configuration index corresponds to a periodic CSI-RS resource configuration index.

title: WDTC-I type scheduling operation platform
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of railway mobile communication, in particular to a WDTC-I type dispatching operation platform, which comprises a control unit and an interface unit. The control unit is connected with a loudspeaker, a gooseneck microphone, a WIFI module adopting the sixth-generation wireless network technology, a telephone handle, a touch display screen and a camera. The touch display screen is used for video conference and dynamic marshalling. The WIFI module is used for remote parameter configuration, state query, alarm reporting, log recording and software upgrading of the user terminal, the functions of video conference and dynamic marshalling are realized by adopting the 12.1-inch touch display screen, so that the product display is more efficient, a 100M network port and a 1000M network port are provided for double-network-port link, the network can be directly accessed or a fixed radio station can be accessed, and the product display efficiency i

title: UE METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONTROLLING TRANSMIT POWER OF USER EQUIPMENT IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate after a 4G communication system such as LTE. A base station according to an embodiment of the present disclosure may receive a request signal for an energy saving mode (ES mode) of an AI model for transmission power control from UE, determine whether the AI model for transmission power control is used (or switched) to the ES mode, and transmit a response signal including information indicating whether the AI model for transmission power control is used (or switched) to the ES mode to the UE based on the determination.

title: 6G 5G NR DM-RS Demodulation Reference Signal based Channel Estimation Method and System for Non-Terrestrial Networks to support High Mobility
abstract: A DM-RS-based channel equalization method of 5G NR supporting transonic mobility in a 6G non-terrestrial network and a system thereof are presented. The DM-RS-based channel equalization method of 5G NR supporting transonic mobility in a 6G non-terrestrial network, proposed in the present invention, comprises the steps of: generating a front-loaded demodulation reference signal (DM-RS) symbol pattern with additional orthogonal symbols based on a 5G-NR standard through a DM-RS symbol pattern generation unit to support the mobility of user equipment (UE); and performing a 5G-NR link level simulation to analyze a channel model and a link level performance of a 5G-NR physical layer according to the generated DM-RS symbol pattern through a link level simulation execution unit.

title: API 6G - METHOD FOR GUARANTEEING 6G END-TO-END APPLICATION-LEVEL LATENCY USING NETWORK TRANSPORT API AND ELECTRONIC DEVICE
abstract: According to the present invention, a method for transmitting an application service between network ends by an electronic device comprises the steps of: providing raw data to an encoder of a lower layer by calling an API function in an application layer; receiving, by the encoder, information on a network status (NS) from a socket; providing, by the encoder, an application data unit (ADU) encoded by encoding the raw data based on the information on the NS to the socket; transmitting, by the socket, the ADU to a transmission layer; and transmitting the ADU to a network through the transmission layer.

title: Method and device for timing advance adjustment
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An apparatus and method for timing advance (TA) adjustment. In one embodiment, a method includes receiving first information indicating transmission of a channel using the same power and consecutive phase over multiple slots and second information indicating a first TA value. The method includes determining a second time slot that adjusts a time for transmission of the channel based on the first TA value, a first power for transmission of the channel in a time slot preceding the second time slot, and a second power for transmission of the channel in a time slot starting from the second time slot. The method further includes adjusting a time for transmission of the channel in the second time slot based on the first TA value, and transmitting the channel at the first power in a time slot prior to the second time slot, and transmitting the channel at the second power in a time

title: Multi-mode interference suppression superposition CSI feedback method assisted by speed and path sensing
abstract: The invention discloses a multi-mode interference suppression superposition CSI (Channel State Information) feedback method assisted by speed and path sensing, which comprises the following steps that: a BS (Base Station) end performs downlink CSI initial recovery according to a received superposition CSI feedback signal to obtain a space-frequency domain downlink CSI initial feature; the BS end obtains multi-mode prior information through sensing according to the sensing service signal and the uplink CSI; and obtaining feedback downlink CSI and detection uplink data sequences by using delay Doppler domain noise reduction processing and superposition interference suppression processing according to initial features of the downlink CSI and perceived multi-mode prior information. Compared with non-superposed CSI feedback, the method has the advantages that energy consumption of a UE end and data transmission resources of wireless communication systems such as 6G, IoT and WIFI 7 are saved

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR POWER CONTROL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system, wherein the method may comprise the steps of: receiving scheduling information for repeated transmission of a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) from a base station through a first signal; setting, for each of the one or more PUSCHs scheduled by the first signal, a time period in which a signal for transmit power control (TPC) can be received and applied; and performing power control of the PUSCH transmission corresponding to the set time period based on a second signal received from the base station within the set time period.

title: Acknowledgement information for multi-cell scheduling
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An apparatus and method for acknowledgement information for multi-cell scheduling in a wireless communication system. A method of a user equipment (UE) includes receiving first information of a set of cells and second information of a first time domain resource allocation (TDRA) table. The first TDRA table corresponds to a respective first cell in the set of cells. An entry of a TDRA table in the first TDRA table indicates a time resource for physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH) reception on a cell in the first cell. The method further includes identifying a second TDRA table, determining acknowledgement information corresponding to the set of cells based on a union of rows of the first TDRA table and the second TDRA table, and transmitting a physical uplink control channel (PUCCH) with the acknowledgement information. An entry of the second TDRA table indicates a time

title: 6G base station network chip and 6G radio frequency chip of mobile phone
abstract: The mobile phone is provided with a 6G base station network chip and a 6G radio frequency chip, and a low-orbit satellite identifies terahertz frequency band information data to obtain intelligent metasurface programming information data. The intelligent metasurface programming information data verifies a mobile phone 6G base station network chip to obtain a terahertz radio frequency chip, the terahertz radio frequency chip identifies the mobile phone 6G base station network chip to obtain a native wireless artificial intelligence system, and the native wireless artificial intelligence system identifies terahertz frequency band information data; carrying out native programming to calculate data information to autonomously match with an intelligent metasurface programming system, identifying data information of frequency bands of a ground satellite and a low-orbit satellite through a 6G network chip of a mobile phone base station to calculate data information in an electromagnetic wave

title: Method and apparatus for prioritizing within configuration grants
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure may be applied to intelligent services (e.g., smart home, smart building, smart city, smart car or connected car, health care, digital education, retail enterprise, security and safety-related services, etc.) based on the 5G communication technology and the IoT-related technology. The present disclosure discloses a method and an apparatus for prioritizing HARQ processes of a CG resource in a wireless communication system.

title: 6G wireless communication signal transmission connecting device
abstract: The invention aims to provide the 6G wireless communication signal transmission and connection device, and the requirements of signal transmission and connection among various 6G communication equipment components are met through the 6G wireless communication signal transmission and connection device. The invention relates to a 6G wireless communication signal transmission connecting device, which is used for realizing 5800-6400MHz frequency band bandwidth transmission and matching in 6G wireless communication. The antenna is characterized in that the antenna comprises a substrate, a first surface and a second surface of the substrate, and a resonance sheet; an input feeder line, a first microstrip line group and an output feeder line are arranged on the first surface of the substrate, and the input feeder line, the first microstrip line group and the output feeder line on the substrate are connected in sequence; the substrate is made of AI2O3 with the purity of 99.6%, the length of th

title: 6G digital twin network autonomous system based on intention driving
abstract: The invention discloses a 6G digital twin network autonomous system based on intention driving, and relates to the technical field of 6G Internet of Things. In order to relieve the problems that a communication process of a 6G network is easily interfered, node data load differentiation is serious, automatic network forming efficiency is low and troubleshooting is difficult, the intent-driven-based 6G digital twin network autonomous system adopts an intent-driven modeling subsystem, a security privacy subsystem and a monitoring feedback subsystem; wherein the intention-driven modeling subsystem is used for acquiring an intention-driven index of a 6G digital twin network based on acquired intention perception data, understanding the current state of the 6G digital twin network and performing network autonomous scheduling; the security privacy subsystem evaluates the use security condition of the 6G digital twin network; and the monitoring feedback subsystem monitors the 6G digital twin

title: Joint optimization method for base station precoding and active ARIS beam forming
abstract: The invention discloses a joint optimization method for base station precoding and active ARIS beam forming, and relates to an intelligent metasurface technology in the 6G field. The method comprises the following steps: constructing an active ARIS-assisted ground multi-user communication system model; modeling a direct connection channel and a cascade channel of the system; the method comprises the following steps: constructing an active ARIS reflected signal model and a multi-user system rate maximization optimization model, and constructing an experience playback pool and a deep reinforcement learning neural network based on a Soft Actor-Critic algorithm; initializing a channel response matrix as an input state parameter of a neural network, training the neural network, and outputting a base station precoding matrix and an intelligent metasurface beam forming matrix as action parameters; and on the basis of the trained and optimized deep reinforcement learning model, obtaining an op

title: Automatic Base Station Discovery, Selection, and Registration in 5G/6G
abstract: A searchable, portable network database of base station information can greatly simplify discovery, selection, and registration of user devices on a preferred cell in 5G or 6G. In addition, based on location, the user device can select the base station that is likely to provide the best signal. The network database can provide all of the static system information of the SSB message, which enables prospective user devices to receive downlink messages without searching for the SSB. In addition, the network database can provide all of the static system information contained in the SIB 1 message, which enables prospective user devices to transmit uplink messages without searching for the SIB1. Initial synchronization can be obtained by receiving any broadcast from the base station, or by receiving timing signals from a navigation satellite, among other ways. The user device can thereby avoid most or all of the arduous prior-art cell discovery steps.

title: METHOD AND UE FOR DETERMINING REQUEST FOR RESOURCES FROM NETWORK APPARATUS IN WIRELESS NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments disclosed herein relate to a method for determining request for resources from a network apparatus in a wireless network by a first UE of a multi-USIM UE. The method includes determining that the first UE of the multi-USIM UE need to request for resources from the network apparatus in the wireless network to transmit pending uplink data to the network apparatus or receive pending downlink data from the network apparatus.

title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE FOR DISPLAYING MEDIA CONTENT AND USER INTERFACE IN PLURALITY OF AREAS AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A processor of an electronic device according to an embodiment can acquire information about a plane on which light radiated from a projection assembly is to be projected. The processor can identify a first area having a specified ratio and a second area smaller than the first area from the plane based on the information. The processor can acquire a user interface (UI) related to media content in a state of displaying the media content identified through the communication circuit within the first area. The processor can display the UI having a layout based on the width and height of the second area within the second area. The present document may relate to a metaverse service aimed at enhancing the interconnectivity between real objects and virtual objects. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on 5G (fifth generation) and/or 6G (sixth generation).

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR BEAM OPERATION OF IAB NODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. One embodiment of the present disclosure can provide a transmission/reception method and apparatus using a beam in an integrated access and backhaul (IAB) node.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission. The disclosure may be applied to an intelligent service (for example, a smart home, a smart building, a smart city, a smart car or connected car, healthcare, digital education, retail business, a security and security related service, or the like) on the basis of a 5G communication technology and an IoT related technology. The disclosure discloses a method for saving energy of a base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CSI REPORTING IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Apparatuses and methods for channel state information (CSI) reporting in next generation multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes receiving information about a CSI report, the report based on at least two components: a set of basis entities and a set of coefficients; based on the information, determining the set of basis entities and the set of coefficients; and transmitting the CSI report including at least one indicator indicating at least one of the set of basis entities and the set of coefficients. The set of basis entities is based on X dimensions. The set of coefficients is not based on the X dimensions and is from a set of convolutional-based coefficients. X is associated with the CSI report and X≥1.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR DISPLAYING MEDIA CONTENT ON BASIS OF GRIP FORM WITH RESPECT TO EXTERNAL OBJECT, AND METHOD FOR SAME
abstract: A processor of a wearable device, according to one embodiment, can obtain a frame by using a camera while media content is displayed on display areas of displays. The processor can: identify, in the frame, the grip form of a body part with respect to an external object on the basis that the body part in contact with the external object is identified; and change the positions and sizes of the media content displayed on the respective displays in order to display the media content at a distance corresponding to the identified grip form. The present document can relate to a metaverse service for strengthening interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service can be provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONTROLLING ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE MODELS IN A COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The subject-matter of the present disclosure relates to a first network node for artificial intelligent (AI) management function in a communication system. The first network node comprises a transceiver; and a controller coupled with the transceiver and configured to: receive, from a second network node and a third network node, status information, receive, from a fourth network node, network information, determine an action to be performed by the second network node and the third network node based on the status information and the network information, transmit, to the second network node and the third network node, a control signal to perform the determined action, and receive, from the second network node and the third network node, an acknowledgment that the action is performed, wherein the second network node and the third network node comprise artificial intelligence function

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR OPERATING ENHANCED NON-PUBLIC NETWORKS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE), includes: receiving, from at least one stand-alone non-public network base station (SNPN BS), system information block (SIB) including a group ID (GID) at an access stratum (AS) of the UE; reporting each GID per SNPN BS to a non-access stratum (NAS) of the UE, at the AS of the UE; and in case that an RRCSetup message is received from one of the at least one SNPN BS, transmitting an RRCSetupComplete message including a onboarding request.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR NEW RADIO MULTICAST BROADCAST SERVICE RECEIPTION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein disclose methods and systems for efficient and reliable reception for New Radio Multicast Broadcast Service (NR MBS). Embodiments herein disclose a DRX approach and HARQ transmission and retransmission for MBS packets in order to support power efficient and reliable delivery of 5G MBS. Embodiments herein disclose mechanisms that work for the PTM and PTP based delivery framework for NR MBS.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS BY WHICH USER EQUIPMENT MANAGES SHORT-TIME SWITCHING GAP CONFIGURATION INFORMATION IN MOBILE COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-generation (5G) or 6th-generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method may include: receiving, from a base station (BS), configuration information for a multi-universal subscriber identity module (MUSIM) operation; receiving, from the BS, a radio resource control (RRC) release message including information indicating an RRC inactive mode; storing the received configuration information for the MUSIM operation, in response to the received RRC release message; and, when RRC connection resume is triggered, releasing the stored configuration information for the MUSIM operation.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR MANAGING LONG-TIME SWITCHING TIMER IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data rate. Provided is a method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system. The method may include: receiving, from a base station (BS), configuration information associated with the UE to leave a radio resource control (RRC) connection state for a multi-universal subscriber identity module (MUSIM) operation; based on the configuration information, transmitting, to the BS, information indicating a preferred RRC state when the UE leaves the RRC connection state, and starting a timer; and transitioning to an RRC idle state when the timer expires.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission. The disclosure may be applied to an intelligent service (for example, a smart home, a smart building, a smart city, a smart car or connected car, healthcare, digital education, retail business, a security and security related service, or the like) on the basis of a 5G communication technology and an IoT related technology. The disclosure discloses a method for saving energy of a base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF REPETITION SCHEME FOR DOWNLINK DATA CHANNEL IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates generally to operations of a terminal and a base station in a wireless communication system. Specifically, the present disclosure relates to a method and apparatus for repetitive transmission of a downlink data channel in a wireless communication system.

title: A METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING SIDELINK RESOURCE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The application discloses a method and apparatus for determining sidelink resource, the method comprising: determining a resource allocation scheme for transmitting sidelink signal or sidelink channel by a first node; and determining a resource for transmitting the sidelink signal or the sidelink channel based on the determined resource allocation scheme.

title: TRANSMISSION AND RECEPTION METHOD AND DEVICE ON BASIS OF MAXIMUM DATA RATE IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a terminal in a communication system is provided. The method comprises the steps of: confirming a maximum data rate supported by the terminal; confirming an instant data rate on the basis of the number of slots corresponding to one transport block (TB); confirming whether or not the maximum data rate satisfies the condition of being equal to or greater than the instant data rate; and transmitting or receiving data on the basis of whether or not the condition is satisfied.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMITTING PHASE TRACKING SIGNAL CONSIDERING MULTI-PANEL SIMULTANEOUS TRANSMISSION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a UE in a wireless communication system is provided, which includes receiving, from a BS, configuration information associated with a UL, the configuration information including SRS resource set information including a first SRS resource set and a second SRS resource set, information indicating that at most two PT-RS ports are used for the UL, and information for a configuration of simultaneous transmission across multi-panel (STxMP); receiving, from the BS, DCI including association information between a PT-RS port and a DMRS port; and in case STxMP is configured, transmitting, based on the DCI, the PT-RS using a first PT-RS port and a second PT-RS port, according to the received configuration of the STxMP. The first PT-RS port is associated with at least one first DMRS port associated with the first SRS resource set, and the second PT-RS port is associated w

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR DISPLAYING MEDIA CONTENT BASED ON GRIP FORM REGARDING EXTERNAL OBEJCT AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: According to one embodiment, a processor of a wearable device can acquire frames using a camera while displaying media content in a display area of a display. In the frame, the processor can identify a grip form of a body part for an external object based on the identification of the body part in contact with the external object. The processor can select either a first distance or a second distance, which is less than the first distance, to change a distance of the media content displayed away from the wearable device according to the grip form. The present document may be related to a metaverse service aimed at enhancing the interconnectivity between real objects and virtual objects. For example, the metaverse service can be provided through a network based on the fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: Method for application-specific authorization of network services in wireless network and wireless network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Accordingly, embodiments herein disclose a method performed by an Application Function (AF) server, the method including receiving a first request message including a User Equipment (UE) Service Identifier (ID) from a terminal, transmitting a second request message requesting association information of the terminal to an authorization server, the second request message including the terminal ID, in a case where the association information is retrieved based on the terminal ID, the association information of the terminal is received from the authorization server and executed to verify whether the UE server ID is associated with the terminal ID in the association information of the terminal.

title: Robust transmission method for metasurface-assisted backscatter communication system
abstract: The invention relates to a robust transmission method for a metasurface-assisted backscatter communication system, and belongs to the field of 6G communication. The method comprises the steps of constructing a statistical channel uncertainty model and a linear energy collection model, and establishing a robust throughput maximization resource allocation problem by jointly optimizing a beam forming vector of a base station, phase shift of an intelligent reflecting surface, a time allocation factor and a reflection coefficient of a reflecting node. An interrupt constraint containing channel uncertainty is converted into a deterministic constraint by using a Bernstein inequality and a variable substitution method, a robust weighting and throughput maximization resource allocation method based on iteration is proposed, and an optimal solution of resource allocation is obtained by combining a positive semi-definite relaxation method and a first-order Taylor expansion. According to the metho

title: Resource allocation method supporting 6G NGMA IoE network
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of NGMA IoE networks supporting 6G, and particularly discloses a resource allocation method of an NGMA IoE network supporting 6G, which establishes a new conflict graph model aiming at conflicts among TLs and converts the new conflict graph model into a conflict hypergraph model. And then, based on the conflict hypergraph model, establishing a resource allocation Markov decision network with ordered decision features. Furthermore, in order to reduce the amount of calculation by distributing the calculation load throughout the network and to achieve distributed learning, a federated average dominant actor-criticer algorithm (FedAC) is proposed. A simulation result shows that the scheme has relatively high network throughput in the NGMA IoE network supporting 6G.

title: Method and apparatus for transmitting and receiving control information based on cell handover in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises the following steps: sending capability information of a terminal to a base station; receiving configuration information related to physical uplink control channel (PUCCH) cell handover from the base station according to the capability information; and transmitting the PUCCH to the base station on one of the plurality of serving cells for PUCCH cell handover based on the configuration information. A plurality of serving cells for PUCCH cell handover are in the same timing advance group (TAG).

title: GaAs millimeter wave filter chip for 6G satellite communication internet
abstract: The invention discloses a GaAs millimeter wave filter chip for 6G satellite communication internet, which is applied to the field of radio frequency chips, and comprises a surface silicon nitride coating, a dielectric substrate, a grounding plate and an IPD ultra-wideband filter circuit arranged on the surface coating, the IPD ultra-wideband filter circuit comprises an input port, an output port, an input feeder line, an output feeder line and a strong coupling path, and a weak coupling path. Wherein the strong coupling path comprises two parallel microstrip transmission lines, the weak coupling path comprises two parallel grounding transmission lines, the above structure realizes the ultra-wideband filtering function of the circuit, and the miniaturized and high-performance ultra-wideband filtering characteristic is realized by adopting a novel circuit topological structure and combining an IPD process.

title: Multifunctional terahertz tunable optical window based on electromagnetically induced transparency
abstract: A multifunctional terahertz tunable device based on electromagnetically induced transparency belongs to the field of gigahertz and terahertz shielding and terahertz wave band communication, the multifunctional terahertz tunable device is composed of a plurality of units arranged in an array, the basic unit comprises a regulation and control layer and a metal microstructure layer which are stacked in sequence, and the metal microstructure layer is arranged on the surface of a light window. Wherein the regulation and control layer is a perovskite thin film with a chemical formula of MAPbBr3. According to the novel structure, the laser with the wavelength of 808nm is used for regulating and controlling the conductivity of the perovskite thin film, and the change of the transmittance can be regulated at the position of 0.59 THz, so that the multifunctional integrated optical device which can meet the requirements of optical transmission, terahertz wave band low-loss transmission, shielding

title: Improving and relating to disaster roaming services
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by an access and mobility management function (AMF) in a public land mobile network (PLMN) providing a disaster roaming service is provided. The method includes determining whether a disaster condition has ended in a previous PLMN associated with a user equipment (UE) registered for a disaster roaming service; in response to determining that the disaster condition has ended and the UE has an emergency protocol data unit (PDU) session, generating a message indicating that the UE is registered for the emergency service; and transmitting the message to the UE.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR MODIFYING BACKGROUND OBJECT BASED ON SIZE OR NUMBER OF FOREGROUND OBJECT AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: According to one embodiment of the present invention, a processor of a wearable device may overlap and display a foreground object on a background object having first brightness on a display. The processor may change the brightness of the background object to second brightness less than the first brightness based on identifying that a size of the foreground object is enlarged beyond a reference size range. The present document may be related to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. the present disclosure can be applied to intelligent services (eg, smart home, smart building, smart city, smart car or connected car, healthcare, digital education, retail business, security and safety related services, etc.) based on 5g communication technology and iot-related technology. the present disclosure discloses a method for saving energy of a base station.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR TRANSMITTING DOWNLINK DATA AS REPEATED DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5<sup>th</sup> generation (5G) or 6<sup>th</sup> generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method may include: receiving, from a base station (BS), a radio resource control (RRC) message including a parameter associated with using a start symbol of a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) monitoring occasion as a reference of a start and length identifier value (SLIV); determining, based on the parameter, when a physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH) is scheduled by downlink control information (DCI) transmitted via repetitive first PDCCH candidate and second PDCCH candidate, a reference symbol associated with a start symbol of the PDSCH by using the second PDCCH candidate starting after the first PDCCH candidate; and receiving, based on the reference symbol, downlink data via the PDSCH from the BS

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INDICATING DYNAMIC WAVEFORM SWITCHING MODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data rates. Disclosed is a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system, including receiving downlink control information (DCI) from a base station, identifying whether the DCI includes a dynamic waveform indicator, and in case that the DCI includes a dynamic waveform indicator, transmitting, to the base station, an uplink signal through a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) based on an uplink waveform indicated by the dynamic waveform indicator.

title: Phase-Shift Guard-Space Timestamp Point for 5G/6G Synchronization
abstract: A base station can cause a multitude of user devices in a network to be synchronized with the base station's clock using an ultra-lean low-complexity procedure in 5G or 6G. On a predetermined interval, the base station can transmit a timing signal in the guard-space of a predetermined resource element. The timing signal is a 180-degree phase reversal of the cyclic prefix centered in the guard-space. Each user device can receive the timing signal, determine how far the received timestamp point is from the middle of the guard-space (as viewed by the user device), and thereby determine a timing error between the user device clock and the base station clock, and correct the user device clock accordingly. In addition, the user device can average the timing adjustments over a number of instances, thereby determining a frequency offset if the average differs significantly from zero, and thereby adjust the clock frequency.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SELECTING A NETWORK ENTITY FOR USER EQUIPMENT CAMPING IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of UE for camping on a network entity is provided. The method includes receiving, by the UE, an information block from one of one or more network entities, determining, by the UE, if the indicated capability of the network entity or the corresponding security level are compliant with capability and security level requirement of the UE for camping, and camping by the UE, on the network entity when the indicated capability or the corresponding security level supported by the network entity is determined to be compliant with the capability and the security level requirement of the UE using the compliant type of cryptography technique.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING OPERATION IN STANDALONE NON-PUBLIC NETWORK (SNPN)
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure is for handling operation in standalone non-public network (SNPN). Embodiments herein disclose methods for handling an operation in a standalone non-public network (SNPN) by a UE. The method includes determining that a dialed number is an emergency number. Further, the method includes determining a current SNPN does not support an emergency service for the dialed number. Further, the method includes performing a deregistration procedure upon determining that the current SNPN does not support the emergency service for the dialed number. Further, the method includes selecting at least one of a cell and a public land mobile network (PLMN) that provides the emergency service to the UE after performing the deregistration procedure.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING MULTIPLE UPLINK CARRIER ACCESS IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). A method and an apparatus are provided in a wireless communication system, in which, artificial intelligence (AI) model setup information for estimating AI-based uplink (UL) pathloss is received from a base station. The AI-based UL pathloss for an UL carrier is estimated based on the AI model setup information.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR A MINIMISATION OF DRIVE TEST IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. In an embodiment, a method of performing Minimising Drive Test (MDT) of a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises: receiving, from a base station, a configuration including inter radio access technology (IRAT) frequencies; performing measurement on available IRAT frequencies based on the configuration; and logging the measurement results.

title: PROVIDING NEIGHBOUR CELL INFORMATION IN NON-TERRESTRIAL NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a base station, a first system information block (SIB) associated with satellite assistance information, the first SIB including first information on serving cell ephemeris and second information on a validity duration of the serving cell ephemeris, and receiving, from the base station, a second system information block (SIB) associated with neighbor satellite information based on a first timer with a duration of the validity duration of the serving cell ephemeris and a second timer for an acquisition of the first SIB before a radio link failure (RLF), the second SIB including third information on neighbor cell ephemeris.

title: A METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR REPLACEMENT OF ENERGY AND CAPACITY-CONSTRAINED 6G AERIAL CELLS
abstract: A method of replacing a source aerial cell with a target aerial cell includes receiving a transfer request from the target aerial cell to transfer link related parameters between the source aerial cell and UE and link related parameters between the source aerial cell and a core network. The method further includes transmitting each of the link related parameters to the target aerial cell in response to the received transfer request and further notifying, via a notification message, a change in PCID of the source aerial cell to the UE. The method furthermore includes transmitting a cell switching request to the target aerial cell along with positioning information of the source aerial cell for a switchover of a communication operation with the UE and terrestrial cells served by the source aerial cell, and thereafter the target aerial cell moves to a hovering position indicated by the transmitted positioning information.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR CONTROLLING SA CAPABILITY OF UE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for controlling standalone access (SA) capability performed by a terminal, includes: detecting that at least one subscriber identity module (SIM) card is available in the terminal; determining whether the at least one SIM card supports SA capability available in the terminal; enabling the SA capability in the terminal based on determining that the at least one SIM card supports the SA capability; and disabling the SA capability in the terminal based on determining that the at least one SIM card does not support the SA capability.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SELF-CONFIGURATION AND SELF-OPTIMIZATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure provides a method and device for self-configuration and self-optimization. There is disclosed a method performed by a first node in a wireless communication network, comprising: receiving, by the first node, a first message related to information on an unlicensed spectrum from a second node; performing, by the first node, self-optimization according to the information on the unlicensed spectrum.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MANAGING LINK FOR A MUSIM UE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide method for link management for MUSIM UE (100) performing coordinated gaps. In another embodiment, the method includes sending UE assistance information message comprising at least one requested switching gap release by a gap index to first network apparatus (200a) in response to determining that the switching gap is not required, and receiving a MUSIM gap configuration comprising release of the switching gap with the gap index from the first network apparatus (200a). In another embodiment, the method includes sending a UE assistance information message comprising a preferred RRC state to the first network apparatus (200a) in response to determining that the RRC connection release or RRC connection release with suspend configuration is required, and receiving one of a RRC connection release and a RRC connection release with suspend configuration, wherein t

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR APPLICATION SERVICE MANAGEMENT USING CLIENT FEEDBACK IN WIRELESS NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a method for application service management using a client feedback in a wireless network (1000). The method includes receiving, by an ASM server (200) in the wireless network (1000), a VAL service experience report having information about a VAL server (300) and a plurality of information elements by an ASM client device (100) in the wireless network (1000). Further the method includes storing, by the ASM server (200), the VAL service experience report. Further the method includes analyzing, by the ASM server (200), the VAL service experience report received from the ASM client device (100) and VAL service experience reports received from other ASM client devices (100) in the wireless network (1000). Further the method includes performing, by the ASM server (200), at least one corrective action based on the analysis.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR PROVIDING WIRELESS COMMUNICATION NETWORK ASSURANCE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a method and an Assurance Closed Control Loop (ACCL) system (101) for providing wireless communication network assurance. The method comprises receiving one or more assurance goals targeted for at least one of, one or more target locations and one or more target User Equipments (UEs). The one or more assurance goals are configured for an ACCL. Further, the method comprises monitoring a wireless communication network (102) based on the one or more assurance goals configured for the ACCL. Furthermore, the method comprises determining whether the one or more assurance goals are complied based on the monitoring.

title: RECONFIGURABLE INTELLIGENT SURFACE INCLUDING MULTIPLE UNIT CELLS
abstract: A 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). A reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) including a plurality of unit cells in a wireless communication system includes a first pattern included in a top layer of a unit cell included in the RIS, a second pattern included in a bottom layer of the unit cell included in the RIS, and at least one switch configured to electrically ground or short the first pattern and the second pattern in response to a command for determining whether the unit cell included in the RIS operates as a transmissive RIS or a reflective RIS.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR SELECTING A NETWORK ENTITY FOR USER EQUIPMENT CAMPING IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of UE for camping on a network entity is provided. The method includes receiving, by the UE, an information block from one of one or more network entities, determining, by the UE, if the indicated capability of the network entity or the corresponding security level are compliant with capability and security level requirement of the UE for camping, and camping by the UE, on the network entity when the indicated capability or the corresponding security level supported by the network entity is determined to be compliant with the capability and the security level requirement of the UE using the compliant type of cryptography technique.

title: USER EQUIPMENT FOR REPORTING RANDOM ACCESS FEATURES AND A METHOD THEREOF
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method by a user equipment (UE) (104) for reporting random access features, comprising, identifying a first feature triggering a random access procedure, performing the random access procedure based on a random access resource associated with a second feature, generating a report including information related to the first feature and information related to the second feature, and transmitting, the report to a base station (108), wherein the information related to the first feature and the information related to the second feature respectively include information related to at least one of a reduced capability (RedCap), a small data transmission (SDT), a network slice AS group (NSAG) or msg3 repetitions.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING OPERATION IN STANDALONE NON-PUBLIC NETWORK (SNPN)
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure is for handling operation in standalone non-public network (SNPN). Embodiments herein disclose methods for handling an operation in a standalone non-public network (SNPN) by a UE. The method includes determining that a dialed number is an emergency number. Further, the method includes determining a current SNPN does not support an emergency service for the dialed number. Further, the method includes performing a deregistration procedure upon determining that the current SNPN does not support the emergency service for the dialed number. Further, the method includes selecting at least one of a cell and a public land mobile network (PLMN) that provides the emergency service to the UE after performing the deregistration procedure.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENCODING AND DECODING USING CRC BIT IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). A method performed by a transmitting node in a wireless communication system may include encoding a plurality of information bits using a plurality of cyclic redundancy check (CRC) bits, interleaving the plurality of the information bits and the plurality of the CRC bits using an interleaving pattern, generating a codeword by convolution-encoding and polar-encoding the plurality of the interleaved information bits and the plurality of the interleaved CRC bits, and transmitting the codeword to a receiving node. The interleaving pattern may correspond to a matrix generated based on a size of the plurality of the information bits and a size the plurality of the CRC bits.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR CHANGING DATA TRANSMISSION PATH IN NEXT-GENERATION WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates than 4G communication systems such as LTE. Disclosed are a method and device for changing a data transmission path for improving the coverage in a next-generation wireless communication system.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE AND METHOD FOR CHANGING BACKGROUND OBJECT ON BASIS OF SIZE OR NUMBER OF FOREGROUND OBJECTS
abstract: A processor of a wearable device, according to one embodiment, may display, on a display, a foreground object superimposed on a background object having a first brightness. On the basis of identifying that at least a portion of the display occupied by the foreground object has increased in size, the processor may change the brightness of the background object to a second brightness that is lower than the first brightness. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for strengthening interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network based on fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G).

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR IMPLEMENTATION OF AI/ML IN A 5G NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. There is a method for supporting artificial intelligence/machine learning (AI/ML) functionality in a wireless communication system. The method comprises establishing a first radio resource control (RRC) connection between the UE and a base station (BS) by using a first signalling radio bearer (SRB); receiving, from the BS, via the first SRB, a configuration message comprising bearer configuration information; establishing a second radio resource control (RRC) connection between the UE and the BS, by using a second SRB; and receiving, from the BS, at least one RRC message including data related to the AI/ML functionality based on the second RRC connection, wherein the second SRB is configured based on the bearer configuration information.

title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND METHOD FOR GENERATING VISUAL OBJECT CORRESPONDING TO MOTION OF EXTERNAL OBJECT
abstract: A processor of the electronic device may identify, through a communication circuit, an external electronic device comprising another projection assembly distinguished from a projection assembly. The processor may transmit, to the external electronic device on the basis of the identification of the external electronic device, a first signal for displaying on a screen on the basis of a combination of a first display area formed by the projection assembly and a second display area formed by another projection assembly. The processor may transmit, to the external electronic device on the basis of identification, using a camera, of an external object spaced apart from the first display area and the second display area by the distance less than a designated distance, a second signal for increasing the size of an overlapping area in which the first display area and the second display area are overlapped with each other. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for reinforcing in

title: WEARABLE DEVICE AND METHOD FOR DISPLAYING USER INTERFACE RELATED TO CONTROL OF EXTERNAL ELECTRONIC DEVICE
abstract: A processor of a wearable device, according to one embodiment, may obtain a frame by using a camera while media content is displayed on a display area of a display. The processor may identify, in the frame, a grip shape of a body part with respect to an external object on the basis of identifying the body part in contact with the external object. The processor may change the distance of the media content displayed away from the wearable device by selecting either a first distance or a second distance less than the first distance according to the grip shape. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing the interconnectivity between an actual object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a fifth generation (5G) and/or sixth generation (6G) network.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR RADIO LINK MONITORING IN FULL-DUPLEX SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method includes receiving first information for a first set of RLM RSs corresponding to a first subset of slots on a cell, receiving second information for a second set of RLM RSs corresponding to a second subset of slots on the cell, determining a radio link failure for the first subset of slots when a reception quality of any of the first set of RLM RSs is below a reception quality threshold for a time period and determining a radio link failure for the second subset of slots when a reception quality of any of the second set of RLM RSs is below a reception quality threshold for a time period.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING MULTI-UPLINK CARRIER ACCESS IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate beyond a 4G communication system such as LTE. A method of a terminal in a wireless communication system of the present disclosure may comprise the steps of: receiving, from a base station, AI model configuration information for AI-based UL path loss estimation; and performing the AI-based UL path loss estimation for a base UL carrier on the basis of the AI model configuration information.

title: WEARABLE DEVICE FOR DISPLAYING USER INTERFACE ASSOCIATED WITH CONTROLLING OF EXTERNAL ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND METHOD THEREOF
abstract: A processor of a wearable device according to one embodiment of the present invention may obtain a frame by using a camera while media content is displayed on a display area of a display. The processor may identify, in the frame, a grip shape of a body part with respect to an external object based on identifying the body part in contact with the external object. The processor may change the distance of the media content displayed away from the wearable device by selecting either a first distance or a second distance less than the first distance according to the grip shape. The present document may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing the interconnectivity between an actual object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a fifth-generation (5G) and/or sixth-generation (6G) network.

title: ELECTRONIC DEVICE METHOD AND COMPUTER-READABLE STORAGE MEDIA IDENTIFYING LOCATION TO DISPLAY MEDIA CONTENT BASED ON USER'S BODY INFORMATION
abstract: One or more processors of an electronic device according to an embodiment of the present invention can obtain a positional relationship between a first plane, onto which light emitted from a projection assembly of the electronic device is projected, and a second plane, onto which light emitted from another projection assembly of the external electronic device is projected, based on identifying the external electronic device using a communication circuit. The one or more processors can acquire information for matching different areas of media content to the first plane and the second plane, respectively, based on distances by which the first plane and the second plane are spaced apart from the body portion of a user identified with a camera for each of the first plane and the second plane. The present invention may relate to a metaverse service for enhancing interconnectivity between a real object and a virtual object. For example, the metaverse service may be provided through a network

title: A METHOD AND AN APPARATUS OF PERFORMING DATA PATH CHANGE IN THE NEXT WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate after a 4g communication system such as lte. the present disclosure discloses a method and apparatus for changing a data transmission path to improve coverage in a next-generation mobile communication system.

title: 6G META-ANTENNA FOR 6TH GENERATION NETWORK BEAM-FORMING
abstract: Disclosed is a meta antenna. According to various embodiments of the present invention, the meta antenna comprises: a substrate including a ground surface; a first slot structure including a plurality of slots formed on the ground surface; a plurality of power supply lines electrically connected to the first slot structure; and a meta surface spaced apart from the ground surface, including a meta material, and including a plurality of unit cells, wherein each of the plurality of unit cells has a square cross-sectional shape, and has a ring-shaped metal pattern formed on one surface, wherein the inner diameter of the metal pattern may be smaller than half the length of one side of the square of the unit cell.

title: Method and apparatus for managing channel state information (CSI) feedback compression in wireless network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein disclose a method for managing CSI feedback compression in a wireless network by a base station. The method includes transmitting at least one pilot symbol on a first window. The method includes receiving at least one of a first type of feedback and a second type of feedback from the UE at the end of the first window or after the first window. The method includes receiving, in a first window, compressed CSI feedback based on a predefined precoder weight. The method includes calculating and predicting at least one precoder weight for the UE in at least one moment in the second window for at least one sub-band of the UE based on at least one of the first type of feedback and the second type of feedback. The method includes managing the received CSI feedback compression based on the predicted precoder weight.

title: Dynamic spectrum sharing method and device, equipment and storage medium
abstract: Provided are a dynamic spectrum sharing method, apparatus and device, and a storage medium, by determining a first analog beam, a terminal is enabled to be connected to a 6G network through the first analog beam, so that a DSS base station can support the connection of the 6G terminal while supporting the connection of network terminals of other systems except the 6G network, and the user experience is improved. According to the invention, the deployment of the 6G network can be accelerated.

title: Method and apparatus for supporting efficient network slicing in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A scheme for efficiently supporting a network slice group in a wireless communication system according to an embodiment of the present disclosure is disclosed.

title: High-performance millimeter wave broadband differential filtering phase shifter based on GaAs technology
abstract: The invention discloses a high-performance millimeter wave broadband differential filtering phase shifter based on a GaAs technology. The high-performance millimeter wave broadband differential filtering phase shifter comprises a dielectric substrate, a silicon nitride coating arranged on the upper surface of the dielectric substrate, a GaAs differential filtering phase shifter circuit arranged on the upper surface of the dielectric substrate, a grounding substrate arranged on the lower surface of the dielectric substrate and the like. The novel GaAs differential filtering phase shifter provided by the invention is excellent in structural design, advanced in process, high in selectivity, broadband filtering characteristic, good in phase shifting characteristic and high in environmental noise suppression capability, and can be well applied to the technical field of 6G satellite communication.

title: Method and apparatus for maintaining VPLMN priority due to failure of multiple SoR security checks
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system. Embodiments herein disclose a method for maintaining priority of a VPLMN during a PLMN selection procedure of a UE. In an embodiment, the method includes, in response to determining that the UE has entered a state and no second SOR information is received before the UE has entered the state or a security check of the received second SOR information is unsuccessful, ignoring a pre-configured priority for the VPLMN, and regarding the VPLMN as a lowest priority. The method includes regarding the priority of the VPLMN as a pre-configured priority by not regarding the VPLMN as the lowest priority, and in response to determining that the UE receives second SOR information before the UE enters the state and the second SOR security check is successful, stopping a timer associated with "the first SOR security check is unsuccessful".

title: Method and apparatus for transmitting UE assistance information by UE supporting multiple USIM in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) supporting multiple universal subscriber identity modules (MUSIM) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes: receiving configuration information about MUSIM operation from a base station; transmitting a UE assistance information message to the base station in a case where the UE needs to leave a radio resource control (RRC) connection state using a first Universal Subscriber Identity Module (USIM) connection and a timer for switching the state is not running; and starting a timer for switching the state based on the configuration information on the MUSIM operation.

title: Unmanned aerial vehicle track and resource design method and system for secure communication
abstract: The invention provides an unmanned aerial vehicle track and resource design method and system for secure communication. The method mainly comprises the following steps of: firstly, calculating user safety communication throughput in a safety communication network; establishing an unmanned aerial vehicle trajectory and resource allocation design optimization problem in the secure communication network according to the user secure communication throughput; establishing a continuous convex approximation problem of the unmanned aerial vehicle trajectory and resource allocation design optimization problem in the secure communication network based on a convex approximation method; and finally, iteratively solving the continuous convex approximation problem based on an interior point method to obtain optimal unmanned aerial vehicle trajectory and resource allocation, including unmanned aerial vehicle power and user scheduling coefficient allocation. According to the method, the transmission s

title: Method and apparatus for changing attached condition PSCELL in consideration of cell group activation or deactivation in next generation mobile communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method and apparatus for quickly activating a cell in a next generation mobile communication system may be provided.

title: Tile-type antenna module
abstract: A tile-type antenna module is provided. according to an embodiment of the present invention, the tile-type antenna module comprises: a lower substrate; an rf communication chip disposed on an upper portion of the lower substrate; a ground attached to a lower portion of the lower substrate; an upper substrate positioned on an upper portion of the rf communication chip; and patch antennas arranged on an upper surface of the upper substrate. accordingly, the antenna modules can be continuously attached to a pcb to support a large number of antenna systems such as massive mimo required in 5g/6g mobile communication and secure expandability of the antenna.

title: ROTOR FOR ROTARY ELECTRIC MACHINE AND ROTARY ELECTRIC MACHINE
abstract: To reduce the size and the weight of a brake structure of a rotor.SOLUTION: A rotor 1 for a rotary electric machine comprises: a shaft 2 that can rotate about a first axis AX; a magnetic pole part 3 fitted to the shaft 2; a rotor coil 91 disposed in the magnetic pole part 3; and a brake structure BS. The brake structure BS includes a first plate-like body 4-1 to which a first group of dampers bars 6G-1 is electrically connected, a second plate-like body 4-2 to which a second group of dampers bars 6G-2 is electrically connected, and a first connection part C-1. The first plate-like body 4-1 includes a first extension 4e-1 extending from a first outer edge 4u-1 connected to the first group of damper bars toward the shaft 2. The second plate-like body 4-2 includes a second extension 4e-2 extending from a second outer edge 4u-2 connected to the second group of dampers bars toward the shaft 2. The first connection part C-1 connects the first and second extensions 4e-1 and 4e-2 electrically

title: CRC METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENCODING AND DECODING USING CRC BIT IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system that supports higher data transmission rates. A method performed by a transmitter in a wireless communication system may comprise the steps of: encoding a plurality of information bits using a plurality of cyclic redundancy check (CRC) bits; interleaving the plurality of information bits and the plurality of CRC bits using an interleaving pattern; performing convolution encoding and polar encoding on the plurality of interleaved information bits and the plurality of interleaved CRC bits to generate a codeword; and transmitting the codeword to a receiver. The interleaving pattern may correspond to a matrix generated based on the size of the plurality of information bits and the size of the plurality of CRC bits.

abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5g or 6g communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate after a 4g communication system such as lte. a method of a terminal in a wireless communication system of the present disclosure may comprise the steps of: receiving ai model setting information for estimating an ai-based ul path loss from a base station; and estimating the ai-based ul path loss for a base ul carrier based on the ai model setting information.

title: Large Doppler frequency shift OTFS satellite communication demodulation and analysis method and device
abstract: The invention discloses a large Doppler frequency shift OTFS satellite communication demodulation and analysis method and device, and belongs to the field of satellite communication. The device comprises a data acquisition unit, an IQ imbalance calculation unit, an amplitude error calculation unit, a continuous phase signal generation unit, a convolution detection frame header determination unit, two protection time slot removal units, two receiving reference signal 1 acquisition units, a sampling phase error acquisition unit and two theoretical demodulation reference signal generation units. The system comprises a channel model extraction unit, a Doppler frequency error calculation unit, a Doppler frequency error elimination unit, a phase error calculation unit, a Doppler phase error elimination unit, a channel estimation unit, an interpolation smoothing unit, a channel error elimination unit, a Wigner transformation unit, a symplectic finite Fourier transformation unit and a digital

title: Method and apparatus for configuring session connection mode using network data analysis function in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a Network Data Analysis Function (NWDAF) in a mobile communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a session management function (SMF), a message requesting subscription to a data analysis service related to a service and session continuity mode selection policy (SSCMSP); obtaining network data provided by a network data providing service of the SMF and UE data collected by a user equipment (UE) for a data analysis service; generating an analysis for the SSCMSP based on the network data and the UE data; and transmitting the analysis for the SSCMSP to the SMF.

title: Improvements in and relating to access services after disaster conditions
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method and apparatus are provided for providing updated details to a User Equipment (UE) roaming in a disaster in a second telecommunications network due to a disaster condition affecting an area of a first telecommunications network. The second telecommunications network determines that the area has changed and sends the updated details to the UE. The updated details relate to areas of changes affected by disaster conditions.

title: RIS RECONFIGURABLE INTELLIGENT SURFACE INCLUDING A PLURARITY OF UNIT CELL
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate after a 4G communication system, such as LTE. According to one embodiment, a reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) including a plurality of unit cells in a wireless communication system includes: a first pattern included in a top layer of a unit cell included in the RIS; a second pattern included in a bottom layer of the unit cell included in the RIS; and at least one switch for electrically grounding or shorting the first pattern and the second pattern in response to a command for determining whether the unit cell included in the RIS operates as a transmissive RIS or a reflective RIS.

title: UE-GROUPING BASED COOPERATIVE TRANSMISSION FOR 6G IN-X CELLS
