abstract: The present invention relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. The present invention relates to an operation of a terminal and a base station in a wireless communication system. Specifically, the present invention provides a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system, which comprises the steps of: transmitting, to a base station, capability information indicating whether to support simultaneous multi-panel transmission; receiving, from the base station, a radio resource control (RRC) message including information on the simultaneous multi-panel transmission and information on one or more transmission configuration indicator (TCI) states for uplink transmission; receiving, from the base station, a medium access control (MAC) control element (CE) for activating at least one TCI state; and transmitting the uplink signal based on the activated at least one TCI state.

title: Cross-carrier beam indication
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving a list of transmission configuration indicator (TCI) states, a list of TCI state code points, and configuration information for cross-carrier scheduling, and receiving a downlink control information (DCI) format including (i) a carrier indicator field and (ii) a transmission configuration indication field indicating the TCI state code points. The TCI state code points are from a list of TCI state code points and indicate a TCI state of the first carrier and a TCI state of the second carrier. The method further includes applying the indicated TCI state code point to the first carrier and the second carrier, and receiving or transmitting a downlink (DL) channel or an uplink (UL) channel on the first carrier and the second carrier, respectively, based on a quasi-co-location attribute or a spatial attribute correspo

title: SIGNALING AND TRIGGER MECHANISMS FOR HANDOVER
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Methods and apparatuses for signaling and trigger mechanisms for handover in a wireless communication system. A method for operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving system information and information corresponding to different classes for handover signaling; transmitting a capability information including information indicating support of enhanced signaling mechanisms; receiving configuration information including measurement information and handover information based on the capability information; determining completion of handover based on the configuration information; and transmitting a completion of handover indication using a non-Radio Resource Control mechanism based on the completion of handover determination.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR RADIO LINK MONITORING FOR CROSS CARRIER SCHEDULING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure discloses a method by which user equipment reports a radio link failure (RLF) of a scheduling secondary cell (sSCell) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising the steps of: receiving cross carrier scheduling (CCS) configuration information and an indication of addition of an sSCell; receiving at least one of radio link monitoring (RLM) configuration information and RLF configuration information regarding the sSCell; performing an RLM operation on the sSCell on the basis of at least one of the RLM configuration information and the RLF configuration information; detecting an RLF state of the sSCell on the basis of the RLM operation; and reporting the RLF state of the sSCell on the basis of the result of the detection.

title: METHOD AND UE OF HARQ OPERATION FOR MBS RECEPTION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) supporting a hybrid automatic repeat and request (HARQ) operation for a multicast and broadcast service (MBS) in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: determining if a disabled HARQ-feedback is not applicable for at least one of a first physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH) transmission after an MBS multicast semi-persistent scheduling (SPS) (re-) activation, and a downlink control information (DCI) format indicating a SPS deactivation, when the HARQ-feedback is not configured; and providing the HARQ feedback for at least one of the first PDSCH transmission after the MBS multicast SPS re-activation, and the DCI format indicating the SPS deactivation as a first reporting mode of an ACK-NACK for the HARQ feedback, based on the determination.

title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING NON-3GPP SLICE REGISTRATION IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and systems are provided for handling non-3rd generation partnership project (3GPP) slice registration in 3GPP networks. A protocol data unit (PDU) session is managed in a wireless communication network in which a user equipment (UE) determines the allowed PDU session which can be transferred from non-3GPP access to 3GPP access. Paging resources are managed in a wireless communication network in which an access and mobility management function (AMF) checks if the data to be sent on the PDU session of non-3GPP access is of single-network slice selection assistance information (S-NSSAI) which is in an allowed network slice selection assistance information (NSSAI) list of 3GPP access.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR HANDLING RANDOM ACCESS CHANNEL INFORMATION IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Specifically, the disclosure related to method and apparatus for handling random access channel information for self-optimization network system. The UE receives a signaling message from network apparatus. The signaling message comprises a random access configuration for performing random access. Further, the UE performs the random access. Also, the UE determined whether the DL RSRP is above the first RSRP threshold or the second RSRP threshold. Further, the UE logs random access information based on random access performed. The random access information includes an indication whether the DL RSRP is above the first RSRP threshold or the second RSRP threshold and purpose of the random access. Further, the UE transmits the random access information to the network apparatus.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR OBTAINING EDGE ENABLER SERVER (EES) INFORMATION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Accordingly, embodiments herein disclose a method for obtaining edge enabler server (EES) list. The method includes receiving, by an Edge Configuration Server (ECS) (200), a retrieve EES request from a source EES (100). Further, the method includes determining, by the ECS (200), at least one target EES list based on the retrieve EES request. The target EES list is used for application context synchronization between Edge Application Servers (EASs) or indicates the target EES(s) about a common EAS that has been selected. Further, the method includes sending, by the ECS (200), a retrieve EES response comprising the at least one target EES list.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INDICATING LOSS OF COVERAGE IN NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a network is provided. The method includes transmitting, to the network, a first message, in response to the first message, receiving, from the network, a second message, and in response to the receiving of the second message, starting a timer in case that a condition is satisfied, wherein the condition is satisfied in case that the first message includes information indicating a duration of an unavailability period, but does not include information indicating a start of the unavailability period, and wherein the unavailability period is a period of time during which the UE is unable to access the network.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DISTRIBUTED UNSTRUCTURED DATA-PLANE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR IMPROVEMENTS IN AND RELATING TO LOAD BALANCING IN MICROSERVICE-BASED CORE NETWORKS
abstract: The disclosure related to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of operating a telecommunication network to load-balance external requests across multiple execution path instances in a communication system, the method comprising the step of: gathering, on a periodic or on-demand basis, information relating to a current input and output load of at least one microservice instance running in the network; when triggered by a trigger, employing the gathered information to calculate an execution graph; and enacting the execution graph in telecommunication network.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INTER-UE COORDINATION AND SIDELINK POSITIONING IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a method and an apparatus for performing positioning. The method according to an embodiment of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: identifying configuration information related to a sidelink positioning method; transmitting sidelink control information (SCI); if a sidelink positioning reference signal (SL-PRS) is requested on the basis of a bit field included in the SCI, receiving the SL-PRS; on the basis of the SL-PRS, transmitting information regarding measurement corresponding to the sidelink positioning method; if the measurement corresponding to the sidelink positioning method is requested on the basis of the bit field included in the SCI, transmitting the SL-PRS; and after the transmission of the SL-PRS, receiving the information regarding the measurement corresponding to the sidelink positioning method.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR ENERGY SAVING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure provides a method and device for saving energy of a base station.

title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMISSION AND RECEPTION OF UPLINK SIGNAL IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method and apparatus for transmission and reception of an uplink signal are provided. The method includes receiving second information that indicates a hybrid automatic repeat request-acknowledgement (HARQ-ACK) feedback mode, resolving overlapping for uplink channels associated with a same value of a control resource set (CORESET) pool index parameter, and in case that the second information indicates the HARQ-ACK feedback mode as joint, resolving overlapping for uplink channels associated with different values of the CORESET pool index parameter. The invention provides an enhanced uplink signal transmission method.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ALLOCATING BARE-METAL RESOURCES IN MICROSERVICE-BASED CORE NETWORKS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Disclosed is a method of operating a telecommunication network to calculate a microservice instance-server mapping, the method comprises the steps of: gathering information relating to a current load and capacity of a plurality of servers and network links in the telecommunication network; using the information to calculate a microservice instance-server mapping when triggered to do so by a predefined trigger condition; and enacting the mapping in the telecommunication network, while live, and storing the mapping into a first database.

title: SIGNAL PROCESSING METHOD AND APPARATUS, AND READABLE STORAGE MEDIUM
abstract: The present application relates to the field of mobile communications, can be applied to protocol frameworks such an NR or 6G, and particularly relates to a signal processing method and apparatus, and a readable storage medium. The method comprises: acquiring and sending one or more OFDM symbols, wherein the one or more OFDM symbols are carried on the same resource block, the same resource block comprises N subcarriers, the N subcarriers comprise M energy-charging subcarriers and K data subcarriers, the intersection of the M energy-charging subcarriers and the K data subcarriers is an empty set, the energy-charging subcarriers carry energy-charging symbols, and the data subcarriers carry data symbols. By using the embodiments of the present application, the coexistence of wireless energy transmission and data transmission can be realized, and the influence of wireless energy transmission on data transmission is reduced.

title: METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR MANAGING UNCREWED AERIAL SYSTEMS (UAS) IN 3GPP
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein disclose systems and methods for ensuring that a Network Function (NF) supporting correct Uncrewed Aerial System Network Function (UAS NF) functionality is selected by an Access and Mobility Management Function (AMF) and/or Session Management Function during authentication and authorization of Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV).

title: Reduced Delays for Previously-Delayed Users in 5G and 6G
abstract: Communications between user devices and base stations in 5G/6G, and in earlier generations, often permit gross unfairness in allocating transmission opportunities. A user device that has previously been denied permission to transmit is more likely to be denied again, whereas in a fair system the longest-delayed user device would be granted uplink permission soonest (QOS and priorities being equal). Therefore, herein is disclosed a base station protocol in which each user device's delay history is recorded and, when that user device again requests permission to transmit, that user device is granted sooner than the other users who have not been delayed, or not as long as the most-delayed user device. In versions, the user devices may report their accumulated delay times, or the base station may count the number of delay events each user device has experienced.

title: OPERATION OF A USER EQUIPMENT AND A TELECOMMUNICATION NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed is a method of controlling timer T3440 or T3540 in a User Equipment, UE, the timer being operable to guard a time during which the UE maintains a certain type of connection to a telecommunication network, wherein the timer has a default first time period in the absence of a first condition and a second condition being met, wherein if both the first condition and the second condition are met, then the first default time period is extended to a second time period.

title: NODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM AND METHOD PERFORMED BY THE SAME
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A first node, a second node, a method performed by first node and a method performed by second node in a wireless communication system are provided. The method performed by first node includes receiving a message regarding at least one of a measurement report of a UE, a suggested target cell for UE, a suggested handover execution condition for UE, and a PDCP sequence number for UE from a second node, and determining information for handover of UE based on the received message. The invention can improve efficiency of handover and/or avoid redundancy for data forwarding during handover.

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR SUPPORTING ACCESS FOR LOCAL SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for operating a terminal according to the present disclosure comprises the steps of: transmitting, to a first base station of a first network, a registration request message including an indicator indicating that a terminal has local access to a second network; receiving, from the first base station, a policy update request message including a cell identifier or an area identifier associated with the second network; updating a local access policy for the second network on the basis of the policy update request message; and connecting to a second base station of the second network through the local access on the basis of the updated policy.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR OPERATING WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM ON BASIS OF BANDWIDTH
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to a method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system and, particularly, to a method and a device for performing same, the method comprising the steps of: identifying a frequency band; determining a size of a subcarrier spacing (SCS) to be used on the frequency band if a size of the frequency band is smaller than a preconfigured bandwidth size; generating a synchronization signal block (SSB) on the basis of the determined size of the SCS; and transmitting the SSB on the frequency band.

title: Efficient AI Methods for Localization of Faulted Message Elements in 5G/6G
abstract: In 5G-Advanced and especially 6G, a primary concern is the increase in message faulting due to higher pathloss and phase noise at FR2 frequencies. Current methods for dealing with faults include packing the message with bulky error-correction (FEC) bits which are often ineffective, or automatically requesting a costly retransmission. As a substantially better alternative, the receiver may identify the specific fault locations and attempt an immediate repair by testing the modulation quality of each message element. For example, for a QAM-modulated message, the receiver can measure the I and Q branch deviations relative to predetermined levels, and the message element(s) with largest deviations is/are likely faulted. Alternatively, if the message is advantageously modulated according to the waveform amplitude and phase, the receiver can determine the amplitude and phase deviations relative to predetermined values. An AI model can greatly assist in the fault localization and in finding t

title: Phase-Noise Mitigation by Embedded Phase-Tracking Signals in 5G/6G
abstract: Access to FR2 (high frequency bands) is essential for anticipated high-demand networking in 5G-Advanced and 6G systems. Unfortunately, phase noise is an unavoidable barrier, greatly limiting message reliability. Therefore, a low-cost solution is provided in which the transmitter (either base station or user device) transmits a special phase-tracking reference signal consisting of zero amplitude in one branch, and a predetermined non-zero amplitude in the other branch. For example, in QAM, the I-branch may be powered according to the maximum branch amplitude of the modulation scheme, and the Q-branch may have zero amplitude as transmitted. The receiver, on the other hand, generally measures a non-zero amplitude in the received Q branch due to phase noise, which rotates the I and Q branches into each other. The receiver can then determine the phase rotation angle precisely by measuring the non-zero amplitude in the Q branch, negating phase noise at negligible cost.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DECODING POLARIZATION-ADJUSTED CONVOLUTIONAL CODE BY USING LIST VITERBI ALGORITHM ADJUSTING LIST SIZE DYNAMICALLY
abstract: The disclosure relates to fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication systems to support higher data rates. A receiver of a communication system includes a transceiver configured to receive a signal encoded based on polarization-adjusted convolutional (PAC) coding from a transmitter, and a controller configured to calculate branch metrics of branches defined in a trellis associated with the PAC, calculate a path metric based on an accumulated sum of the branch metrics, determine a path assigned to each state based on the path metric, and estimate a codeword based on the determined path, wherein a number of paths assigned to each state is dynamically determined according to the number of active states, and wherein the active state includes at least one branch.

title: Fault Correction by the Receiver in 5G and 6G Communications
abstract: In 5G-Advanced, and especially 6G, message faulting is expected to be a major impediment due to phase noise and increased pathloss attenuation, as well as network crowding. Therefore, new procedures are disclosed enabling the receiver to identify and correct message faults without a retransmission and without using bulky FEC (forward error correction) bits. For example, the receiver can measure the “distance” of each received message element from the nearest modulation state, and thereby quantify the modulation quality, or suspiciousness, of each message element. To correct the message, the worst-modulated ones can be altered first, generally selecting the next-closest states since small distortions are more likely than large distortions. The result: rapid message recovery, internal to the receiver processor, without adding to the message size or the latency.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DETERMINING PTRS-DMRS ASSOCIATION IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a UE in a wireless communication system includes receiving, from a BS, DCI scheduling a PUSCH of two CWs, the DCI including information on an association between a PTRS and a DMRS; identifying a PTRS port based on the information; and transmitting, to the BS, the PUSCH and the PTRS for the PUSCH. The PTRS is transmitted on the PTRS port.

title: Method and apparatus related applied cross reference and priority declaration for UL transmission
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An apparatus and method for uplink (UL) transmission are provided. A method for operating a user equipment (UE) includes receiving information on an uplink (UL) transmission based on N antenna ports; and receiving a first indicator (I) indicating a group g1,..., gG of G antenna ports. The group gi includes ni antenna ports selected from the N antenna ports. The method further comprises: identifying G groups based on the information and a first indicator (I); and transmitting the UL transmission based on the identified G groups. Here, i = 1,..., G, N belongs to {2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16}, G belongs to {1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16}, G < = N, and ni = N/G.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CSI REPORTING CONFIGURATION FOR CSI PREDICTION IN ONE OR MORE DOMAINS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Apparatus and methods for CSI reporting configuration for CSI prediction in one or more domains are provided. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes transmitting capability information indicating a capability of the UE to support machine learning (ML) based channel state information (CSI) prediction in one or more domains; receiving configuration information indicating a parameter for ML-based CSI prediction in one or more domains; receiving a CSI reference signal (RS); and measuring the CSI-RS. The method further comprises determining a plurality of CSI predictions in the one or more domains based on the configuration information and the measured CSI-RS; determining a CSI report, the CSI report including one or more of the plurality of CSI predictions and dependency information indicating a dependency between CSI predictions of the plurality of CSI prediction

title: Data service implementation method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium
assignee: RES INST CHINA MOBILE COMMUNICATIONS CORP
abstract: The invention provides a data service implementation method and device, electronic equipment and a storage medium. The method comprises the following steps: determining a data arrangement function network element and/or a network element list for data service based on a received first query request; and sending the data arrangement function network element and/or the network element list to the network opening function network element. Registration of a novel network element is realized through function enhancement of a network storage function network element NRF, and registration of related information which can be used for realizing data service is added on the basis of general registration information. The method comprises the steps that a data execution function network element is used for executing a data request, a data scheduling function network element is used for completing conversion of the data request, an NRF is used for completing determination of a data execution functi

title: Cooperative communication method between transmitting and receiving nodes for controlling multi-panel simultaneous transmitting terminal
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Disclosed are a method and an apparatus for reporting signals and information when a terminal arbitrarily determines the number of panels to be used in uplink communication and performs or is intended to perform uplink transmission by simultaneously using a plurality of panels, related information is reported to the base station to enable the base station to control or schedule uplink communications in consideration of the multi-panel operation of the terminal.

title: Authentication method, related equipment and storage medium
assignee: RES INST CHINA MOBILE COMMUNICATIONS CORP
abstract: The invention discloses an authentication method, user equipment, a 6th generation mobile communication technology (6G) base station and a storage medium. The method comprises the following steps: in the process of establishing radio resource control (RRC) connection, user equipment receives a first certificate and first information sent by a 6G base station; the first certificate is issued to the 6G base station by a superior certificate authority (CA) of the first certificate, the type of the first certificate is an X.509 certificate, and the first information comprises signature information generated based on transmission information with the 6G base station; and verifying the first certificate by using second information, and authenticating the 6G base station by using the first certificate and the first information after the verification is passed, the second information comprising at least one certificate chain.

title: PAC METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DECODING PAC CODE USING LIST VITERBI ALGORITHM ADJUSTING LIST SIZE DYNAMICALLY
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. According to an embodiment of the present invention, a receiver of a communication system comprises: a transmission and reception unit configured to receive a signal encoded based on polarization-adjusted convolutional (PAC) from a transmitter; and a control unit configured to calculate branch metrics of branches defined in trellis related to the PAC, calculate a path metric based on an accumulated sum of the branch metrics, determine a path allocated for each state based on the path metric, and estimate a codeword based on the determined path, wherein the number of paths allocated for each state is dynamically determined according to the number of active states, wherein the active state may be a state having at least one branch.

title: Wide-stop-band radio frequency lumped GaAs filter chip for 6G satellite communication internet
abstract: The invention discloses a wide-stop-band radio frequency lumped GaAs filter chip for a 6G satellite communication internet, which is applied to the radio frequency field and comprises a substrate and a high-selectivity wide-stop-band lumped IPD radio frequency filter circuit arranged on the substrate. The lumped filter circuit comprises an input port, an output port and a resonant network which is connected between the input port and the output port and is composed of capacitors and inductors, the resonant network comprises a low-pass filter network and a high-pass filter network, the two networks are connected through two inductors, and the two inductors are connected through the capacitor and the high-pass filter network. Due to the low-pass network and the two inductors connected with the low-pass network, harmonic suppression can be achieved. The whole network structure realizes three-mode filter response with two transmission zeros and a wide upper stop band, and has the advantage

title: Authentication method, related equipment and storage medium
assignee: RES INST CHINA MOBILE COMMUNICATIONS CORP
abstract: The invention discloses an authentication method, user equipment, a 6th generation mobile communication technology (6G) base station and a storage medium. The method comprises: in a process of establishing a radio resource control (RRC) connection, receiving first information sent by a 6G base station, the first information comprising signature information generated based on transmission information between the first information and the 6G base station; and second information and the first information are utilized to authenticate the 6G base station, and the second information comprises at least one local base station block chain certificate.

title: Intelligent reconnaissance aircraft based on 6G control and visual reconnaissance method
abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent reconnaissance aircraft based on 6G control and a visual reconnaissance method. The aircraft mainly comprises an aircraft body, wings fixed to the aircraft body, a first driving unit, a second driving unit, a sensor unit, a flight control unit and an intelligent reconnaissance unit. The aircraft is controlled by adopting a 6G signal, so that the aircraft can perform remote operation; due to the adoption of a composite flight mode of combining multiple rotor wings and fixed wings, the endurance time of the aircraft is longer; the aircraft has an intelligent investigation function of identifying a specific object on the ground in real time and determining the longitude and latitude of the specific object, so that the aircraft has a wide application prospect in a specific field.

title: Authentication method, related equipment and storage medium
assignee: RES INST CHINA MOBILE COMMUNICATIONS CORP
abstract: The invention discloses an authentication method, user equipment, a 6th generation mobile communication technology (6G) base station and a storage medium. The method comprises: in a process of establishing a radio resource control (RRC) connection, user equipment completes authentication of a 6G base station and generates a first key, the first key is shared by the user equipment and the 6G base station, and the first key is used for establishing a secure channel between the user equipment and the 6G base station, the established secure channel is used to protect the transmission of non-access stratum (NAS) signaling and/or access stratum (AS) signaling.

title: Method and apparatus for managing multiple TCI states per CORESET in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving downlink control information (DCI) associated with a control resource set (CORESET) from a base station, the DCI indicating one or more transmission configuration indicator (TCI) states; updating at least one of the plurality of TCI states based on the one or more TCI states indicated by the DCI; and applying the one or more TCI states to at least one of a downlink reception or an uplink transmission associated with the CORESET.

title: Improvements in and relating to efficient service function chain placement in a service-based telecommunication network core architecture
abstract: A method and apparatus to place Service Function Chains (SFC) in a service-based architecture of a telecommunication network. A Network Function (NF) is provided which performs steps (a) to (g). At step (a), the NF registers itself with a Network Resource Function (NRF) such that it is discoverable to other NFs. At steps (b) & (c), information and status are gathered for network resources, virtual links and the underlying physical network which includes physical links and total/used capacities. At steps (d) &amp; (e), information is gathered on the Core Network (CN) procedures to be implemented, the Virtual Network Functions (VNF) needed to implement the CN procedures and the associated resource requirements. At step (f), placement of the SFC is implemented for the CN procedures to satisfy given user demands over the available infrastructure resources. At step (g), the placement is communicated to a further entity such as a Unified Data Repository or Network Function Virtualisation

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR TRANSMITTING AND RECEIVING CONTROL INFORMATION AND DATA IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a communication system, such as a 5G or 6G communication system, capable of supporting higher data transmission rates. Methods and associated devices for transmitting information in a wireless communication system, according to embodiments of the present disclosure, include, but are not limited to, a method for configuring a CQI table, a method for configuring an MCS table, methods for determining related LBRM, PT-RS and system-supported maximum data rates, and a method for determining MCS for retransmission.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR CONTROLLING INTERFERENCE SIGNAL MEASUREMENT IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transfer rate beyond 4G communication systems such as LTE. A method for operating a first base station to control interference signal measurement of a first user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system, according to an embodiment of the present disclosure, may comprise the steps of: receiving information on a transmission/reception mode of a second base station from the second base station; on the basis of the information on the transmission/reception mode of the second base station, determining timing information to be used when the first UE measures an interference signal caused by an uplink signal of a second UE communicating with the second base station; and transmitting the timing information to the first UE so that the first UE measures the interference signal.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. In addition, the present disclosure discloses a method for reducing energy consumption of a base station in a mobile communication system, the method comprising the steps of: receiving a first control signal transmitted from a base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR EARLY TA ACQUISITION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5th generation (5G) or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by terminal in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving, from a base station, a radio resource control (RRC) message including configuration information associated with an early timing advance (TA) acquisition; receiving, from the base station, a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) order related to triggering a random access associated with the early TA acquisition on a lower layer triggered mobility (LTM) candidate cell; and performing the random access associated with the early TA acquisition triggered by the PDCCH order, based on the configuration information.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING TRANSMISSION CONFIGURATION INDICATOR FOR MULTI-CELL SCHEDULING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure relates to the operation of a terminal and a base station in a wireless communication system and, specifically, relates to a method for transmitting and receiving an uplink reference signal in a wireless communication system, and an apparatus capable of performing same. The present disclosure provides an apparatus and a method capable of providing services effectively in a mobile communication system.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT OF INTENT HANDLERS IN A COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The technical field relates generally to implementing techniques to acquire knowledge in order to make decisions to execute and meet the expectation targets. In particular, the technical field relates to acquiring knowledge in order to make decisions to execute and meet the expectation targets in 6G communication systems.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR ESTIMATING AND PREDICTING CHANNEL OF SECONDARY CELL IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. According to various embodiments of the disclosure, the present invention comprises the steps of: compressing channel information about a primary cell on the basis of channel status information (CSI) feedback received from a terminal; performing CSI recovery on compressed channel information about the secondary cell on the basis of the compressed channel information; performing the CSI recovery, and then acquiring predicted CSI of each of the primary cell and the secondary cell; generating a beamforming weight for the primary cell on the basis of the predicted CSI of the primary cell; and generating a beamforming weight for the secondary cell on the basis of the predicted CSI of the secondary cell.

title: METHOD PERFORMED BY NODE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM AND ELECTRONIC APPARATUS THEREOF
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). The present disclosure provides a method performed by a node in a wireless communication system and an electronic apparatus thereof. The method performed by the first node in the communication system includes: receiving a first signal on a first resource for channel measurement; determining a second resource; and reporting channel state information which is on the second resource.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The disclosure provides a method for reducing energy consumption of a base station (BS) in a mobile communication system, including receiving a first control signal transmitted from a BS, processing the received first control signal, and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the BS.

title: METHOD FOR SELECTING SECURITY ALGORITHM IN AUTHENTICATION PROCEDURE OF WIRELESS COMMUNICATION NETWORK
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) for performing network authentication is provided. The method includes determining, by the UE, a K-bit identification indicator indicating whether a length of an authentication key (K) stored in a subscriber identification module (SIM) is identified, selecting, by the UE, at least one security algorithm based on the K-bit identification indicator, and transmitting, by the UE to a network device, a registration request message including the K-bit identification indicator and information about the at least one security algorithm.

title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR AI/ML REPRESENTATION MODEL MANAGEMENT IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). There is disclosed a method for managing a representation-model in a wireless communications network. The method comprises: transmitting, by a first network entity/function, to a second network entity/function, a first message relating to a representation-model management procedure; and in response to the first message, transmitting, by the second network entity/function, to the first network entity/function, a second message relating to the representation-model management procedure. The representation-model management procedure may relate to one or more of: Network-Domain Monitoring; Representation-Model Handling; Representation-Model Registration; Representation-Model Selection; Representation-Model Aggregation; Representation-Model Configuration; Representation-Model Training; Representation-Mode

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). The present disclosure provides a method performed by a first node in a wireless communication system comprising: acquiring first information on a first interference to a first terminal, and second information related to node(s) associated with the first node; determining interfering base station related information and interference management related information based on the first information and the second information, wherein the first interference is formed by forwarding a signal sent from an interfering base station by a second node; sending the interference management related information to the second base station and/or the interfering base station, wherein the second base station is a base station of a serving cell of the second node.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING BEAMFORMING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A user equipment (UE) according to an embodiment of the disclosure may receive reference signals from a base station, perform a first operation of applying a first phase shift value to the received reference signals to allow adjacent reference signals on a radio resource to have a set phase difference, perform a second operation of obtaining a combined reference signal by combining the first phase shift value-applied reference signals, perform a third operation of measuring a first reception quality of the combined reference signal, perform the first, second, and third operations by applying at least one second phase shift value instead of the first phase shift value, the at least one second phase shift value including at least one phase shift value to allow the adjacent reference signals to have a phase difference different from the set phase difference, obtain a second reception

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR WAKING TERMINAL FOR MULTICAST SESSION ACTIVATION
abstract: The present disclosure, pertaining to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate, provides a method for operating an apparatus having an access and management function (AMF) for waking a terminal to activate a multicast/broadcast service (MBS) session in a mobile communication system.

title: A METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING SIDELINK RESOURCE
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The application discloses a method for determining sidelink resource, the method comprising: applying a sidelink communication system on a shared spectrum by a first node; and determining a sidelink transmission resource based on the sidelink communication system being applied on the shared spectrum.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a fifth generation (5G) or sixth generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The disclosure provides a method performed by a terminal in a wireless communication system, including receiving, from a base station while operating in a normal mode, an indicator indicating a base station energy saving mode, and operating in the base station energy saving mode based on the indicator.

title: IMPROVEMENTS IN AND RELATING TO CONTROL PLANE DATA TRANSMISSION
abstract: The disclosure relates to 5th generation (5G) and/or 6th generation (6G) communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein provide a method of controlling an user equipment (UE) transmitting data over a control plane (CP) including prohibiting the UE from transmitting the data over the CP when a 5G Session Management (5GS.M) timer is running.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). The present disclosure provides a method performed by a first node in a wireless communication system comprising: acquiring first information on a first interference to a first terminal, and second information related to node(s) associated with the first node; determining interfering base station related information and interference management related information based on the first information and the second information, wherein the first interference is formed by forwarding a signal sent from an interfering base station by a second node; sending the interference management related information to the second base station and/or the interfering base station, wherein the second base station is a base station of a serving cell of the second node.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DETECTING AND HANDLING MACHINE EMERGENCIES IN A NETWORK
abstract: The present invention provides an efficient and reliable system to identify machine emergency types within a 3GPP network/device such as LTE, 5G, 6G and the like and enrich the emergency messages with appropriate data such as location, machine ID, Plant ID and the like. The system further may provide for a mechanism to identify the appropriate emergency servers that can handle the type of emergency, and redirect the emergency messages to one or more servers along with enriched data. The system may further enable architectural systems that may be needed to handle such emergencies in a time effective manner.

title: AI-Based Message Interpretation and Fault Mitigation in 5G and 6G
abstract: Message faulting is expected to be a major challenge in 5G-Advanced and especially 6G, due to increased pathloss and phase noise at FR2 frequencies, and exponential crowding of networks. Legacy methods for forward-correction or automatic retransmissions are unsuitable to the fast-paced demands of next-generation users. Therefore, disclosed herein is an AI-based receiver that interprets a corrupted message to determine the most likely meaning or intent, and thereby provides one or more candidate corrected messages along with a likelihood that each of the candidate corrected messages is indeed correct. The AI model may also be provided with data on the context or current activity of the receiver, data on the waveform of each message element, and other data available to the receiver, so that the AI model can further refine the likelihood values. By recovering corrupted messages in the receiver, a costly retransmission may be avoided, saving time and resource usage.

title: CSI codebook for multiple TRP
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An apparatus and method for a CSI codebook for multiple TRP. A method for operating a user equipment (UE) is provided. The method includes receiving a configuration regarding a channel state information (CSI) report. The configuration includes information about (i) N > 1 sets of CSI reference signal (CSI-RS) ports and (ii) a codebook. The codebook includes spatial domain (SD) base components. The SD base component includes Lr base vectors for each set of r = 1,..., N. The method further includes measuring N sets of CSI-RS ports based on the configuration and identifying an SD-based component based on the measurement. The method also includes transmitting the CSI report. Lr values for r = 1,..., N are indicated by a joint indicator. The joint indicator is a function of Lr values.

title: Assistance information from repeater
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method for a network control repeater (NCR) in a mobile communication system is provided. The method includes receiving first information for a reception parameter of an uplink (UL) signal or channel set, and second information for reporting a metric corresponding to the UL signal or channel set; receiving a UL signal or a channel from the UL signal or channel set based on the first information; determining a measurement for the UL signal or channel; determining a value of the metric based on the measurement; and transmitting a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) or a physical uplink control channel (PUCCH) that provides the value.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR NETWORK CONTROL REPEATER IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method and apparatus for operating a repeater in a wireless communication system are provided. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure, a method performed by a repeater in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes receiving relay control information (RCI) from a base station via a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) or a media access control (MAC) control element (CE), the RCI including information about a beam; receiving a signal from a base station; and amplifying the signal and transmitting the amplified signal to a user equipment (UE) based on an RCI and a subcarrier spacing of the beam, where the RCI includes time information of the beam.

title: 6G wireless communication signal transmission connecting device
abstract: The utility model aims to provide the 6G wireless communication signal transmission and connection device, and the requirements of signal transmission and connection among various 6G communication equipment components are met through the 6G wireless communication signal transmission and connection device. The utility model relates to a 6G wireless communication signal transmission connecting device, which is used for realizing 5800-6400MHz frequency band bandwidth transmission and matching in 6G wireless communication. The antenna is characterized in that the antenna comprises a substrate, a first surface and a second surface of the substrate, and a resonance sheet; an input feeder line, a first microstrip line group and an output feeder line are arranged on the first surface of the substrate, and the input feeder line, the first microstrip line group and the output feeder line on the substrate are connected in sequence; the substrate is made of AI2O3 with the purity of 99.6%, the leng

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING TRANSMISSION CONFIGURATION INDICATION FIELD OF MULTI-CELL SCHEDULING DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. The present disclosure relates to an operation of a terminal and a base station in a wireless communication system, and more particularly, to a method for transmitting and receiving an uplink reference signal in a wireless communication system and an apparatus capable of performing the same. The present disclosure provides an apparatus and a method capable of effectively providing a service in a mobile communication system.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ESTIMATING AND PREDICTING CHANNEL OF A SECONDARY CELL IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, the method comprises the steps of: compressing channel information of a primary cell based on channel status information (CSI) feedback received from a terminal; performing CSI recovery for the compressed channel information of a secondary cell based on the compressed channel information; obtaining predicted CSI of each of the primary cell and the secondary cell after performing the CSI recovery; generating a beamforming weight for the primary cell based on the predicted CSI of the primary cell; and generating a beamforming weight for the secondary cell based on the predicted CSI of the secondary cell.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSMITTING OVER MULTIPLE SLOTS IN DUPLEX MODE
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. An apparatus and method for transmitting over a plurality of time slots in a duplex mode. A method includes receiving a first time slot, a second time slot, and transmitting information of a channel over a first number of time slots including time slots from the first time slot and the second time slot, the first time slot including a first uplink (UL) symbol associated with a first frequency resource of a sub-band (SB), the second time slot including a second UL symbol associated with a second frequency resource of the sub-band (SB), the second time slot includes a second UL symbol associated with a second frequency resource of a bandwidth (BW). The method also includes determining a first set of frequency resources within the SB for transmitting the channel on the first time slot and a second set of frequency resources within the BW for transmitting the channel on the sec

title: Method and device for configuring routing strategy
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method of a first network entity in a communication network is provided. The method includes requesting at least one analysis for updating control information including at least one component from a second network entity of a network data analysis function (NWDAF); receiving information about the at least one analysis from the second network entity; and configuring the control information based on the at least one component and the received information about the at least one analysis, wherein the at least one component is mapped to the at least one analysis.

title: Fixed unmanned aerial vehicle detection equipment
assignee: HENAN HONGTAI KONGFEI INFORMATION TECH CO LTD
abstract: The utility model discloses fixed unmanned aerial vehicle detection equipment, which comprises front-end equipment deployed at a detection countering master station and a ground terminal deployed at a command center, the front-end equipment comprises a protective cover, a bracket, an antenna and radio frequency receiving unit, a digital signal processing unit, a main control unit and a power supply unit; the antenna and radio frequency receiving unit comprises an antenna array, a low-noise amplification module, a multi-channel radio frequency receiving module, an omnidirectional antenna, a compass and a Beidou/GPS dual-mode positioning module. According to the utility model, the antenna array and the omnidirectional antenna are adopted to realize the transceiving work of wireless signals, and the 0.3-6G frequency band can be monitored; the high processing speed of the FPGA chip and the processing flexibility of the DSP chip are integrated, and unmanned aerial vehicle monitoring directi

title: Intelligent reflecting surface-assisted rate optimization method for sensing integrated system
assignee: INFORMATION COMMUNICATION COMPANY OF STATE GRID GANSU ELECTRIC POWER COMPANY
abstract: The invention relates to an intelligent reflector-assisted rate optimization method for a communication-inductance integrated system, and belongs to the field of 6G communication. The method includes constructing a non-convex problem and maximizing unicast achievable rates by jointly optimizing unicast and multicast transmission beamforming, reflected beamforming and common rate vectors. The non-convexity problem is solved by using auxiliary variables, continuous convex approximation and semi-definite relaxation methods in combination with sequential rank-one constraint relaxation, and the optimal solution of the problem is obtained based on an alternating optimization algorithm. The system effectiveness can be remarkably improved, and the system transmission rate is increased.

title: 6G near-field non-stationary channel space-time joint extrapolation method based on deep learning
abstract: The invention discloses a 6G near-field non-stationary channel space-time joint extrapolation method based on deep learning. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring partial airspace channel state information at a historical moment; wherein the partial airspace channel state information is incomplete channel state information; inputting the partial airspace channel state information into a space-time joint channel extrapolation model, and obtaining complete airspace channel state information at a future target moment output by the space-time joint channel extrapolation model; wherein the space-time joint channel extrapolation model comprises an LSTM module and a generator which are connected in series; according to the invention, the partial airspace channel state information at the future target moment is determined through the LSTM module according to the partial airspace channel state information at the historical moment, and then the complete airspace channel state infor

title: Multi-priority virtual network function migration method in low earth orbit satellite scene
abstract: The invention relates to a multi-priority virtual network function migration method in a low earth orbit satellite scene, and belongs to the technical field of 6G communication, and the method comprises the following steps: S1, in an LEO satellite network, considering the problem that the time delay sensitivity degrees of different types of VNFs are different, carrying out the priority division of each type of VNFs, and introducing a non-preemptive-priority queuing model; s2, under the condition that physical layer calculation, storage and bandwidth resource constraints are satisfied, considering dynamic nature of an LEO satellite and intermittency of an inter-satellite link, establishing a multi-priority VNF time delay optimization problem in an LEO satellite scene, and converting the optimization problem into an MDP model; and S3, solving the MDP through a VNF hierarchical migration algorithm based on deep reinforcement learning, firstly predicting the resource demand of the VNF, the

title: TA indication and application with multiple transmit-receive points
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Methods and apparatus for facilitating signaling a plurality of timing advance (TA) values to a user equipment (UE), facilitating the UE to communicate with a plurality of transmit receive points (TRPs) using the plurality of TA values, and facilitating updating of TA values in a wireless communication network. The UE includes a transceiver and a processor operably coupled to the transceiver. The transceiver is configured to receive a first TA command including a first TA value and a first TA group (TAG) identifier (ID) associated with a first entity and a second TA value and a second TAG ID associated with a second entity. The processor is configured to identify a TAG ID associated with an uplink (UL) transmission, and identify a TA value based on the TAG ID. The transceiver is further configured to transmit the UL transmission using the TA value.

title: Method and apparatus for performing random access and discontinuous reception in wireless communication system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) in a wireless communication system is provided. The method includes, if unicast discontinuous reception (DRX) and multicast DRX are configured, receiving a unicast-related downlink signal from a base station (BS), stopping a unicast DRX retransmission timer based on the received unicast-related downlink signal, and stopping a multicast DRX retransmission timer based on the received unicast-related downlink signal.

title: SECONDARY BATTERY, DEVICE, ARTIFICIAL GRAPHITE, AND PREPARATION METHOD THEREFOR
assignee: CONTEMPORARY AMPEREX TECHNOLOGY HONG KONG LTD [HK]
abstract: The present application discloses a secondary battery, an apparatus including the secondary battery, artificial graphite and a preparation method thereof. The secondary battery includes a negative electrode plate, the negative electrode plate including a negative active material, wherein the negative active material comprises an artificial graphite having a volume average particle size Dv50 of 12µm to 22µm, and the artificial graphite satisfies: 12≤Dv50×SSA≤25, in which SSA is the specific surface area of the artificial graphite, in m<2>/g; the negative electrode plate has a compaction density of 1.6g/cm<3> to 1.75g/cm<3>, and the negative electrode plate has an OI value of ≤ 15, wherein the OI value of the negative electrode plate represents a ratio C004/C110, in which C004 is the peak area of the diffraction peak of 004 crystal plane of the artificial graphite in the negative electrode plate and C110 is the peak area of the diffraction peak of 110 crystal plane of the artificial grap

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING TRANSMISSION CONFIGURATION INDICATION FIELD OF MULTI-CELL SCHEDULING DOWNLINK CONTROL INFORMATION IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to an operation of a terminal and a base station in a wireless communication system, and more particularly, to a method for transmitting and receiving an uplink data channel through MC-DCI in a wireless communication system and an apparatus capable of performing the same. The present disclosure provides an apparatus and a method capable of effectively providing a service in a mobile communication system.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS OF ONE TIME KEY MANAGEMENT FOR PROVISIONING PROFILE IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data rate. In a method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system, the method may include the steps of: receiving a first control signal transmitted from the base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting a second control signal generated based on the processing to the base station.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ENERGY SAVINGS OF COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a communication technique for fusing a 5G or 6G communication system with IoT technology to support a higher data transmission rate after a 4G system, and a system thereof. The present disclosure can be applied to intelligent services (for example, smart home, smart building, smart city, smart car or connected car, health care, digital education, retail business, security and safety related services, etc.) based on 5G communication technology and IoT-related technology. The present disclosure discloses a method for saving energy of a base station.

title: METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR DISCOVERING AND SELECTING MULTIPLE APPLICATION SERVERS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Embodiments herein disclose a method for discovering a mobile metaverse server by an enabler server (400). The method includes authenticating the application server, when the application server registers itself with the enabler server (400) by using a registration message. Further, the method includes storing the capability of the application server at the enabler server (400). Further, the method includes receiving a request for an application server discovery from an application enabler client running in a UE, where the request includes at least one capability of the UE and a discovery filter.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR VERIFICATION OF AN EDGE ENABLER CLIENT (EEC) INFORMATION IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure provides a method, performed by a NEF, in a wireless communication system. The method includes receiving a first request message including a IP address and a TMECI of the UE from EES; transmitting a second request message including a SUPI for the corresponding the IP address of the UE to a UDM; receiving the AF specific UE ID and a TMECI of the UE from the UDM; verifying whether the TMECI received from the EES matches with the TMECI received from the UDM; and transmitting the AF specific UE ID included in a first response message to the EES, when the verification is successful or rejecting the first request message, when the verification is unsuccessful.

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR PERFORMING SIMULTANEOUS RANGING AND SENSING IN ULTRA WIDEBAND (UWB) SYSTEMS
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Device and methods for performing simultaneous ranging and sensing in Ultra-Wideband (UWB) systems. Embodiments herein disclose methods and an electronic device (100) to perform simultaneous ranging and sensing in UWB systems. In the embodiment herein, the method can be used to perform simultaneous ranging and sensing using transmission defined for one of ranging or sensing only. In an embodiment herein, the method can be used to perform one or more ranging operations using at least one sensing packet defined for transmission, one or more sensing operations using at least one ranging packet defined for transmission, and one or more sensing operations using at least one MMS ranging packet defined for transmission. Embodiments herein disclose a packet format to perform simultaneous ranging and sensing using s

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR HANDLING LOWER LAYER TRIGGERED MOBILITY IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. Specifically, the disclosure related to a method for handling LTM in a wireless network. The method includes receiving, by a UE, a LTM configuration comprising a LTM candidate configuration for at least one candidate cell of plurality of candidate cells, and an LTM-reference configuration from a network apparatus, wherein the LTM candidate configuration is not a complete configuration, wherein the complete configuration is a RRC message applied directly at a LTM cell switch. The UE determines whether the received LTM-reference configuration is set to setup or release for the at least one candidate cell of the plurality of candidate cells. When the received LTM-reference configuration is set to setup in the UE, the UE replaces or stores the received LTM-reference configuration. When the received LTM-reference configuration is set to release, the UE deletes the LTM-reference configur

title: FULL POWER UPLINK TRANSMISSION
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a user equipment (UE) includes transmitting UE capability information including (i) information for a codebook-based UL transmission using eight antenna ports and (ii) information indicating whether the UE supports a UL full power transmission mode of fullpowerMode1 or fullpowerMode2; receiving a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) configuration; and receiving a transmit precoding matrix indicator (TPMI). The PUSCH configuration includes parameters indicating a codebook for the TPMI and ul-FullPowerTransmission8Tx. The method further includes determining a PUSCH transmission based on the PUSCH configuration, determining a power level for the PUSCH transmission based on the PUSCH configuration, and transmitting the PUSCH transmission with the determined power level.

title: METHODS AND APPARATUS FOR JOINT FRONTHAUL QUANTIZATION AND COMPRESSION OPTIMIZER (JFQCO) FOR ENERGY EFFICIENT O-RAN IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G communication system or a 6G communication system for supporting higher data rates beyond a 4G communication system such as long term evolution (LTE). Disclosed is a method of operating a telecommunication system comprising a Radio Unit, RU, and a Distributed Unit, DU, having a fronthaul interface therebetween, wherein the method comprises the step of: optimising energy efficiency of the telecommunication system by selectively controlling a first number, a, of quantization bits associated with an Analog to Digital Convertor in the RU, and a second number, b, of compression bits associated with a Decompression function in the DU, by use of Reinforcement Learning.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR AUTOSCALING IN A WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. According to an embodiment of the present disclosure there is provided a first entity in a network, the first entity comprising: a transceiver; at least one processor configured to: obtain first data from one or more second entities in the network, the first data comprising network related data; and perform hybrid scaling for a workload in the network based on the first data, wherein the hybrid scaling comprises a first type of scaling and a second type of scaling different to the first type of scaling. According to another embodiment there is provided a method of a first entity in a network, the method comprising: obtaining first data from one or more second entities in the network, the first data comprising network related data; and based on the first data, performing hybrid scaling for a workload in the network, wherein the hybrid scaling comprises a first type of scaling and a

title: METAVERSE SERVICES WITH NETWORK SLICING
abstract: The disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by an application provider in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: providing, to a service client, a service anchor for an access to a metaverse service; and receiving, from the service client, a request for providing the metaverse service via the service anchor; and providing, to the service client, the metaverse service, wherein the service anchor is associated with a location and service information, wherein the service anchor is provided based on service access information, and wherein the service access information includes authentication information on a user of the metaverse service.

title: TEMPORARY ENCRYPTION KEY MANAGEMENT METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROFILE PROVISIONING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting a higher data transmission rate. A method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system may comprise a control signal processing step comprising the steps of: receiving a first control signal being transmitted from the base station; processing the received first control signal; and transmitting, to the base station, a second control signal generated on the basis of the processing.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR APPLICATION LAYER PACKET SCHEDULING FOR TERMINAL POWER SAVING
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. In particular, the present disclosure relates to application layer packet scheduling for terminal power saving in a wireless communication system. A method for packet scheduling performed by an XR service transmitting device in a wireless communication system of the present disclosure may comprise the steps of: negotiating TIS packet scheduling with an XR service receiving device; and transmitting aperiodic XR content to the XR service receiving device on the basis of the TIS packet scheduling.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR ENERGY-SAVING IN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. The present disclosure provides a method by which a base station saves energy. According to one embodiment of the disclosure, the method performed by means of a terminal comprises the steps of: receiving a channel state information (CSI) report configuration through upper layer signaling, the CSI report configuration including one or more sub-configurations; receiving downlink control information (DCI) including a CSI request field that triggers a CSI report corresponding to the CSI report configuration; identifying a CSI computation time for the CSI report; and transmitting the CSI report through a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH) if it is identified that the CSI report is valid on the basis of the CSI computation time.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DETERMINING TRANSMISSION CONFIGURATION INDICATOR FOR MULTI-CELL SCHEDULING IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5G or 6G communication system to support a higher data transmission rate. The present disclosure relates to operations of a terminal and a base station in a wireless communication system and, particularly, the present disclosure relates to a method for transmitting and receiving an uplink data channel through MC-DCI in a wireless communication system, and an apparatus capable of performing same.

title: METHOD OF CONFIGURATING REFERENCE SIGNAL FOR RANGE ESTIMATION USING SUPER-RESOLUTION SENSING ALGORITHMS
abstract: This invention provides the method of choosing reference signal patterns based on criteria for super-resolution sensing algorithms, improves ambiguity characteristics of multiple targets positioning associated with such choice of RS pattern and algorithms, and applies the derived principles to either new 6G joint communication sensing, or existing 5G NR, reference signal (RS) patterns.

title: Socket, connector and electronic equipment
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of 5G and 6G signal high-speed transmission, and solves the technical problem of unstable current diversion caused by the fact that conductive contacts cannot be reliably and tightly abutted against each other in the prior art. title: Multi-band multi-polarization microwave and millimeter wave common-caliber MIMO (Multiple Input Multiple Output) wave scanning antenna array and application method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a multi-band multi-polarization microwave and millimeter wave common-caliber MIMO wave scanning antenna array and an application method. The multi-band multi-polarization microwave and millimeter wave common-caliber MIMO wave scanning antenna array comprises a low-frequency antenna array, a high-frequency antenna array, a mobile phone model, a low-frequency antenna array beam and a high-frequency antenna array beam, the low-frequency antenna array and the high-frequency antenna array are arranged in a staggered mode to jointly form a common-caliber wave scanning antenna array, and in the common-caliber wave scanning antenna array, the low-frequency antenna array and the high-frequency antenna array work independently and generate a low-frequency antenna array beam and a high-frequency antenna array beam respectively, and independent beam scanning is achieved on different frequency bands. And the common-caliber wave scanning antenna array is distributed on the lon

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROVIDING ACCESS PATH IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a 5th-Generation (5G) or 6th-Generation (6G) communication system for supporting higher data transmission rates. According to the present disclosure, an operation method of a UE in a wireless communication system includes transmitting a registration request message including an access traffic steering, handover, splitting (ATSSS) path handover indication to a target access network entity, receiving a registration accept message including an access path handover timer value from the target access network entity in response to the registration request message, and transmitting the received registration accept message to the target access network entity. Transmitting a packet data unit (PDU) session setup request message to an access and mobility management function (AMF) via the target access network entity based on the access path switching timer value, and releasing the PDU session with the source access network entity.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR SUPPORTING POWER SAVING SERVICE IN WIRELESS COMMUNICATION SYSTEM
